name: DISGUSTED (protectvoting.org)
subject: Trump wants you to pay for his military parade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Demand Congress defund this NOW >>
| | **BREAKING: Trump Planning $100 Million Military Parade for 79th Birthday**

A military parade is straight out of an authoritarian dictatorship.

**And Trump wants to use OUR taxpayer dollars to fund it!_We’re FUMING!!_**

[**Sign our urgent petition by MIDNIGHT to CANCEL Donald Trump’s disgusting military parade »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250426_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250426_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks) | [TELL CONGRESS: DEFUND TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250426_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks)
---
Donald Trump is determined to cut programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and the Department of Education — _yet he wants money for a PARADE?!_

**This is a slap in the face to the American people. We won’t stand for it, so we’re calling on Congress to act IMMEDIATELY.**

[**Join 25,000 Democrats in our virtual protest and add your name NOW to cancel Trump’s military parade!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250426_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks)
[TELL CONGRESS: DEFUND TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250426_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks)
---
Thank you for your help,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19649%2E878179%2ErLkmks)
---

subject: We just held back tears for Karoline Leavitt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

At just 27 years old, Karoline Leavitt is putting the anti-Trump Fake News in its place DAILY.

But after the report we just received, we had to hold back tears for Karoline...

| | | [](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/IbN7BvVuzyU4PPuGURuom3RXKFwg52diQjcrQaeheXS44GTlcNnUaIPYmyIpu0Ry5BxGimNVVYByomC-rlYsSjz5NYsQfHiJF8PQuLsYwvSEx2mvdMSxAtNC3l_cTn30pS_GF638_OzZP29ptX5aIJ4zcwmxAT5lJDCwBIP0l5CujHHAZOXiDv8vC-GGjaRrzWJDFaTP-kIRZmQSA8bJoqaNdVXmXB4gYmd22xwKjE7lM4u5FMxKJIaCZYRf29vxrS0gCBMWf9bZD8dR4hiEKwY2X8dQ9mPoIOvVBD3gY0GrtoIrv7765VzaCGBKAmsRCID8FJTe9KM50BBfFij_dC7D57jgBJ5SmylsnAEcTKZ-cwCabKDuuXXL3RwKGzaGaosjnUGA2vNWYjblUw0k0ynsmpUD-5xWUqBLjq4aJuBuMTmX5nD3566oaWn0GZWAS4xH4mMcz1gpt3yB0A/2yDcxdDe2DyS202qcGKftI676ZOgA0my/8)

Peter, You really have to see it to believe it... As I've been crisscrossing the country to college campuses, it's clear something BIG is happening in America. At every stop on Turning Point's **American Comeback Tour** , thousands of students are showing up --_waving flags, chanting "USA! USA! USA!" and defiantly standing for truth in the face of Leftist indoctrination._
---
[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/1AXcpTCdeFzogY7t6MTme4jzSutOKbG2bbB4_SZ8UdQqZJHsqQ6A5U3i6qc0C5HHLxtMXp-yBum9vjxk5dbIBLH4mOhTTrKOqPd9mpxvNCvt6slaNjnP0ILl8El5vP0PssNM-9mjn17P8AK74gOvBFb-smuOtXRZ5z53wWSwsUwSN2b0NBc4r4romB2TiUOaX-eA6PYEmia6J2vMCMkQ8J39uaTKT-adv3UVwx3goP98DJvodfKbjNwV2eJnnBbT7d_zdnM0owWsL3tfPb2SG1LnBZRGFw9UeoA1St7bo8g5fbVhditRuyK2GOlnfnTRbuiVP6yKILa3knUVVMLK_Ws4wY8sHmsqq3F33LaJPM2qNTklTXpOYXiH0nrcoddf0YjDtAjM7w3bWi9_sxHf4M2NLYayBpkVQjuMSgeL9iz_xK3sWb0RwVfdg30yUlZkxVO_itdoPosBziPs1A/XsS-DrUPTDnqRbShpRb43Hjo7TBggOPn/8)
---
Peter, young people are **_waking up_**... They're rejecting Leftist lies and propaganda. Instead, they're embracing faith, freedom, and patriotism like never before! We are in the middle of a new cultural revolution. This is exactly what I hoped for when I wrote my book, **_Right Wing Revolution_** - a battle plan to win the culture war, restore American greatness, and defeat the radical Left once and for all. **_And, Peter, I want to send you a FREE hardcover copy..._** _**[_**All I ask in return is that you chip in a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA reach even more young people and fuel our unstoppable movement.**_](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/a8EcwAPdUkfwEBsPSyAqYEJddJ-MMjV4sgvtyzMJXBI82LYYIKpNs3XLLoCiLzpdEIVqffQ-K3Rg2dNrEAxvkSYho4wpGPocqHoVCPvfaS3ky2jVws61uSIUTqX6OFY2GR3rvoLYKzwe4GIxkqmZLKCE30kD1LGZofkDTr3SDhI71h9BeKNYi6vTF3ZzXtq82qH6Mf282OvBAQdUqbeNvJVgI_2eC8PtiGpr4-9SyK7FG6F_Z0qCMEDsqwzqEtWOckYfsX6mF76SAM7kt3dXC9QGtAnZWVOPS2EAOVAEzp9cUUfecvq648UTf9GCHoN5mA86OsoisAyyERxcyP0u5llHc7JYV7rp5yeuCccFZDgUUgHZK64U-3RMabRkh7fY00BvE4kBLU6KZVGCFfKf9rLUf3Fbimp7ljIFJxrq1s6IJJ21sniWK5beG5RfMpgYb_h5iiE4UPOhOOuEKw/_aOf6NFwnHCU1FnFAg_M1wUuQVSmedjP/8)**_
---
[ **Make My Gift & Claim My FREE Book**](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/K1etn8j-Vvf8vdDmVwAl0NKy0u19yMoPMlW4DI8D1mhbC4rX_UTwxbIOp1sg92i9oE1VbiIGBBPt0uCVglXiy7o0JhcHS-7IHVe-fElYtpWNsQJVicy5JCtntxESXUHgpYkjAZT3wn8oUbd9OSI4ydcmTu7bY53pfixfACzja9Pk5JmjVNbWOAouCqp9ojMeY20cTj35vP1cKzs2p8xrxWDDylFis6LJtZ-cAgKICZqgJCfm5T-MTBNlijATarRJEkyEM3H9SRmY449qv5ODyJIkW54pk_pmLA4OsvJqT2O3Y57Sm7b1lR46XWsAdvAClL150_ENvNYVDSsBZD8k4boTGOIm7T_2qKYfYsJdIw4cwMMfQK5wMIk3QGLgNsYCyCE-Jjm7EZ-bzzCiD4T-SvkYa16wjhzXAKkHCu-fvvJ2pnIdMtvksBjebvrEsQjQvt_D3apaBzfI8E9VoA/szTFGTRB14_LI3_R50DgRG68ymN02bH-/8)
---
You know, Peter, it's amazing how far we've come in a matter of months... When I first released **_Right Wing Revolution_** last year, you and I were in the midst of a battle for national _SURVIVAL_.
---
[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/0BvGsInsRWNmwuHsSOvInCqjPNyH5a1W1jrn_lV39Xvi7VaZGfOkEIt23sPS0Iq7WbnSeaOepErxXQthJSGOiuBawlyGNlcV1aN2zYuq7Aq6q2_5OctxvhxSZr8mxqEHYQf8tb8nZljF4MOxR9aysYFoqY0Wco897EeuRbmpvsh2wKoKtCytiCWuyq3QdicViD7JvX7LrhMJgwloZ4HMDa5SUqbMaZyqyR6AMcZrCN-pM7kvqAvV9eTX1UCUrbcCOm0Wn8pWC6b8HpXukNVmXBU_2JpIC2nZf_RF-4awpjjjZIQ3zrL0nS8ep8rtEWIRBXS9zZPwuQy5_A-k5Le00sorAFOt-8rKyHAOVvD77xVVPMoSDGZ2KXiR4pdPMjaz7Y_kNaLhWkjPlI2e_G5NXfzWzPz9JtQZOmjvlaHClLBqaIj9NxvEA6JG-QyLDjr_w4NjPYdJE_irbxAGKg/gEG3_LMY2WeXXq42sBpvvv-rkY6Kc4BL/8)
---
But now, the evidence that the Left is on the ropes is EVERYWHERE. And it's no more apparent than on every college campus I visit. The energy of these young people...their hunger and enthusiasm for ideas they've never heard before...the outpouring of patriotism and love of their country... _It 's clear this is a once-in-a-generation moment!_ **But Peter, we can 't let up now. If we want to win our culture and defeat the Left once and for all, you and I must keep the pressure on.** That's why this book matters. That's why YOU matter. This isn't just a book - it's a **CALL TO ACTION** for every American who refuses to sit on the sidelines while we save our country from the radical Left. It's NOT another boring policy book. It's NOT another D.C. insider's take on politics. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Help me take back our libraries
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk2dpd27v0t04sf80bmbu79ana7i9te1p2c7ms9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8q427hkrcqlgq175uo1gbkaqbqecer9sgda6ofo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh7oph4aj17vvnkme255ljnlp3l5303q3anp8en8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ldvgcaf94kre2ocgj39ovvm0q0a7v4pgqbo14o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd6jqnu0jg7coufbokkiamo89nt2bh7a5dkpm85g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpo15alu2qos9kbsrucrgg444smchcb4fuobj7m0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z126unt7nk29in079822rj6f3jvnetlob2n28980_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zscvl8fqvdj2h5a71fe743e1c6c982ppd60rqgc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6hb0hv0ate82g9sg4bcsu3lcfpren96no3nqhn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl29v6ma4qojn3tbln43sffjjup0683jocu7uqao_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8sf2af02rtbk2crbthvr9v4s5q60ak5lmpg8jm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zarjskji5s922jek0ds6ajtbk0s2hq24rpcdtqj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdhjj2luoipl6ul5ij6dl84h8nac6qacrj4jt7i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0sbp1edu74hk4135anj1snl4a990hm1j8tv7o00_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o33c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z89p6cev9vaalj9aifp06g20n11796n7vqf0g3r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o33c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8m2v7h9pd40drm9ptbg3uv193f689s3tv6p5k9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o33c3h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb8bmfq1q2lrie7lecbtgi35ig4865b8usmmhi8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o33c3h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3nhvns5psv7qb5t7hut3edp80s8e6cc5ibrkb5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o33c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z90rb41v0fkk97t4vgitb8pgtmm42kl0tjr5koj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o33c9h2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zulbi373ovfsebooj1nghe4q7q611msaq8heulk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o33c9h2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

---

subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9h53vascqea1ueijpfnhn14cmhpnt0gsjr47djo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqk9qqt941lh07epgrsgugqbrio8c9ith9g2e3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2jq660f0nbpudk0r8j33fn7bo1kdt22qa25arho_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmb9qss1l79qsu45shsk0plohq9l18ei9ej7bvo0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1o35cdh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbvpkuvredbcd4re82agpsss1937ntj3s7iro9do_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1p76clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrurprccen34ng0ut8okj1uugimdnnvltj6s3qp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1p76clh2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmk48b4rgq1vqbcls25niq4hju9vrisc204999b8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1p76clh2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9ijglja5ot73n27ucorv9r17dbcusi11h893vqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1p76clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zobdihpcvdojmgompkiafasfmekr0hqc1atr0tdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1p76clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv6nfdfqcmmkdnhvgr7h9lij665d3ecijg1nf7q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1p76clh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc0hr3hhpq2fe1gh5h31prt9jtpii4sp40t7onbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctgm1p76clh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

---

name: Victor Riches
subject: URGENT - Marxist History in Schools
body:
That’s why so many young Americans are choosing despair over hope.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6fr2k84imjqgfd0uskkna7q5tup711gq6ci160g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)
Friend,

The Goldwater Institute is [on a mission to reclaim American history.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfq2d060mtcci1irvkjp7s1regcqdo1pub24sre8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)

And it starts by getting Marxist propaganda OUT of our schools.

We have only one chance to make that happen, and **we need the help of freedom-loving Americans like you. **

Right now, one in four American public high schools teach history through the lens of one radical socialist: Howard Zinn.

Zinn paints a distorted picture of America, defined by oppression, exploitation, and division. He ignores the values that made America a beacon of freedom and opportunity.

**That 's why our colleges are hotbeds of hate and anti-Americanism. That's why so many young Americans see socialism as the "solution."**

That's why so many young Americans are choosing despair over hope.
[The Goldwater Institute is liberating the minds of American students. Donate now to support our mission >> ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z792r3he2jbfaj9s4nfifngal5k1phsjr17nur9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)
[Donate Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmjg78f3bgj857k5n1361g5lgh4tl79cjg73fudo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)
We are exposing this radicalism and giving parents the resources they need to ensure that America's children learn our nation's founding principles.

As a service to parents and educators, the Goldwater Institute's Van Sittert Center for Constitutional Advocacy compared two of the most ambitious and prominent literary projects ever undertaken to teach high schoolers the history of the United States of America: Howard Zinn's _A People 's History of the United States_, and Wilfred McClay's _Land of Hope: An Invitation to the Great American Story_ -- a textbook that gives students an honest, balanced view of both America's virtues and struggles.

Our report details to parents how the adoption of one text versus the other will determine which narrative about the American experiment future generations adopt.

Rather than provoke division and distrust, we must help students engage with the nuanced history of the United States with both honesty and high expectations for the future.

**I am asking for your immediate help to win this battle for the minds of the next generation. Our nation depends on them, knowing America is a place where they can thrive and a force for good in the world.**

[Support the Goldwater Institute in reviving the American Dream in education by fighting for a fair portrayal of our history and reclaiming our education system in all 50 states >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2u385egk414h07lqmphd3k7nd7qebekq4iisou8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze8h5j6tedq7m7ka87ld6l12jomjvhfkf58rb0to_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)

[Donate $17.76](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpie2j801h33gih9cbq6194vncbc1daar2m2g3uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ost38l2jj76hh3ldqibfdlsc9qtldm26bshg50_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkvertj1u5niu12ba3jprei0lhe6os7tjm4jk2a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8pt4101uf63m29bkej4hji389p9didt9c61njd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvdvdb0bcc1agh0q32cg8q2c8iqk8dqp3sfckgh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)
The Goldwater Institute is focusing on expanding liberty **at the state level** , where decisions that _**directly affect our families are made.**_

We have SECURED high-impact reforms in all 50 states -- and defended them tirelessly in court to make sure they actually work as promised:
* **DEFENDING Parents ' Rights: **Working with parents to help them wage the legal battles to STOP schools from hiding information about their kids.

* **EXPANDING School Choice:** Making Arizona the first state to offer education savings accounts, and helping other states like Florida, Mississippi, North Carolina, and Tennessee in waging similar battles for school choice.

* **DEFEATING DEI:** launching a new 50-state legislative push to outlaw political litmus tests in our universities, once and for all.

* And now, **STOPPING the Leftist propaganda** that's infected the minds of our children and turned them against our nation's values.

**The Goldwater Institute not only passes reforms -- we defend them in court.** When the government refuses to follow the law, our best-in-class legal team takes action to hold them accountable.

Our strategy is simple:
1. _**Pass the law.**_
2. _**Defend the law.**_
3. _**Deliver results the American people are counting on.**_

But high-stakes legal fights on 50 different battlefields aren't cheap. And we can't count on Hollywood, the media, or woke billionaires backing us.

[We only have YOU: freedom-loving patriots who still believe in the promise this great nation has to offer.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhsbie6bpio4e2fbh1ruhvppe4jmepnhj1o1e7b8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)

EVERY dollar you give today will directly advance and defend policies that protect liberty and save our schools from radical indoctrination. And **EVERY amount makes an impact**.

[Help us REMOVE propaganda from our schools and BEGIN the long fight to win back the minds of the next generation. Your donation will support the Goldwater Institute's efforts to reclaim our education system and spread liberty nationwide >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgp97f1s0mgc45f6o2vms6eundlpufjmeagiusio_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuantdemagudj37chcu1t1h1gese7hotmg0065d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cph2bs)
Thank you for standing with us to protect the future of American education and this great nation.

Sincerely,
Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

subject: BILLIONS wasted—help us clean up the mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Washington’s bloated bureaucracy has drained taxpayers for long enough – it’s time to bring real accountability back to our government.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zom7tr5du75iua4m9p7tso9ri3q2752sh6lprpto_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cdh2bs)**Friend** ,**
**Washington 's bloated bureaucracy has drained taxpayers for long enough - it's time to bring real accountability back to our government.**
**The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is leading the charge to slash reckless spending, eliminate red tape, and restore order to our broken system. But this mission won't succeed without patriots like YOU weighing in.
[**That 's why you've been selected to take part in our Official DOGE Survey. Your insight is essential to cutting through the waste and rebuilding a government that serves YOU--not the entrenched elites.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbfhu5gkmkrdqfc72b0uumei42d5i8tc02b87cbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cdh2bs)[COMPLETE YOUR DOGE SURVEY NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4gbollsqf2t5270gt0vbh9a7s4jra5tegl4jtfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cdh2bs)We're focused on RESULTS, not empty promises. Here's what's at stake:

* Billions wasted on unnecessary programs and bureaucratic nonsense
* Federal workers treating taxpayers like an endless ATM
* Inefficiency and abuse left unchecked for far too long

It's time to flip the script.It's time to put federal 'workers' BACK to work.
But we need concrete, actionable ideas straight from the grassroots. No fluff, no business as usual.[TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY NOW ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjifnrorvreev9jnmcg4h4k1uupmf9um3dv0dkfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cdh2bs)Every second we wait, more of your hard-earned dollars are squandered by career politicians and swamp dwellers. Let's send them a message they can't ignore.
This is your opportunity to shape the future of America's government. Let's cut the waste and build a lean, efficient government worthy of the people it serves.[COMPLETE YOUR SURVEY & JOIN THE FIGHT >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo2hcfoggigqa1urmjick90fg22n6f955p8a2740_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim8or6cdh2bs)For America,

name: DOGE Audit Notice via House GOP
subject: BILLIONS wasted—help us clean up the mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Washington’s bloated bureaucracy has drained taxpayers for long enough – it’s time to bring real accountability back to our government.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z925ds1vcokufas5bqu06dfago7umkvinabl46co_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim4pb6c9h2bs)**Friend** ,**
**Washington 's bloated bureaucracy has drained taxpayers for long enough - it's time to bring real accountability back to our government.**
**The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is leading the charge to slash reckless spending, eliminate red tape, and restore order to our broken system. But this mission won't succeed without patriots like YOU weighing in.
[**That 's why you've been selected to take part in our Official DOGE Survey. Your insight is essential to cutting through the waste and rebuilding a government that serves YOU--not the entrenched elites.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd2r3mn7v8v6mgrrcb9vhom511usdq1i3gmgmblo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim4pb6c9h2bs)[COMPLETE YOUR DOGE SURVEY NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt5e0m6ucvlf9iifhln57t1t54si0deocr9mdq40_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim4pb6c9h2bs)We're focused on RESULTS, not empty promises. Here's what's at stake:

* Billions wasted on unnecessary programs and bureaucratic nonsense
* Federal workers treating taxpayers like an endless ATM
* Inefficiency and abuse left unchecked for far too long

It's time to flip the script.It's time to put federal 'workers' BACK to work.
But we need concrete, actionable ideas straight from the grassroots. No fluff, no business as usual.[TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY NOW ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5574vo241lvvuuc528pn7rd4mo8t36hdkv6gfgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim4pb6c9h2bs)Every second we wait, more of your hard-earned dollars are squandered by career politicians and swamp dwellers. Let's send them a message they can't ignore.
This is your opportunity to shape the future of America's government. Let's cut the waste and build a lean, efficient government worthy of the people it serves.[COMPLETE YOUR SURVEY & JOIN THE FIGHT >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1o3ufo1lso1a00ila45hb964r0g1s07oaaep1oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctim4pb6c9h2bs)For America,

name: Victor Riches
subject: URGENT - Marxist History in Schools
body:
That’s why so many young Americans are choosing despair over hope.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2sghdcuu2go3s0hlvpmrdmjlssc77dkip27o4f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)
Friend,

The Goldwater Institute is [on a mission to reclaim American history.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfgb1lucs04lqq7fjl28kg9udgfp0l3dre29jbt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)

And it starts by getting Marxist propaganda OUT of our schools.

We have only one chance to make that happen, and **we need the help of freedom-loving Americans like you. **

Right now, one in four American public high schools teach history through the lens of one radical socialist: Howard Zinn.

Zinn paints a distorted picture of America, defined by oppression, exploitation, and division. He ignores the values that made America a beacon of freedom and opportunity.

**That 's why our colleges are hotbeds of hate and anti-Americanism. That's why so many young Americans see socialism as the "solution."**

That's why so many young Americans are choosing despair over hope.
[The Goldwater Institute is liberating the minds of American students. Donate now to support our mission >> ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvuhacdjbdsiu288lassi9cq9gdo3l04e9mudd4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)
[Donate Now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0aj5colt5i7bqkd27nlroqsaskb461ms0t9a2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)
We are exposing this radicalism and giving parents the resources they need to ensure that America's children learn our nation's founding principles.

As a service to parents and educators, the Goldwater Institute's Van Sittert Center for Constitutional Advocacy compared two of the most ambitious and prominent literary projects ever undertaken to teach high schoolers the history of the United States of America: Howard Zinn's _A People 's History of the United States_, and Wilfred McClay's _Land of Hope: An Invitation to the Great American Story_ -- a textbook that gives students an honest, balanced view of both America's virtues and struggles.

Our report details to parents how the adoption of one text versus the other will determine which narrative about the American experiment future generations adopt.

Rather than provoke division and distrust, we must help students engage with the nuanced history of the United States with both honesty and high expectations for the future.

**I am asking for your immediate help to win this battle for the minds of the next generation. Our nation depends on them, knowing America is a place where they can thrive and a force for good in the world.**

[Support the Goldwater Institute in reviving the American Dream in education by fighting for a fair portrayal of our history and reclaiming our education system in all 50 states >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zim9mq423akdh0gjk2vi9vjuqono9rvalldei0fg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5506e6q1m8b5bruobhffpde9albshnm54j87lv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $17.76](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4hi6h438ljlsg4fl9p4db417mluj82ajmjfcp18_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvhfoo191t3g93ua7qu7884le94cdhi5f50pbe90_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7p12vhp8pm06jjkbct3beeltrklirpl8ocammh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5brgotr9iqllnrroodu46nfhigjsnjq23879q0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zumc7m4entedgmkgcdo0lkb996to4gqltc24sb3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)
The Goldwater Institute is focusing on expanding liberty **at the state level** , where decisions that _**directly affect our families are made.**_

We have SECURED high-impact reforms in all 50 states -- and defended them tirelessly in court to make sure they actually work as promised:
* **DEFENDING Parents ' Rights: **Working with parents to help them wage the legal battles to STOP schools from hiding information about their kids.

* **EXPANDING School Choice:** Making Arizona the first state to offer education savings accounts, and helping other states like Florida, Mississippi, North Carolina, and Tennessee in waging similar battles for school choice.

* **DEFEATING DEI:** launching a new 50-state legislative push to outlaw political litmus tests in our universities, once and for all.

* And now, **STOPPING the Leftist propaganda** that's infected the minds of our children and turned them against our nation's values.

**The Goldwater Institute not only passes reforms -- we defend them in court.** When the government refuses to follow the law, our best-in-class legal team takes action to hold them accountable.

Our strategy is simple:
1. _**Pass the law.**_
2. _**Defend the law.**_
3. _**Deliver results the American people are counting on.**_

But high-stakes legal fights on 50 different battlefields aren't cheap. And we can't count on Hollywood, the media, or woke billionaires backing us.

[We only have YOU: freedom-loving patriots who still believe in the promise this great nation has to offer.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvibk6np2hj7aquhfd4u9gtph17qr5i9g5ecefto_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)

EVERY dollar you give today will directly advance and defend policies that protect liberty and save our schools from radical indoctrination. And **EVERY amount makes an impact**.

[Help us REMOVE propaganda from our schools and BEGIN the long fight to win back the minds of the next generation. Your donation will support the Goldwater Institute's efforts to reclaim our education system and spread liberty nationwide >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmf7blfej0pmhvm1heoi173s5glg17jadotan5c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24amf46f93srs4rg342dig6vjcgh3oj0g0e5h80_rp22sh2s8i6eob5ctimaoj6cjh2bs)
Thank you for standing with us to protect the future of American education and this great nation.

Sincerely,
Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Investigate Letitia James
body:
New York’s AG should be disbarred

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot,
Letitia James, the far-left New York Attorney General who made it her mission to _“get Trump”_ , has just been referred to the DOJ for mortgage fraud.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The same **crooked Attorney General** who dragged President Trump through a rigged, Soviet-style show trial for “real estate fraud” **just got caught committing alleged real estate crimes herself.**
And she did it weeks before launching her politically motivated hit job on President Trump.
**_[Projection. Corruption. Arrogance.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****_[This is who they are.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
[INVESTIGATE LETITIA JAMES](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Now, justice is catching up to her.
We knew the truth about Letitia James from the start - that **_she was running a partisan witch hunt_** , that** _she had no case from the beginning_** , and that **_she was the one abusing her position and the law_****.**
**[Letitia James should not be holding public office, she should be disbarred](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct).**
**But she’s not the only one!**
Letitia James is just the tip of the spear - _one of many corrupt Democrats_ who thought they could use the law as a political weapon and walk away clean.
They lied to the public.
They smeared patriots.
They tried to break, bankrupt, and erase President Trump.
Now it’s all unraveling for them, but only if we hold them accountable.
Friend, the America First movement is on the rise, the truth is coming to light, and for the first time in decades the radical Leftists are on defense.
**_[This isn’t the time to celebrate quietly. It's time to strike even harder>>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
[INVESTIGATE LETITIA JAMES](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Letitia James and her handlers are going to mobilize every single resource at their disposal to defend her in court, sweep this under the rug, and walk away without any consequences.
We absolutely can’t let that happen.
The media will spin. The swamp will close ranks. And if we don’t seize this moment - it will vanish and be.
**__[That’s why I’m asking you to help us pour fuel on the fire>>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**
[INVESTIGATE LETITIA JAMES](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
If you ever wanted to send a message to the corrupt elite who tried to destroy Trump and get away with it... If you ever wanted to **actually drain the swamp**... **This is your moment**** _._**
I am demanding that we investigate Letitia James.
**__[Please add your name to join my call for an investigation and make a contribution to support my efforts to deliver accountability>>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**
And after we hold her accountable we are coming to shed light on the rest of the corrupt Democrats who abused their power to weaponize our courts and destroy America First conservatives like President Trump through lawfare.
Our fight for accountability is just beginning, I would be honored to have your continued support in this fight to save our justice system and Make America Great Again.
_Your Fighter in Congress,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/anwa/?__vbtrk=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2NzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump and Zelensky, The Pope's Funeral, and NFL Draft
body:
President Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky [met in Rome](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFuhCAQBuCn0RsGB1b0wKGXvW2vPRoKw0oXweCs1j594yZ9gl5nkj__93_cxpsJMaT7u5lRk89jwn2NSIRlpPKcF5PcD0ZM6-OgCZe84OpH4HBhXDJQozMhHqOsnfaIgKJG3Sp5UbIXStSTlh0aGCxw2yney16BbT36Vij3KZ2FOugzjUtQLedd2zadGCQH5TiIQQ29qCRHFyiX5iuHRBP6eOQNS2PzXEc9ES1rJd4quFZw3fe98fn7VJz_85JLdBVcXxr2ZznYZDZkG5aDLSW7p6WwISMTH8wQYXLstDJfTLJhZf6ZsJhYF-2WPcQY1k5Vkt9nE-KrCP1rvU3DbwAAAP__NrKHFg) ahead of Pope Francis' funeral on Saturday, their first face-to-face discussion since an Oval Office spat in February.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuK8zAQBeCnkbsE3WzZhYofQrr87ZZiYo1s7epiZDkh-_SLzUIeYNv54HDmfNzMDXzwafoPEXV12SR8rgFrxWJq2eICyX5jwLR-veqMS15wdYZT3p6oPHFlLPjwMrKx2iFyFA1qpmSrZC-UaGZtB3lnoHo6qhEVHSXrlWNtC86Bu4NovN7TqOSKUdoxdu7EIClXlnIxqKEXRFK0vuZy_sw-1RldeOUHlvOYYxP0XOuyEvGP8Cvh16PjVg7PZdqP4rrVaNa8lRGJuLwDCO92iWj9Fom4vF__lRHiAn5Ku0H1OUFoirbL04fg104RSacIPhxN6p_me2j-EwAA___DRoba) | |
# Sunday, April 27, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1981, [the first commercial computer mouse was sold](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAQRL9GdHjESZagUJGGzmlTMpg7jBKBNNJhD_n6TJzkC1Lv292Z93YZLqMPfru9jis5nuOw0aMEYqY8cN7XNG74SYG28nHwQikmKvMAEs611DXYAUcfjkFX6GYiIFWRa6w-W90qq6rFkbJX2bZdh2ZW5w4l2hkndTXY4mQMVt59r0kNtpHSNM3JqE5LsChBdbZrldCS0HPMp_foN15oDke8Uz5Nca2CW5hTEepFQC-gX3zhmI96imva-QcS0DNNyxZDvB0C-r-sXuNe6IkGYqp_uwL6KjtMDx-CL8YKLW_r6MPzj_8l6e7gKwAA__--lX3D) as an accessory to a Xerox Star computer that cost $16,500. While the Xerox Star was a commercial flop, the mouse lived on. You've probably heard of birth-month gemstones, but did you know that each month has a representative bird? [Check out this list](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAUhJ_GdCBzbDAULm5Dt7dNiUx8vDjxD7JPFm2ePmLzCOlGo08z0vd2W2_GB5_u_01ETS6vCc8akAjLSuUrHibZbwyY6ueTdjzygdWtwGFouWxBrdb48FxlY7VDBBQN6l7JQclJKNHsGmcl-gnsJK0z3GybmZRT1g2jg20aZOP1tcYlqJ7zse-7UcySg7IcxKzmSTDJ0XrKpfvIPtGOLjzzA0v3nmMT9E50VCb-MVgYLOd5dpsvtppkt5BzrBfGYLlKn-6_ifY25kR7-0IZLE3R9jh9CL6Oikl-j8aH1wH9ycpDw08AAAD__wx8dzM) to learn which feathered friend matches up with your birthday. ## Trump Meets with Zelensky
President Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky [met in Rome](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFuhCAQBuCn0RsGB1b0wKGXvW2vPRoKw0oXweCs1j594yZ9gl5nkj__93_cxpsJMaT7u5lRk89jwn2NSIRlpPKcF5PcD0ZM6-OgCZe84OpH4HBhXDJQozMhHqOsnfaIgKJG3Sp5UbIXStSTlh0aGCxw2yney16BbT36Vij3KZ2FOugzjUtQLedd2zadGCQH5TiIQQ29qCRHFyiX5iuHRBP6eOQNS2PzXEc9ES1rJd4quFZw3fe98fn7VJz_85JLdBVcXxr2ZznYZDZkG5aDLSW7p6WwISMTH8wQYXLstDJfTLJhZf6ZsJhYF-2WPcQY1k5Vkt9nE-KrCP1rvU3DbwAAAP__NrKHFg) ahead of Pope Francis' funeral on Saturday, their first face-to-face discussion since an Oval Office spat in February. White House Communications Director Steven Cheung called the visit ["a very productive discussion,"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAURb_GdI7Ms7GhcLENXbbdEjn4Ed6OsZF5k4j5-lEizRdMeXWle3XOv-t0DZQo3_-GDT0vZcr4PBIyY524fm57yPELE-bj4-QV97LjsUygoJPKSHBTDJTOyTTRL4iAukHfOtM502unm9XPAd2ib91gdIf9AMZ2rbI3a3vdzdGahvxrTRlwrVK2bS9WD0aBiwr04IZeC6MwEpd6-V8o84pLOssD62UuW5P8yrwfQv8RMAoYecWVUnp1Asa9JJpPASNlxpoDU8khCRg7sIPSVsZXjvJNKh8llXhuZ5U_xLKWDeWGyJTvAsam-rg_KSU6rBNG3bdA76-GfyXv4eE7AAD__wNHhA8) and said details would be released later. Zelensky also spoke positively of the meeting, saying in [a social media post](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykksuS2ywQhZ8G7XBBc9VCi7_-iXeTXSpV2aiwaGwy6FIIW6M8fQrZ8wRZQZ1uoM_5-Pnev7uY4nT97kbsSpj7Cbc1YSmY-5Lv4-Im_wcTTuvHXm64zAuuoQcGijJJwfTexbT3svFdQAQUDXbcSGWkFUY0t045YbEF7xwI66GFQWvBDQeu7dBeXBO7ehuTYDhjmvOTFq1kYDwD0ZrWCiIZ-ljmfPo9x6ncMKR9fmA-DfPYpO5WyrIS8R-BM4HzZ1UJnH-9Zt5_OCLOGUO_5oGIt7LVFZT6VsJGQJn_yza4cXlKG2LB8YL-VSmYx6PCW66ZbRUDZq0CCUy8Wq75aAjCWWmc5laYwXGttNXOXjhIw1sBZgiK1Ry-npyn49jKewK6jnfPiYi3pxlQ1Y6qhhSct207hfmzgnmaq9qckz92ByT6hWinN_dA-sC80yXP_j6U-EBaXPqgrhScPK0IachuGuJKw33C7FKTO79sMaW4akMku44upiPf8k-f4tHB3wAAAP__qbTE5Q), _“Good meeting. We discussed a lot one on one. Hoping for results on everything we covered. Protecting lives of our people. ## Pope Francis Laid to Rest
World leaders and rank-and-file Catholic faithful [paid final respects to Pope Francis](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO8yAUhVdjd454mYsLir9Jl7-d0rqBS8wMxhaQRJ7VjzxbmPLoSOfxfdzmG8YU8-M_rmRb2OZM75qoNSpzK891x-y_KVGuX0dbaN92qmEWTIwDU4OA2WNMx6x6bwORINmT5aBGUEaC7BdLygFoZwKM6JiXQZEZp1EGuKvJ6Hsf7ZnGlADOmOb8ouWkmADPhJxgMrJTjHxsW7l8bjG3hUI6theVi9vWPtmltb128l8nrp244n4eOK1TlBZdok5cz91DKJhdrMMLW3SYh_DMVDANXqNBBXwC4wR3wJ0M3DsGQWtJYPpi_f6OKcWqoVPssWJMv-3tT8heVvwEAAD__5jwfoU) at his funeral on Saturday, reflecting on his concern for people on the peripheries and his wish to be remembered as a simple pastor. Presidents and princes attended the Mass in St. Peter’s Square in Vatican City, while prisoners and migrants welcomed Francis’ coffin at his final resting place in a basilica across town. Francis, born Jorge Mario Bergoglio in Argentina in 1936, was known for [a sharp political edge](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMZ0jszYsFC6uocu1VyIHL2HvjI1sJxH39L_4X-GvP2lGM3_u891x4Pj87XaydU1zpE8JVCvluebXfrjo_1OgWP6ddaMjHVTWGRR0UhkJOHvH4ZxN4-1KBKQbsi2aDs2gUTebVaZbRsTLBo3gsXXYDY8BvXssw4gN2ytNGcBWqb5tb70ejQL0CvSI46CFUeS5pnz7mzjWjdZwpjfl25L2Jtit1qMI_UvAJGCqG20cwmUCpiMFXk4BE8dKObrKKbogYOqgx1GBDPwm-Tq8q1TkNU6u2cWFi1xfkbILMqedBExNtv74cAhcehRGPXfH3y1N_dFtbwtfAQAA__8QIIGp) and he maintained a close relationship with many political leaders throughout his 12 years as the head of the Catholic Church. The College of Cardinals [will convene](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFytCAURp8GO53rBUUKir-x279N6SBeV7IIDpB1zNNnzCukP_N9c87HY3oY5114_jc76bLGKdCZPZVCaSrpaz9MWL7JU8ivq2x0xIPyOiFgV4OoUU6Lcf6aRLXolQiJV6RbKTopBi55telhnu1sYJA9rAYWO6-ghJDAjYKu46py-l4DgbIF6Nu26bkSgHIB5EqqgTMBtLgSU_MZXSgbrf6Kb0qNjXvl9VbKkRn_x3BkOJ7n2YTZBjqvmF43wnC8nRiONgbrzZvq26LO5MkWF0N9pGgp30SPXA2tYjhWSS_H6bx3uZdMwHM3zv8-lj9lemv8CQAA__9V9nu5) in Rome to elect Francis' successor, a process not expected to start before May 6 to allow cardinals time to arrive and prepare.
## Iran Blast Appears Unrelated to Nuclear Talks
A suspected chemical explosion and fire [rocked a port](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFutDAQBOCnMd0hs7uwULj4G7r725TIh5fDicHIOEfI00fkFdKNNNInzbzdh7v1wa_P_3YRk6c4rHLsQXKWNOT0uWx2dd8SZN0_zjzLFjfZpwE01DdNN-DBWR_OgQpnJhEQLMRUTDVTi4zFbGB0xBOxrbEaWZrWMRG2XGPn8NFw4c2laQKutG6qqmywIw3sNGDHXYuKtDifYyrfo1_zLFM440tSOcalCGbOedsV_lPQK-iP4ygfj_HqFPTXGAW9TdmPQa44fkFdnefrSBiLZNx2-BD83rAi_VysD79q_tMVLwM_AQAA___MLXGN) in southern Iran on Saturday, killing at least 14 people and injuring more than 750. One analyst speculated the blast was caused by the mishandling of a shipment of solid fuel intended for use in Iran's missile program. The blast occurred as [Iran and U.S. officials met Saturday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb_G3ogeD2zsgaFLtnTtaBF4xDQYLCCJ0q-v3F_oeHWle3XO12W5mBBDun2ajXTzeUn0qpFao7K08th2k9wPRUr1_m4r7Xmn6hcEHBhIhmpxJsT3InunPRGS6ElzJQclJ6FEv-rRTjgjDe7qgOw0TMI6klc7gcWrQ-iDPtZAouIAI-enUcwSUDlAMat5Ep0EcqHlcvrOIbWVfHznJ5WTzVsf9draXjvx0eG5w7PZD4CjOkJpwUbq8ByKSexRWXrYSKawZuK9sryZxDySJOvlbEe0nBtACXwQTvkZwIHri3b7K8QY6qg6CbfNhPj33f4l7KnxNwAA___rcn4H) in Oman for the third round of negotiations over Tehran’s advancing nuclear program. There was no indication of a link between the two events. The talks represent [a milestone in the fraught relations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOkf22rC4cHFNulx7JTKwDntnjGVMotzT_-J_hb8czWg08_15jA_PkdPzt9_I1bCPid5HpFqpjLWcW_Zp-U-R0vHvU1fKe6YjjCChE9IIwHHxHD-jaRcXiIB0S06h6dAMGnW7uklTjz0QTkqHBQaYg_UajCY0RkPfsrvapAFUUvZK3XptjQRcJGiLdtCNkbRw3cvt786prhTiZ39Ruc371ka31pqPRv9q4N7A3efrwGVdolSeIzVw5-KTOA9ReaPIiUQ650i-iFz2Z_GbOItPfG6i0npFlRr8hBaMxaHr7NDhPNPUeW0DKhW6trglvzlGPnpsjHxunuP3oPojii8HXwEAAP__EcKFHw) between the two nations over Iran’s program, now enriching uranium close to weapons-grade levels. Saturday’s discussions were the first at the expert level, and they focused on details that could make or break an accord.

clean_body: President Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky ahead of Pope Francis' funeral on Saturday, their first face-to-face discussion since an Oval Office spat in February. | | | | | | Sunday, April 27, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1981, as an accessory to a Xerox Star computer that cost $16,500. While the Xerox Star was a commercial flop, the mouse lived on. You've probably heard of birth-month gemstones, but did you know that each month has a representative bird? to learn which feathered friend matches up with your birthday. Today’s sponsor is . As a Christian, are you feeling overwhelmed by headlines? Stay informed with the news while remaining focused on Christ with . | Trump Meets with Zelensky President Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky ahead of Pope Francis' funeral on Saturday, their first face-to-face discussion since an Oval Office spat in February. White House Communications Director Steven Cheung called the visit and said details would be released later. Zelensky also spoke positively of the meeting, saying in , “Good meeting. We discussed a lot one on one. Hoping for results on everything we covered. Protecting lives of our people. Full and unconditional ceasefire." The visit came as the U.S. continues its efforts to broker a peace deal between Russia and Ukraine. of Trump and Zelensky huddling in St. Peter’s Basilica for their roughly 15-minute talk went viral. Pope Francis Laid to Rest World leaders and rank-and-file Catholic faithful at his funeral on Saturday, reflecting on his concern for people on the peripheries and his wish to be remembered as a simple pastor. Presidents and princes attended the Mass in St. Peter’s Square in Vatican City, while prisoners and migrants welcomed Francis’ coffin at his final resting place in a basilica across town. Francis, born Jorge Mario Bergoglio in Argentina in 1936, was known for and he maintained a close relationship with many political leaders throughout his 12 years as the head of the Catholic Church. The College of Cardinals in Rome to elect Francis' successor, a process not expected to start before May 6 to allow cardinals time to arrive and prepare. Iran Blast Appears Unrelated to Nuclear Talks A suspected chemical explosion and fire in southern Iran on Saturday, killing at least 14 people and injuring more than 750. One analyst speculated the blast was caused by the mishandling of a shipment of solid fuel intended for use in Iran's missile program. The blast occurred as in Oman for the third round of negotiations over Tehran’s advancing nuclear program. There was no indication of a link between the two events. The talks represent between the two nations over Iran’s program, now enriching uranium close to weapons-grade levels. Saturday’s discussions were the first at the expert level, and they focused on details that could make or break an accord. name: History Facts
subject: The Ancient Wonder that probably didn't exist
body:
According to the 2,000-year-old writings of Greek historians such as Strabo and Diodorus Siculus, the ancient city of Babylon (in modern-day Iraq) boasted tiered terraces of exotic plants of all types that towered several stories above onlookers from the ground.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69og1fs7816go1enshziq2irrpn7vre4iy028ta4rltfxlnqg0wi690vn1mmbbs4meqfmkn4groglilnw4lgjvydpjlz4lw375kn2hynclshki9jjs63nce7emb53ucrvwt64qufet4o1dhjn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [One of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World might not have existed.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| A ccording to the 2,000-year-old writings of Greek historians such as Strabo and Diodorus Siculus, the ancient city of Babylon (in modern-day Iraq) boasted tiered terraces of exotic plants of all types that towered several stories above onlookers from the ground. Said to have been [created](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in the sixth century BCE by King Nebuchadnezzar II for one of his wives, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon were considered an awe-inspiring sight and a triumph of engineering, and as such have been accorded a spot among the celebrated [Seven Wonders of the Ancient World](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
---
However, there are a couple of [glaring problems](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) with that story. One is that there is no conclusive evidence among the ruins of Babylon that such a garden ever existed, nor the irrigation system needed to maintain it amid the desert landscape. Also, the breathtaking accounts of the foliage were all composed well after the fall of Babylon in 539 BCE; there are no contemporary descriptions of the Hanging Gardens, even though other achievements of Nebuchadnezzar's reign were recorded at the time. As such, one popular argument holds that the legendary Hanging Gardens were merely a product of the overactive collective imagination of ancient thinkers.
There is a [plausible alternative](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to that theory: An extensive tiered system of vegetation did exist, but was built a century earlier by the Assyrian King Sennacherib in the city of Nineveh, some 300 miles to the north. Unlike in Babylon, there is evidence of an aqueduct system through the mountainous terrain around Nineveh that delivered water to the site, while surviving relief panels from the city's royal palace feature displays of a lavish garden. As to how the renowned Greek academics could have gotten the locale wrong, they simply may have conflated the two older kingdoms from a similar region with overlapping cultures. It's possible that yet-to-be uncovered evidence will provide more conclusive proof of Nebuchadnezzar's green thumb, but in the meantime, it may be more accurate to refer to this ancient wonder as the Hanging Gardens of Nineveh.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## Historians didn't agree on the list of the ancient wonders.
Today, it’s well accepted which historic marvels are listed among the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World: the Great Pyramid of Giza, the Statue of Zeus at Olympia, the Temple of Artemis, the Mausoleum at Halicarnassus, the Colossus of Rhodes, the Lighthouse of Alexandria, and the Hanging Gardens of Babylon. But the ancient historians who [initially inspired](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) this who’s who of monuments were not in unanimous agreement as to which ones belonged. The Greek poet Antipater of Sidon was among those who celebrated the walls of Babylon, while the Roman poet Martial championed the inclusion of the Roman Colosseum. The spread of Christianity influenced later writers who waded into the debate, with the sixth-century Gallo-Roman bishop Gregory of Tours naming Noah's Ark and Solomon's Temple among his seven choices. According to the [authors](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svdgwg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of _The Seven Wonders of the Ancient World_ , it took another millennium before the various preferences crystallized into one cohesive group, with the great minds of the Renaissance helping to permanently establish the select seven for successive generations to marvel over.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1950, the [Barker Texas History Center](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAQQOHT4M4WngC2C4pt3GXbLS0M44BCmAhm4-T2q80V_gt8T3p_rtvVpZzK7bd7oOX3QVvBs2Vkxrpl8i4_ibM7W_ORKL_or49YN5Cge6l6mLbgUv5sqgt2l2EZO7TjpPSkR2NUFy0qAD8a7-RsHEKYF1zMZdcH6sOHWXbJ_sekgmkcpdTLsCg0U4BL0OpQs3FCSQyJqQ4ckfHt2pE_9MI6eHp02UbmZxOXXwJWAet5ngO36KjkVHCgehOwRlfCTnQXsGLhmrAJWHdX71j7r9jH1Jjqp_dYGGtXbXieKefUzCSUvD1cyt8c_2zSy8K_AAAA__9tIn5o) opened on the campus of the University of Texas at Austin. Now known as the Eugene C. Barker Texas History Collection, it houses more than 130,000 books and periodicals, 750,000 photographs, 30,000 recordings, and thousands of personal papers and official records. When's the last time you played Skee-Ball in an arcade? Check out our _Around Texas_ story on a restaurant bringing the retro game and more back. Today’s sponsor is [Next Thing Technologies](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuu1DAQhp_G6TZybMcmRYojllCgs-JUIJpoEk82Bl8ie_aSt0dBIOgpphl9-jTz_19ex1dw3sXrBQL29FzSGPFRPBJhHn2awW-JPDxKmdeU_D3d5hXzKLhoT1ydhBktOL-PqrL9xG3XVNg3RrWmbbRW1dpPyloLUneTXsDYTqMS0kpl-CRnbU3l-kPGlTBNw3nb1Z1CbayQtlWLeqeBKY7WUco1rUj4hLL4Pd0x13MKle9Xoq0w-cLEwMQQieqIT6LVxWtNOK9MDAsVJgb5_kP6OmH78fO3Tyfx_SIv-9vbSwueyeFGYSzplmdk8owBnD8tfj8mHKeJlgl9MAGtu4U_zO_lDGEDd41Mnv9JL4OLAX5gHmHLf9kUCSMxeSbIblmir3Jvt4fz3hVtmOLXw_zrN_q_Ru69-BkAAP__QdSjaw)—giving everyday Americans a rare shot to invest in the only U.S. sodium-ion battery company positioned to win from tariffs.

## Austin's Pot Exemption Snuffed
A state appeals court [struck down](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2unTAUhFdjOiNj_EfhIg3dS5sSHezDxYnByDZwb1YfkS28cvRJo5nv19f0BSGG_fUTNrT1vaRpx7tErBXzFJODeKQa4S7FrSnFK51uxTxxxiVlgnI9eQjxM4nG25n5oWvQdlpILTulRLNa3ptFGtBmYIsGpRkaKRRD6I2fDQxNsE8ZE1x3HWNyaAeBSnveeykWYRQQwdCHmnJbV6z4hrLET7owty5tTbRrrUch_Q_CR8LH-77bP9eJDyR8hFyDi0j4-PwifHQ5bE-Es9Sw0w1y-H3CDtTjg8IOMfyFGtJOM16YC3oKx4EQC3XpzJXwkauBMin6RWtJcQZGhVQzNbp3FBYjFM4dKK2bbP1xhxhDUZoI9togxP-r6_dcX5b_CwAA__8aBpL7) the city of Austin’s attempt to decriminalize possession of small amounts of marijuana. The order [follows a ruling last week](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOwyAURL_G7oh4EwqKbdxl2y2tG3OJyWJjAc7j71fOL2w5Gulo5vxcxgvEFNfbNyzo2ivkccVnTdgaljHlCdKWW4JnrdOcc3rkfZqxjJxyRagk3IweYnqPsvfuSr1lPTpmpDKKaS372Vl21WCCAsmCUAYCo1afvTQwWeBW9NEdMCq5YYxSZU9WojaeC69kkGcNnaToY8vl1GZs-IIa0js_sJymvPTJza1ttRNfHR86PsB2HDiqjg97JUfq-PCLK9ng1fJKPggCe21xJXdYSc0xYCELlHjfYQWi6VkFLwJYhmYKASYQHEyQylsrhOiL89szphSrNp2ktwVi-qxp_3P4cPwvAAD__5H-hkY) in which the same court struck down the city of San Marcos’ ordinance to decriminalize marijuana. “ _Consistent with the City of San Marcos, we conclude that the (Austin) ordinance in this case is also preempted by state law,_ ” Judge Scott Field said. In Austin, voters in 2022 approved an ordinance that bans police from ticketing or arresting people carrying a small amount of marijuana.
## School Voucher Bill Advances
A school voucher bill allowing up to 90,000 K-12 students to use public funds to pay for private education passed the state Senate and [now heads to Gov. Greg Abbott](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOozAQxvGnMZ2RbQYbChfX0OWa6HQlGmAI1g4xMl5I3n6V7L7B1iP9Nb_v_6W_YOBwv_3FlXx-zLG_07kz5Uyp5zgibzEznvs-LjHyET_HhVJvlKmlAmlcP2HgZw_F5Ac1tbogrx3UrtbWQrH4Zh4arUkN1lE1g7HkBkRsrZlBjY0qgn_FFBintVJ1W7ZA1k2mmmqYobEoQNEUckxlXijTA_eZn_GgVI5xLdgvOW-7qP4I0wnT4TC-BOUtvs7CdP-uwnRnSHTNMT2F6d4JyXiu-EFpl7htKR4k9SC3FA7MJL-x8kcrN8a71EZr0FC5IvlpOwNz2K0ToG4rBn7_kn-34OHNVwAAAP__I2yGpA), who is expected to approve. The measure, geared toward low-income families and children with disabilities, would provide up to $10,000 per year per student for use on tuition and other school-related costs. Students with disabilities could receive as much as $30,000. [You can read the bill’s text here.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Dtu6zAQheHVUJ0NasSHVbC4t1DnNAmQdMSIHFsExqYhTvzYfaBsIfUBvgP8n8d4xMLlen7DCwV5nmq80qMxidAauSbkWxXGR2tpqZXv9TsttEbQYHfa7MDHjIVf0XQ5zDqPfUeh98Z62ztnuiUgpnEAO8yDPjg_JzsazB4dgZ2zmw9dCRumDfi-19qO-9GQ8xmGbM3JHBwqoykXqeteFhJ6Yjvxq95p3ad66TgsIremhn8KJgUT07m0hNdtVDB9fCmYhJ6iYHr_Dwqm7a1bQ749CnNpziujzxcs_MvJ3yLcA_wEAAD__-Fsb00) The program [would start](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SozAMgJ8GOjP-A4fCxTV0ufZKRtgCPOfgjK1A8vY7sPsGW6n5Po0-_buPdwgxbMtfeKCl95zGDY8SkQjzGJOD-EwU4SjFrSnFPb3cinmUXLaMaybN6CHEz6hrbyfue1GjFUa3phVdp-vVTkq6VjvNZ48oQQpQDoybQHI1z_pWB3su41oaIThv-6bX2BkvlW_1rG8dVJqjD5RyQysSvqHM8ZN2zI1LjzralehZKvWnkkMlh-M4mgLulTNudBKVHM6kSg6XywpuQMiWjLixGJaVCvuOYz91F-PDtjDBphBjSNs1GSW2pP1UFwbTlIgK81j-M2WUEjfV19n653EqpTOV5ssDQrzOpN89d7fyKwAA__9YsZH3) in the 2026-2027 school year, and total state funding would be capped at $1 billion for the first two years of its existence. The bill provides for the program funding to expand up to $4.5 billion annually by 2030. Abbott supports the measure and is expected to sign the bill soon.
## Texas Makes Big Impact on NFL Draft
The state's college football programs and many of its former prep football stars [made a big impression](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQBp8GOiPbGBMKF39Dl7-9Ehm8xI42mLM3EN7-RO6K669ZjbTSaPR9XIerDRiW23_7AEOvOQ4L7BmBCNKAcbK4RkK75zz5GHGLz8lDGiSXDeOKyXZwNuAxqNKZkbtOlGBEq5q2EVqr0hvdCHCjqi-SKyEs78Qk-aSVlo2oZ-BlMKeMK9kKwXnTVZ0C3TpZu0bN6qJtoTi4QDFV5IHgZfOMR9wgVVN8lGg80ZqL-l8h-0L2-75XOZyvQvY-3Dz7Li9kv1gKcbEnvvuXGZlLdiaGYQP2XJ0lYJnOOx4_8EvBMsuAMJ2WzLi45897l-bx2Mpk3LoHxJB1Wyh-e9iA7zz626ibkV8BAAD__1I8jU4) with teams in this year's NFL Draft that ended Sunday.

More than 20 former Texas high school players who went on to excel in college were selected in the draft's first four rounds, by far the most of any state. Florida, California, and Georgia followed.

The state's college programs also shared the spotlight, with TCU wide receiver Jack Bech one of the heartwarming stories. His brother Tiger was killed in the New Year's terrorist attack in New Orleans, and [the Bech family's reaction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQQOGnwV0iGAa4FBS3cbVJu6U1MZMYiYTITP7efuV9hW1P8RXn-zAdqNRyuxzpykne5zbd-NUri_A61TZTvTep9Op9Xlqrz_aYF14n0OB2GncQpkylfiYccjrpHM3AyQR0wRnvcVi2SAwRCefsgiUDDJGsPlkPPrs4lLRhGiEYo7WL-4jsQwabHZ7xnyeFmnORtu5lYeE39XP9tCev-7ldh5oWkXtX9r-CUcH43qqC8Th-KRi7kDy6gtFE46J1YAHR-AjO6WFN-f4qtZbug0J9uVKpv6b87cQzwU8AAAD__xgjbwM) when Jack was drafted was intense. There was also [no containing the excitement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVsiuL5AGBi6eEs7dOhoEXOJkUiI4Obr7Sv3FbodneE3_H-O8zHkkq_nz3Ahz69U5ys9eyFmanOpSyi3yiU8e1_WWsuj3peV2gwS9E7iDuwcQy7vGYfoTzI6NZBXFrXVyhgcVu-SCRaXE4RTxICwKGMPOinSYFBaN2S_YRLBKiWldnuHZGyEMWpMeDBBoKSYubY9r8T0Cj2Vd31Q2y_1MhS_Mt-6GD8ETAKm1_YKmL7u7Tuho9YFTJ0D37ehnNLugFaaURk3KlB2aD7enrmU3I0VKM-XkMsfzf8L8vDwGwAA__9MYXGy) of University of Texas defensive tackle Alfred Collins, among the first players taken in Friday's second round.

## Does your neck hurt from all that stock market whiplash?
On April 9th, markets threw a **massive party** after Trump paused some of the scariest tariff hikes. But on April 10th, markets plunged. Dow down nearly 1,000 points. Nasdaq tumbling. Why? The China trade fight didn’t pause—it escalated. Badly. This kind of shockwave forces a hard truth: Relying on fragile global supply chains is a losing game. America must build critical tech here. Especially batteries. This is exactly why [Next Thing Technologies ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuu1DAQhp_G6TZybMcmRYojllCgs-JUIJpoEk82Bl8ie_aSt0dBIOgpphl9-jTz_19ex1dw3sXrBQL29FzSGPFRPBJhHn2awW-JPDxKmdeU_D3d5hXzKLhoT1ydhBktOL-PqrL9xG3XVNg3RrWmbbRW1dpPyloLUneTXsDYTqMS0kpl-CRnbU3l-kPGlTBNw3nb1Z1CbayQtlWLeqeBKY7WUco1rUj4hLL4Pd0x13MKle9Xoq0w-cLEwMQQieqIT6LVxWtNOK9MDAsVJgb5_kP6OmH78fO3Tyfx_SIv-9vbSwueyeFGYSzplmdk8owBnD8tfj8mHKeJlgl9MAGtu4U_zO_lDGEDd41Mnv9JL4OLAX5gHmHLf9kUCSMxeSbIblmir3Jvt4fz3hVtmOLXw_zrN_q_Ru69-BkAAP__QdSjaw)exists. We’ve focused on non-lithium batteries since 2019. Our chemistry of choice after 4+ years of research? _Sodium—_ abundant in the U.S., enough to last hundreds of thousands of years. So, when tariffs make lithium batteries impossibly expensive, our domestic solution becomes the obvious choice. [Affordable. Secure. clean_body: A state appeals court the city of Austin's attempt to decriminalize possession of small amounts of marijuana. | | | | | | Sunday, April 27, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1950, the opened on the campus of the University of Texas at Austin. Now known as the Eugene C. Barker Texas History Collection, it houses more than 130,000 books and periodicals, 750,000 photographs, 30,000 recordings, and thousands of personal papers and official records. When's the last time you played Skee-Ball in an arcade? Check out our Around Texas story on a restaurant bringing the retro game and more back. Today’s sponsor is —giving everyday Americans a rare shot to invest in the only U.S. sodium-ion battery company positioned to win from tariffs. Abilene 🌩️ 87/66° | Amarillo ⛈️ 82/59° | Austin ☁️ 89/69° | Brownsville ⛅ 88/75° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 85/74° | DFW 🌥️ 85/67° | El Paso 🌥️ 94/60° | Houston ⛅ 86/70° | Laredo 🌥️ 95/71° | Lubbock 🌥️ 87/65° | Midland 🌩️ 92/66° | San Antonio ⛅ 89/70° | Tyler 🌤️ 86/65° | Waco 🌥️ 86/66° | Austin's Pot Exemption Snuffed A state appeals court the city of Austin’s attempt to decriminalize possession of small amounts of marijuana. The order in which the same court struck down the city of San Marcos’ ordinance to decriminalize marijuana. “ Consistent with the City of San Marcos, we conclude that the (Austin) ordinance in this case is also preempted by state law, ” Judge Scott Field said. In Austin, voters in 2022 approved an ordinance that bans police from ticketing or arresting people carrying a small amount of marijuana. School Voucher Bill Advances A school voucher bill allowing up to 90,000 K-12 students to use public funds to pay for private education passed the state Senate and , who is expected to approve. The measure, geared toward low-income families and children with disabilities, would provide up to $10,000 per year per student for use on tuition and other school-related costs. Students with disabilities could receive as much as $30,000. The program in the 2026-2027 school year, and total state funding would be capped at $1 billion for the first two years of its existence. The bill provides for the program funding to expand up to $4.5 billion annually by 2030. Abbott supports the measure and is expected to sign the bill soon. Texas Makes Big Impact on NFL Draft The state's college football programs and many of its former prep football stars with teams in this year's NFL Draft that ended Sunday. More than 20 former Texas high school players who went on to excel in college were selected in the draft's first four rounds, by far the most of any state. Florida, California, and Georgia followed. The state's college programs also shared the spotlight, with TCU wide receiver Jack Bech one of the heartwarming stories. His brother Tiger was killed in the New Year's terrorist attack in New Orleans, and when Jack was drafted was intense. There was also of University of Texas defensive tackle Alfred Collins, among the first players taken in Friday's second round. The Flyover is just like The Texas Flyover, except it covers news from all fifty states. ! | Flying together with our sponsor Does your neck hurt from all that stock market whiplash? On April 9th, markets threw a massive party after Trump paused some of the scariest tariff hikes. But on April 10th, markets plunged. Dow down nearly 1,000 points. Nasdaq tumbling. Why? The China trade fight didn’t pause—it escalated. Badly. This kind of shockwave forces a hard truth: Relying on fragile global supply chains is a losing game. America must build critical tech here. Especially batteries. This is exactly why . We’ve focused on non-lithium batteries since 2019. Our chemistry of choice after 4+ years of research? Sodium— abundant in the U.S., enough to last hundreds of thousands of years. So, when tariffs make lithium batteries impossibly expensive, our domestic solution becomes the obvious choice. This isn’t chance. It’s strategy meeting the perfect moment. And right now, you can invest in our campaign - the only U.S. sodium-ion battery open to public investors. | ➤Northern Texas: More than 5,900 customers in the Panhandle lost power Saturday morning following 100 mph winds. () ➤ Fort Worth: A charter bus carrying schoolchildren from Colorado collided with a rock hauler semi, hospitalizing 2 on Friday. () ➤ Tyler : A mother was arrested for reportedly giving alcohol-spiked Jell-O shots to fifth graders at a party. She said she thought they were alcohol-free.
