| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01d4d7e6-3a1e-499c-b3b4-d1a8722a4679/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Troy Downing
subject: I might have to pull the plug on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by August Pfluger for Congress
body:
I’ve been toiling over this email for a while.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.augustpfluger.-XsRbG4zcMuxruc3A)
---
Peter,

This is Troy Downing, a combat veteran and conservative Congressman for Montana’s Second District. Every day in Congress, I’m fighting for our state’s future. But I need your urgent help to ensure we don’t lose this battle. Right now, our conservative values are under attack. Liberals in Washington are pushing for policies that will hurt American families and undermine the progress we’ve worked so hard to accomplish. What’s worse is that they’re coming after President Trump and his allies, _**including me**_ , with vicious smear campaigns and slanderous lies perpetuated in the mainstream Fake News media. I’m proud to be endorsed by President Trump, and I’m working to advance the America First agenda in Congress: **lower taxes, less government interference, and American Energy dominance.** But this fight is far from over. The radical left is on track to break fundraising records in 2026, an election that’s critical to defending our great Nation. I’m committed to securing our values of faith, family, and freedom, but I can’t do it without your help, Peter. [**I’m up against a HUGE end-of-month deadline, and I’m short of my goal. But if you rush in whatever you can today, we’ll CRUSH our April campaign goals and save this race for the House Majority >>**](https://trk.emails.augustpfluger.-6MFVg)
---
[ **CHIP IN NOW >>** ](https://trk.emails.augustpfluger.)
---
The difference between victory and defeat in 2026 depends on the decisions we make today.I can’t do it without the support of Patriots like you. I’m counting on your response today.Thank you, Patriots.
---
---
Troy Downing
_**Combat Veteran in Congress**_
---
---

body:
This is the biggest election security bill in YEARS. Take the poll before midnight!

This is the biggest election security bill in YEARS. Take the poll before midnight!

| | | | [ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fNGQ0Znf92Ou8pAAhht1Zw~~/AARclBA~/8uOUSOKFsE2jbOntFYP-IH0YqiQJ9_zT3G2LiiodCM7IUxV0UxGlc5N_78w_--xRRwA3NZns2zuY3U9qlsTDaxHZD-xatHofJr6RBLb2qbyP5_fG5VbmkHd6oA3LudQJ1U0v3YRsE4jTzjJBUOyLmZ5oi_KxBMMNA9j8FgCL9WFCEDa9qHmBBCtNCbUxzQEcsL9wbPGigLVytLsuYph8au0pMF1X0zH56XwTNrAcQbw~)
---
| | Friend, The U.S. House of Representatives just passed the SAVE Act—a historic bill to require proof of citizenship to vote in federal elections. That’s a MASSIVE win for America. But the fight is FAR from over... The Radical Left is in full-blown PANIC MODE—and they’re already plotting to KILL this bill in the Senate. **That’s why the Republican Women’s Caucus is launching an emergency grassroots poll to show just how many patriots support the SAVE Act.**
---
| | [ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fNGQ0Znf92Ou8pAAhht1Zw~~/AARclBA~/8uOUSOKFsE2jbOntFYP-IH0YqiQJ9_zT3G2LiiodCM7IUxV0UxGlc5N_78w_--xRRwA3NZns2zuY3U9qlsTDaxHZD-xatHofJr6RBLb2qbyP5_fG5VbmkHd6oA3LudQJ1U0v3YRsE4jTzjJBUOyLmZ5oi_KxBMMNA9j8FgCL9WFCEDa9qHmBBCtNCbUxzQEcsL9wbPGigLVytLsuYph8au0pMF1X0zH56XwTNrAcQbw~)
---
| | **Friend, do YOU support the SAVE Act?**
---
| | | [ TAKE THE OFFICIAL POLL NOW >> ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fNGQ0Znf92Ou8pAAhht1Zw~~/AARclBA~/8uOUSOKFsE2jbOntFYP-IH0YqiQJ9_zT3G2LiiodCM7IUxV0UxGlc5N_78w_--xRRwA3NZns2zuY3U9qlsTDaxHZD-xatHofJr6RBLb2qbyP5_fG5VbmkHd6oA3LudQJ1U0v3YRsE4jTzjJBUOyLmZ5oi_KxBMMNA9j8FgCL9WFCEDa9qHmBBCtNCbUxzQEcsL9wbPGigLVytLsuYph8au0pMF1X0zH56XwTNrAcQbw~)
---
| | Let’s be very clear: Democrats want open borders AND open ballots. They want non-citizens voting, illegals flooding our country, and NO accountability at the ballot box. They know if we lose secure elections, we lose America. [_**_But we’re fighting back. >>_**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fNGQ0Znf92Ou8pAAhht1Zw~~/AARclBA~/8uOUSOKFsE2jbOntFYP-IH0YqiQJ9_zT3G2LiiodCM7IUxV0UxGlc5N_78w_--xRRwA3NZns2zuY3U9qlsTDaxHZD-xatHofJr6RBLb2qbyP5_fG5VbmkHd6oA3LudQJ1U0v3YRsE4jTzjJBUOyLmZ5oi_KxBMMNA9j8FgCL9WFCEDa9qHmBBCtNCbUxzQEcsL9wbPGigLVytLsuYph8au0pMF1X0zH56XwTNrAcQbw~) And election security is a WOMEN’S issue—because when our elections aren’t safe, our families, our freedoms, and our future are at risk. The SAVE Act has cleared the House. Now the pressure is on the Senate. Let’s make it loud and clear: **Only AMERICANS should vote in American elections.** Take the official GOP poll before MIDNIGHT and stand with the Republican Women’s Caucus:

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Surprising twist in PA parents' rights
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=304d455917&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Supreme Court case provides yet another reason for school choice](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c16fbf4ec4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Arguing this week before the US Supreme Court, the attorney for the Montgomery County (Maryland) School Board said the district had to take away parental choice: too many students want to opt out of their lessons. Imagine: parents didn’t want their children to be compelled to read or have to listen to a teacher read to them sexually explicit and gender-searching books. The books at issue include “Pride Puppy,” “Jacob’s Room to Choose” and “Born Ready.” This Supreme Court case, Mahmoud v. Taylor, is perhaps the most important parents’ rights case in years. At the same time, perhaps unintentionally, it’s the most important new argument of school choice since the Supreme Court upheld the constitutionality of school choice (tuition vouchers) in Zelma v. Simmons-Harris in 2002. **Why It Matters.** Tragically, as has been the case for over a decade, many public schools — especially in the suburbs — have been shifting the focus off of academic excellence and onto social and political causes. And, all too often, they are leading the culture wars, especially when it comes to race, sex, and now gender discussions. To the surprise of most of us, “educators” and school boards decided that what was wrong with America wasn’t[ falling test scores](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=32666764b5&e=b7b3eddce2) but that not enough six-year-olds had considered their gender. And as we have learned across suburban Philadelphia, many districts have policies that willfully and purposefully[ withhold information from parents](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=08fa049ea7&e=b7b3eddce2) about issues concerning their child’s sexual behavior, gender confusion, and mental health. The arrogance, the disrespect for parents, and the contempt for common sense is almost immeasurable in too many districts

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6e92445cb0&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=43e92988d2&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Public misbehavior shouldn’t be dismissed as ‘a Philly thing’](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5ebc089212&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Thom Nickels_
At the height of the Covid pandemic in 2020, a Lithuanian artist had an idea about how to bridge the loneliness created by forced government lockdowns. Benediktas Gylys created an interactive live stream work of art, a futuristic looking round shaped object that looks as though it had fallen to earth from a flying disk.

The assumption at that time was that the people smiling and waving in front of the lens would abide by PG-13 family standards. Reality hit, however, when the Portal in both cities began attracting people who acted out in bizarre fashions. Suddenly young people in New York and Dublin were stepping on the Portal, flashing body parts and doing drugs in front of the lens. The wholesome mission of bringing people together had turned into a joke.

Vandalism was soon to follow.

Philly thieves attacked the Portal and cut the copper cables connecting the metal to its power generator and then stuffed the stolen goods into a large recycling bin they then took to a local scrap dealer. In another incident, rocks were thrown at the lens and completely shattered it. City officials sprung into action and covered the Portal in a dour covering reminiscent of an autopsy sheet.

**Why It Matters**. Billy Penn.com, an arm of WHYY, took the vandalism lightly with the headline: “Philly breaking the Portal is the least surprising story of 2025.” (The implication suggested that Philadelphians destroy everything so why would anyone be surprised.) The Philadelphia Inquirer muted its outrage: “The Philadelphia Portal is getting a facelift after vandalism left it out of commission since early February.”

When you think about it, since 2020 Philadelphia has been about “facelifting” the damage created by hooligan thugs, many of them with a leftist political agenda.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d55d15c38f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Kyle Sammin: Trump isn’t an outlier — he’s the culmination of a trend](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6bc294fcc5&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Mark Umansky: All voters deserve a voice in our primaries](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4d6fc2b5d0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Regardless of the reason, UPMC’s policy change is good for kids](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=77d935756d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: The Treasury Department’s report on fentanyl-related threat patterns](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3b01b50fbe&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Nathan Benefield: Bring domestic steel manufacturing into America’s Golden Age](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d0d124b92d&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **4\. New Podcast**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2070553c6f&e=b7b3eddce2 "Dugan challenges Krasner in Philly Dem's D.A. primary | Voices of Reason – feat. Judge Pat Dugan")
---
| This interview dives deep into the Democratic primary for District Attorney featuring candidate Judge Pat Dugan.
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
Everyone who voted for Donald Trump knew he would bring change. Everyone also knew he favored raising tariffs. But the speed and method of doing so has left a lot of Americans bewildered and the economy scrambled. The reason, Peter Coy wrote this week for _The Free Press_ , is that everything about trade has [suddenly become very uncertain](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ecaab2cbcc&e=b7b3eddce2). “Right now, everybody believes that the world will be different in a week or a month or a year than what it looks like right now,” one CEO told Coy. Maybe it will settle down soon — it is still very early in Trump’s term — but until things become more settled, we should look for the big money to stay on the sidelines and the economy to suffer.

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Guy Ciarrocchi Arguing this week before the US Supreme Court, the attorney for the Montgomery County (Maryland) School Board said the district had to take away parental choice: too many students want to opt out of their lessons. Imagine: parents didn’t want their children to be compelled to read or have to listen to a teacher read to them sexually explicit and gender-searching books. The books at issue include “Pride Puppy,” “Jacob’s Room to Choose” and “Born Ready.” This Supreme Court case, Mahmoud v. Taylor, is perhaps the most important parents’ rights case in years. At the same time, perhaps unintentionally, it’s the most important new argument of school choice since the Supreme Court upheld the constitutionality of school choice (tuition vouchers) in Zelma v. Simmons-Harris in 2002. Why It Matters. Tragically, as has been the case for over a decade, many public schools — especially in the suburbs — have been shifting the focus off of academic excellence and onto social and political causes. And, all too often, they are leading the culture wars, especially when it comes to race, sex, and now gender discussions. To the surprise of most of us, “educators” and school boards decided that what was wrong with America wasn’t but that not enough six-year-olds had considered their gender. And as we have learned across suburban Philadelphia, many districts have policies that willfully and purposefully about issues concerning their child’s sexual behavior, gender confusion, and mental health. The arrogance, the disrespect for parents, and the contempt for common sense is almost immeasurable in too many districts | | | 2. By Thom Nickels At the height of the Covid pandemic in 2020, a Lithuanian artist had an idea about how to bridge the loneliness created by forced government lockdowns. Benediktas Gylys created an interactive live stream work of art, a futuristic looking round shaped object that looks as though it had fallen to earth from a flying disk. The assumption at that time was that the people smiling and waving in front of the lens would abide by PG-13 family standards. Reality hit, however, when the Portal in both cities began attracting people who acted out in bizarre fashions. Suddenly young people in New York and Dublin were stepping on the Portal, flashing body parts and doing drugs in front of the lens. The wholesome mission of bringing people together had turned into a joke. Vandalism was soon to follow. Philly thieves attacked the Portal and cut the copper cables connecting the metal to its power generator and then stuffed the stolen goods into a large recycling bin they then took to a local scrap dealer. In another incident, rocks were thrown at the lens and completely shattered it. City officials sprung into action and covered the Portal in a dour covering reminiscent of an autopsy sheet. Why It Matters. Billy Penn.com, an arm of WHYY, took the vandalism lightly with the headline: “Philly breaking the Portal is the least surprising story of 2025.” (The implication suggested that Philadelphians destroy everything so why would anyone be surprised.) The Philadelphia Inquirer muted its outrage: “The Philadelphia Portal is getting a facelift after vandalism left it out of commission since early February.” When you think about it, since 2020 Philadelphia has been about “facelifting” the damage created by hooligan thugs, many of them with a leftist political agenda. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | | 4\. New Podcast | "Dugan challenges Krasner in Philly Dem's D.A. primary | Voices of Reason – feat. Judge Pat Dugan" | This interview dives deep into the Democratic primary for District Attorney featuring candidate Judge Pat Dugan. | | 5\. What we're reading Everyone who voted for Donald Trump knew he would bring change. Everyone also knew he favored raising tariffs. But the speed and method of doing so has left a lot of Americans bewildered and the economy scrambled. The reason, Peter Coy wrote this week for The Free Press , is that everything about trade has . “Right now, everybody believes that the world will be different in a week or a month or a year than what it looks like right now,” one CEO told Coy. Maybe it will settle down soon — it is still very early in Trump’s term — but until things become more settled, we should look for the big money to stay on the sidelines and the economy to suffer. | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. ## The Meaning of Mystical Theology ~ The Imaginative Conservative
It is only in mystical contemplation that our weak human love is so purified that it enables this love to mix, mingle and merge with the love of the Holy Spirit. Then, suffused and surcharged with this love we will not only be able to enter into the mystical body of Christ but into Christ’s [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/B9AfH-ksQzQgwkZfRn-uFSM_YHBeEWpb1YQCELAPAGdA-GzQYXKhBoeEt3mINVjyv7jDrmZ8EU0P25zNELLq-ERsQhRh7bh0z0T7y1ySmHJVwIiUz4rt8nPLpqcOCSX0d2liYHhVvsNysEHSiZfvi5RcsSV-kabCCrFbSp3kngG0zlOqx2XDZp8KHOhWf-6cUVV63vS_f444XuopE8rwdjJGByrNgp4Chja9vhXyF5qFAaPa3Goi5ZakErHYFnxtTyzV6Gl5SXhAjLqzDkIgxHcCMK34TcQ-3cyyFyWdkKlFNbDcqouJGHt3uZbMTkWu2MRvZcTVhBlBDqNLYUvchVYleo4hEw/H-SgrjBKgSYFBqyXH-MRPgNr0hx9L-4Z/8)

| |
## My TCW week in review – Orphans of the State
MY WEEK began quite wonderfully in Southern Spain, where I had grabbed a break from TCW thanks to Margaret’s sterling ‘holding the fort’ for me. So, there I was on Easter Sunday with family and grandchildren for the culmination of Santa Semana – their Holy Week – and the last week of Lent. As we climbed the hill to [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/cU1zGu1zecuQSEWCSO9w_W1sR1M4OxocrG7WGsLqJz0O79p2HCKOAEYyAtgW4GY3Z6m2KDCg13tRmx8jxx2a9UmAXHKR6ZMFO7qLj_m55xFWHrz_XKWpnnpSeGphh-bsYFn3iCd6EOrbqFyWL1IqtJ_s1UjhvD2V2K0hFZ2hCJjbEwhuM2f0TenE4DIOfNCGvn2Yr0nfnvZxfEsK4xqzkz2KRTv_HteLEcS_Ia_cd_KRWUhYQl6KvYXgsbt9zo8gWIMFB0mif4qi5xN0Vd5N1iPSuIO91BCcUc3qYjZsgNr_iWsV__eGVMuN6OFflNLCi1jy/Wu4fphbKmOAV23nqxAi7xDmssDSMjP-v/8)
---
| |
## Francis, the Pope who alienated good Catholics
THE outpouring of grief following the death of Pope Francis was like a wall of noise, a practically uninterrupted blanket of praise, a seamless garment of tribute. Even his enemies fought to temper their public comments, undoubtedly conscious of the enduring Latin injunction de mortuis nil nisi bonum, that one must not speak ill of the [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/BSztbFKvZ7QeOAY5W5Cn1NVBi1Ba-gJ1d3lfxg1DAgtYzO6hbMf2WpHudq_U0QAfMqaykWXdWbkJKjGdSAwns18wxHCrb6gZgB7SL3XAR0MdxxGE1jSA_TNi_-3YkqLz-2hDVpmJvAOz6zWahtkeYl-uP7Xrm58BbOqlZRPF7u2PqcHDL8pBknNeiOXfZRHbWiN8B44ejP3FutteYbxZiTAK5-L02a8QHzN5nI8w_TQjpIslfsmUmSR-y1SwzoExXpIKq4LvgYJ6_45piFqWbgWEaA1xRt2aB_RL2eufCZgjbkv4dn2zE8o246CT0lqFVLSSYjIt/edbILRxFfOKG47GEeOyAyXrlxqdIKm-r/8)
---
| |
## Estonia’s authoritarian attack on religious liberty
CONFLICTS between church and state usually erupt when a church is concerned with the morality of legislation or actions of a government. However heated these conflicts can become, we rarely find the state posing an existential threat to the church. This is just what we find in Estonia at the moment. The Estonian Government has [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/tzzxry_KLy6ewNQCZlDAacgIQGVf-YQS5zdZ1bG6W1xLkrY2_a8g0VXOvVgujfUd_rvtbWdZMgHvmLo0Ki3O1cgiV3VT1KDANpI2K3XL-hyGr7PAYsr-rpJzJKcvWI8bM_rR5E7V_ugMb5-rvVoibG9hPDYAtkeMUByLAMJM-W4_Pefe3JNFUCxfsJS6-rAlit88B605Po76eGYUD2v0DlhwRPWQjwtp4ZZPQb3FUEVl3O78YWzQZmyDaDBzhUHhYkSGhXZnJnu1PdCaqaYHQpyMJ-FNT6nwPGgCrHKMwl_IZ_01felf9p3rZNARDt2HR-khW337rx4JR5Q/tpLz2B0JhgYxvk5rAv4GeHyqxLXTVqf-/8)
---
| |
## High Court rejects attempt to criminalise ‘gender critical’ speech
IN A striking defence of free speech, the High Court has reaffirmed the core democratic principle that the law protects not only polite or popular views, but also those others may find offensive, upsetting, or wrong. The ruling dismissed a legal challenge to Greater Manchester Police’s (GMP’s) decision not to prosecute gender critical blogger Stuart Campbell, [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/kYAc_c4bNgfgstWzywdiDqdXvvJRvOVi88AspzWkqfMgak2OtdmTucF4Bvbb2fubFdZKH37bKTplXsmEg_DEuaMvY6gUo4OKhzRNcIuL9Knr7m5WRssK_8n77pBugNkWRyiNzb_9hvFdZs7zTkE5cQ5iiD2jrLUUDHGV8sjCmYd2b9yqcaDdOw_yksqaxUq5Gh_kdAgiWKdSQ5qK48ByxRtiPEqDxpmzpaGH6WV3p60LOo7STHj7DY3urgyN3kQC06l4n-Wk1lJ5RBUKobrVjiU4nk-bg0Y9x1T78WEI9HFi3J80VBHCPkDwA0IszqkBBIm4jGwc6-INjCSSTeAdt-7hgHOGjCA9rg/98z9o6LwGK9G9FAjT8616f5gP_AjqEyY/8)

Even his enemies fought to temper their public comments, undoubtedly conscious of the enduring Latin injunction de mortuis nil nisi bonum, that one must not speak ill of the [...] | | Estonia’s authoritarian attack on religious liberty CONFLICTS between church and state usually erupt when a church is concerned with the morality of legislation or actions of a government. However heated these conflicts can become, we rarely find the state posing an existential threat to the church. This is just what we find in Estonia at the moment. What do you usually go for? Personally, I’m a caramel latte guy (and I’m going to need it today). There’s a lot going on right now, as I’m sure you’ve noticed. Project 2025 is unfortunately in full swing, so we’re moving non-stop to protect Pennsylvania from GOP extremism. **Governor Shapiro and I successfully sued Trump for his $2 billion federal funding freeze, but there’s still A LOT of work to be done. ** Pennsylvania families need public education protected in the face of a DoEd that’s consistently under attack. They need assurance that reproductive freedom and healthcare access are expanded, not gutted. They need to believe in economic mobility because they know that Pennsylvania means opportunity for the working class. **Coming from a working class family myself, I know the struggles first hand, and I’m not about to let anyone come between me and delivering a better future for my fellow Pennsylvanians. ** On top of it all, my team’s first end-of-month deadline of the quarter is coming up. There’s a lot going on right now, as I’m sure you’ve noticed. Project 2025 is unfortunately in full swing, so we’re moving non-stop to protect Pennsylvania from GOP extremism. Governor Shapiro and I successfully sued Trump for his $2 billion federal funding freeze, but there’s still A LOT of work to be done. Pennsylvania families need public education protected in the face of a DoEd that’s consistently under attack. They need assurance that reproductive freedom and healthcare access are expanded, not gutted. They need to believe in economic mobility because they know that Pennsylvania means opportunity for the working class. Coming from a working class family myself, I know the struggles first hand, and I’m not about to let anyone come between me and delivering a better future for my fellow Pennsylvanians. On top of it all, my team’s first end-of-month deadline of the quarter is coming up. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for all your help, Peter. name: Kamala Harris
subject: The DNC needs a HUGE number of donations today and before this deadline.
body:
Right now, you've got a whole lot of Republicans who are on the fence about what Trump is doing with regards to tax cuts for the rich
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=536%2E2563979%2EmW40qM)

Peter --
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution directly to the Democratic National Committee. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important for everyone who cares about the future of this country.
Here's the truth:
In just a few days, the DNC closes the books on a very important FEC fundraising deadline. When it ends, they are legally required to report what they've raised and how many donations they've received will eventually be public as well.
And here's why that matters:
Right now, you've got a whole lot of Republicans who are on the fence about what Trump is doing with regards to tax cuts for the rich, cutting services for the poor, and the tariffs that are wreaking havoc on our economy. And those issues are just the start.
And when these FEC reports are filed, Republican party leaders be looking at what the DNC raises and consider making some critical decisions about whether or not they'll be held accountable for supporting Trump and his agenda.
If the DNC can file a big report -- especially one with lots of donations - they'll see Americans are fired up and ready to fight with the Democrats. Republicans will have to consider the spending the party can do to defeat them.
So yes, the money is important. It will be used to organize and stop Trump's agenda while electing Democrats everywhere. But the report the DNC files is critical as well. That is why I am asking, humbly:
[**Please use this link to contribute $5 to the Democratic National Committee. Some give more than that amount, some give less. What matters most is that lots of people are giving what they can. All of it will be put to work holding Republicans accountable.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250427-1B&refcode2=536_2563979_mW40qM&akid=536%2E2563979%2EmW40qM)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

clean_body: Right now, you've got a whole lot of Republicans who are on the fence about what Trump is doing with regards to tax cuts for the rich Peter -- In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution directly to the Democratic National Committee. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important for everyone who cares about the future of this country. Here's the truth: In just a few days, the DNC closes the books on a very important FEC fundraising deadline. When it ends, they are legally required to report what they've raised and how many donations they've received will eventually be public as well. And here's why that matters: Right now, you've got a whole lot of Republicans who are on the fence about what Trump is doing with regards to tax cuts for the rich, cutting services for the poor, and the tariffs that are wreaking havoc on our economy. And those issues are just the start. And when these FEC reports are filed, Republican party leaders be looking at what the DNC raises and consider making some critical decisions about whether or not they'll be held accountable for supporting Trump and his agenda. If the DNC can file a big report -- especially one with lots of donations - they'll see Americans are fired up and ready to fight with the Democrats. Republicans will have to consider the spending the party can do to defeat them. So yes, the money is important. It will be used to organize and stop Trump's agenda while electing Democrats everywhere. But the report the DNC files is critical as well. That is why I am asking, humbly: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you for reading and donating to the DNC today. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Bringing alpha energy back to the Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)

As many of you know, I come from a world of war planning. I come from a world where you can't just play defense and expect to succeed.
After spending another few weeks back home in Michigan, I heard consistently that people feel like President Trump is doing a whole bunch of things that threaten our economy and our democracy – but that Democrats don't really have a coherent plan to stop him now, or to win elections in the future.
They tell me that they want leaders to do more than just sit back and wait for bad things to happen and hope people vote against it – they want leadership that meets this moment in history and gives people something to vote FOR.
Earlier this week, I gave a speech in Lansing, Michigan – the district where it all began for me – that lays out my best stab at a vision for where I believe the Democrats must go from here.
Watch some clips here: **[https://x.com/ElissaSlotkin/status/1915912216483709050](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3717?t=2&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)**
And here: **[https://x.com/ElissaSlotkin/status/1916149351694401885](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3720?t=3&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)**
It starts with what has always been the issues that remain my North Star: focusing on what keeps people in Michigan up at night: their pocketbooks and their kids.
But it also includes a plan to reclaim patriotism and bring some alpha energy back into the mix. The Republicans have owned the flag since Reagan was in office. And they no longer deserve it.
Trump is acting like a king, disobeying orders from the Supreme Court, threatening to run for a third term, and trying to dismantle our democracy. So in defending it, Democrats should do their part to reclaim the flag, and wave it high. Because after all — we love our country and we want it to be better.
Any serious plan to push back on Trump needs to clearly define what success looks like. No, we aren't going to stop Donald Trump and the Republican Party on everything. They control the White House, the House and the Senate.
But we can mobilize ourselves and our networks to ensure this Administration is following court orders and respecting the separation of powers.
Success looks like having free and fair elections in 2026, and winning back the House and Senate.
Success looks like rebuilding the brand of the party to appeal to enough voters to win elections and take power.
And, critically, it means bringing the middle of the country – not just the base of the Party – into the fight, to organize around pocketbook issues, like the successful ACA fight in Trump’s first term.
If we can do that, I think we'd call it a success.
My hope over the next few months is to share a vision for what I believe we can organize around, that can help stop the worst impulses of the Trump administration, protect our democracy for the future, and win back the House and Senate in 2026 and the White House in 2028.
I know it sounds like a daunting task, but I also know that our democracy, no matter how messy, is unparalleled and worth fighting for.
[**If you agree with that vision and want to help me continue to organize around it, please consider contribution today to help me get it done.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-apr25.XPV_iG&refcode=em250408-2&t=4&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-apr25.V-jbCQ&amount=3&refcode=em250408-2&t=23&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-apr25.dOVR06&refcode=em250408-2&t=24&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-apr25.XxdOQ-&refcode=em250408-2&t=25&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-apr25.HeJvrZ&refcode=em250408-2&t=26&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-apr25.StiIsm&refcode=em250408-2&t=27&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-apr25.V-jbCQ&refcode=em250408-2&t=28&akid=2274%2E135344%2EvPP-nd)**
---
****
Thank you for reading,
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Jon Ossoff via MarkKelly.com
subject: Let me lay this out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Jon Ossoff is running for Senate in Georgia and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**rush a split donation between Jon's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250427-1-90&t=1&akid=6052%2E6688874%2EbbpKGf)
---
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250427-1-90&refcode2=6052.6688874.bbpKGf&t=2&akid=6052%2E6688874%2EbbpKGf)
---
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
And the President said he’ll back Marjorie Taylor Greene to challenge me.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– [**please split $5 between my re-election campaign and Mark Kelly today.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250427-1-90&t=3&akid=6052%2E6688874%2EbbpKGf)
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250427-1-90&t=4&akid=6052%2E6688874%2EbbpKGf)**
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Mark Kelly today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250427-1-90&t=5&akid=6052%2E6688874%2EbbpKGf)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250427-1-90&t=6&akid=6052%2E6688874%2EbbpKGf)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=6052%2E6688874%2EbbpKGf).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: our shared values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/Speaker%20Emerita%20logo.png]

With the world mourns Pope Francis, we were reminded this week of the urgency to continue to tackle the climate crisis and to be good stewards of God’s Creation and to always honor the spark of divinity in the least of our brethren – championing the poor, the worker, the refugee and the immigrant.

As Democrats, we do so by staying true to and fighting for our values, For The People.

I wanted to send you a this note today to remind you of how important YOU – our VIPs, our Volunteers in Politics – are to our fight to build a better world and future For The Children – and I wanted to thank you for all you do in the pursuit of our urgent fight for our values and for our freedoms.

Democrats are unified in our fight to save our health care, to preserve the right to due process for everyone in our country, and to push back against cuts would rip away health care from millions and would keep countless Americans from accessing lifesaving care or receiving benefits that they have paid into – including Social Security, which is their own money.

We are united around fundamental rights and our shared values and we will Save Our Health Care and Take Back The House – because we have YOU.

You have the power to do this. Show your power and continue to speak out and to support our House Democrats and Democratic candidates who will FLIP the House and make Hakeem Jeffries our next Speaker of the House in the next election.

As long as we stay focused on what and who we are fighting for, and as long as we stay united in our cause, we will persevere and come out on the other side a more free and just nation that is worthy of the dreams and aspirations of our children and of the service and sacrifice of our men and women in uniform. Our House Democrats and I are counting on you.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

NANCY
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support?

## New Bills Target Red Tape in Employee Benefits
Two bills that would cut red tape and make it easier for employers to provide child care and elder care benefits and educational opportunities for their employees have advanced in the U.S. House of Representatives. The House Committee on Education and Workforce moved the two bills forward on April 9—the Empowering Employer Child and Elder [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/6BJkwAaAzbA48T0DK9xvm7brvLoRtnyIJclLcIak_QK6bzyDOMPPXH_AQyC2WClhrY9bFTGIt4oZeowwbPjOeMdOUvL4JkuUVL6iyKCG6SLL1MAOAlm6gLfS9iBUGlckpH2vTI0qd455KCNlgaf7bQOWG107JS6scNBV3Bexe3U2y9-m0TFCguy2IsoP8u1OfuOQLYi3GrU-3Bz8QDztn2QC3cAgG9dkeJTRYnOHKnZqW9_j69rehxRQW1PT6LG8jX7KSssGDhZ7wwrbK6pG_6gdUBUaBLmL4TbsOSat__VW_z8W_cWn-7eUxYzsErjLkwPc-mQEm3jjrg/HUoQdnw0iWpi4i0OGnRvfX6ctfVuvCZa/8)

## ‘Enough’s enough!’ Britain ‘way beyond’ point of return as thousands descend on Dover to protest illegal migration
Thousands have descended on Dover to “stop the boats” as activists declare “enough’s enough” over the migrant crisis. The event, called “Stop the boats now! 10,000+ bikers and friends illegal migrant protest ride to Dover” on Facebook, encouraged other activists to play their part in the coastal town. ## Royal Navy scrambles warship to stalk Russian frigate lurking in English Channel
The Royal Navy has scrambled a warship to shadow a Russian frigate spotted moving through the English Channel. HMS St Albans was deployed to escort the Admiral Golovko out of UK waters after it was seen heading east. The Plymouth-based warship kept close watch on Vladimir Putin’s frigate throughout the operation. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: $5 for VoteVets.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Because Trump and Elon Musk have declared war on America’s Veterans.
#
Peter:
We’re asking you to contribute $5 to VoteVets to kick off this Sunday.
That’s right. $5.
$5 because Trump and Elon Musk have declared war on America’s Veterans.
$5 because they’re firing VA staff, slashing critical Veteran’s support programs, and kicking thousands of Veterans out of their jobs.
$5 because Trump and Elon don’t care how many people they hurt as long as they get to give themselves a massive tax break.
And $5 for VoteVets because we are the organization best positioned to combat Trump, Musk, and the rest of extreme MAGA Republicans around the country.
**America trusts Veterans. Veterans cut through the noise. When Veterans speak, people listen. And Veterans are pissed off.** VoteVets is going to run the hardest hitting ads in politics over the next two years to take back the House and Senate and put real limits on Trump’s power.
We won’t stop until we win. And we will win. But we can’t do it alone.
[**So, please, chip in $5 or whatever you can. It will go a long way towards helping us build the programs we’ll need to defeat the GOP up and down the ballot, and we’ll put every cent to work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250427-1-120&t=1&akid=34375%2E3013755%2EYq0Yjt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.k-yVCf&amount=5&refcode=em250427-1-120&t=2&akid=34375%2E3013755%2EYq0Yjt)**
---
****

| **[CONTRIBUTE Another Amount](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.k-yVCf&refcode=em250427-1-120&t=3&akid=34375%2E3013755%2EYq0Yjt)**
---
****
Thanks so much!
The team at VoteVets

name: The Democrats
subject: How we'll put future donations to work...
body:
---
Derek, We're reaching out to ask if you can make a donation to the DNC today. But before we do, we want to tell you a little bit about what the donations from this grassroots team have already made possible and how we'll put future contributions to work. In this year alone, we:
* Invested heavily in the special elections in Wisconsin and Florida, which led to a huge win in Wisconsin and a dramatic overperformance in Florida.
* Sued Trump _twice_ , once for threatening free and fair elections and again for his illegal voter suppression executive order.
* Launched the People’s Cabinet, a project that brings together qualified policy experts, national and local leaders, and voices from our communities who will cut through the lies of the Trump administration.
* Announced a new War Room operation to take a more aggressive posture with rapid response.
* Held People’s Town Halls across the country, including in deep red districts — proving that Democrats will show up and listen to the American people, even if Republicans won’t.

And this is just the beginning. We are committed to continuing to organize and mobilize against Trump while electing Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. **That is the kind of work grassroots donations fund. And you might be surprised to hear this, but most of our grassroots donations come from emails just like this one. So now that we have explained where your donation has gone and where it is going, we're hoping you'll join thousands of Democrats making their first or next donation to the DNC. Use this link:** [Can Democrats running for office up and down the ballot count on you to contribute $3 to the Democratic National Committee today? We’ll put your contribution directly to work electing Democrats.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250427_3283_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3283_22930333_DejXIQ&akid=3283%2E22930333%2EDejXIQ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250427_3283_fr&refcode2=3283_22930333_DejXIQ&akid=3283%2E22930333%2EDejXIQ)**

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump and Musk’s latest target: America’s Vets?!?!??!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

body:
We can’t let these attacks continue
#
We have just one quick question for you today, Peter:
**Will you sign on now to protect ActBlue and end the attacks on working people who just want to engage in our elections?** The Trump administration’s executive memo against ActBlue last week was likely the first of many attacks on the power of people like you to participate in our democracy — and we can’t let them go unchecked.
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-email-20250427?t=1&akid=8900%2E614464%2Enm_uV-)**
We couldn’t do this without you, Peter.
Thanks for all your help,
Heartland Patriots HQ

__**When I saw that headline, I was devastated. **__

_But then I realized this can 't be true._ _**This was just a fake attack from the Mainstream Media to try and stall all the great work Elon is doing.**_

_**[That's why I wrote this letter to Elon, that I need you to sign.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/R7DztSLxQhFfoMl4Qloaml4JdSDMFjNRJ0vyU0iA6TI7e40_2Ct2FEx2bhbTNpUTdWRTqYaH-tDYfp-mhEM1--zbj8GwZItZOGXzSlDyng8QSXhpRKjSWZ4zu8-dFTvb-JsHEJyD7tLTyVE7oQ3a2c6XBqSyz1m6rgOGPCPTMD91JnaQAUzoW54ITKaDbJ6hD2citsR7lexFi7CWIPR125YAa6Qc1RKABs6m-cMlLpfVgvkzXK3Y7lGXxzKfLkl-gyWeRzlH_WfMz2cppRTzgIDrR3EsMwakeqZ1wS8GhE7Os35FiqudE7l24Va9FIeSwD7CjYUHD3g3ONK9HMMmYcJ03srJJVdD2oXqrCDtwtI9RptUOXFEzup16ZMksKnOQlEd5GJ39qGedtNDxcIpNiAt1Yp_V3cs0gQU95ZDrcD0A8dz5shhTUfSn-CIw_3np9qplaUl-DtnoeVG_BQfrvkEIoVCuKUu6TOSmBZ_MNE/VNSfUFw69Gh_7zMza_vwMlqKT5hDX-eb/8 "That’s why I wrote this letter to Elon, that I need you to sign.")**_

**We need him to know that real Americans aren 't falling for the left's dirty tricks. We stand with him.**

_**Read and Sign my letter to Elon below, so he knows you got his back Peter.**_

---
| Dear Mr. Elon Musk,

Thank you for helping to DRAIN THE SWAMP!

We're fed up with sending our hard-earned tax dollars to faraway lands for subversive and dumb causes.

**Transgender operas in Colombia? DEI in Serbia? Woke Sesame Street in Iraq? **

For years corrupt politicians have promised to shrink the size of government, but year after year the federal government grows more bloated and wasteful.

The American people are SICK and TIRED of empty promises from these feckless politicians!

_**And just weeks into this new administration, you and DOGE have cut the fat, exposed the fraud, and done away with BILLIONS in wasteful spending.**_

So please accept this huge THANK YOU from all of us, Mr. Musk!

_Thank you for fighting to make our government work for the people of this great country once again._

And thank you for standing strong against the very sick people who defame you, and want to hurt our country.

On this day, I hope you feel the support of the millions of patriotic Americans who back you in this fight to make our government work for the people once again.

**And I hope you know that our movement is more committed than ever to Making America Great Again. **

**Thank you, Elon, for everything,**

May God bless and keep you.

Sincerely,

Peter

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: we have YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Behind every dollar and every donation has been someone like you who read one of our emails, felt inspired, and donated because you believe in our vision for Virginia.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106605936/542055763/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEwMjI2ZDItNzMyMy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PkvZAO5eHabcac7Ra7FXJ02NcJce8FA6A_ySW_VAwIw=)
---
| Peter,

I spend a lot of time feeling thankful for every single person who has donated to our campaign. We raised a _**record**_ amount of money last quarter. But throughout it all, I’ve never lost sight of how we were able to do it: _**you.**_

Behind every dollar and every donation has been someone like you who read one of our emails, felt inspired, and donated because you believe in our vision for Virginia. And I’m so glad to have you on our team.

I know you probably get a lot of fundraising emails and text messages. I know they’re probably annoying sometimes. But I wanted to share something I read last week:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106605937/542055764/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEwMjI2ZDItNzMyMy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PkvZAO5eHabcac7Ra7FXJ02NcJce8FA6A_ySW_VAwIw=)
Your support matters. Your donations matter. And while my opponent brings in large, out-of-state donations from billionaires, **_our campaign spends time building relationships with committed supporters like you._** We do this because I sincerely believe we share the same goal — a big victory in November 2025. I believe we will win because we work together as one team. And when we win, we will deliver real results for the people of Virginia.

[_**So this November, let’s make sure we have what it takes to win big together! Will you contribute to my campaign today to make sure we have the resources we need to win?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106605938/542055765/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEwMjI2ZDItNzMyMy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PkvZAO5eHabcac7Ra7FXJ02NcJce8FA6A_ySW_VAwIw=)

name: David Hogg
subject: Too many Democrats are asleep at the wheel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Will you help us rebuild the Democratic Party with younger leaders?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9fa333e8-0e3b-4499-a112-bc422fa02cb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, we have some big news to share:

Leaders We Deserve is launching a $20 million investment to usher in the next generation of Democrats who will go to the mat every day for the American people and use every tactic and tool to stop Trump’s radical right-wing, economically illiterate agenda.

[Will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help us primary out-of-touch, ineffective Democrats and rebuild the party with the next generation of leaders?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37f4f6c4-9ffa-40de-844b-38a12474da56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Today’s party politics has an unwritten rule on both sides: If you win a seat, it’s yours for life. No one serious in your party will challenge you. That is a culture that we have to break.

And while we need to continue to pressure our current leaders to do more, part of the pathway forward requires us to start mounting primary challenges to Democrats in solidly blue districts who are failing to deliver for the people.

Too many elected leaders in the Democratic Party are either unwilling or unable to meet the moment and are asleep at the wheel while Trump is demolishing the economy, challenging the foundations of our democracy, and creating new existential crises for our country by the day.

Younger leaders simply bring a different level of urgency that we just aren’t seeing in our politics right now. We grew up with the existential threat of climate change bearing down on us. Adolescence today means active shooter drills and wondering if you’re going to survive math class. And we are told every election is the most important of our lifetime – that we must protect democracy at all costs – all while democracy continues to fail us.

It’s not because democracy can’t work, but because our politicians have failed to make it work for the people, and instead made it work for the special interests destroying our future. We can do something about it, Peter. We can ensure that Democrats are fighting for us – or we can replace them with younger leaders who will. [Can you pitch in $10 now, split between our organizations, to help us power this game-changing fight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cfeabb0-e359-436b-912d-16b2c2af07e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Like so many, I care deeply about this party. I want this party to be strong. It’s personal to me. When my father was diagnosed with Parkinson’s almost 15 years ago, the only reason my family stayed afloat was Social Security. And the only reason we were able to get Social Security was because the Democratic Party fought for it. With all its flaws, the Democratic Party has played a critical role for progress in this country. Revitalizing and rebuilding it is important work. This party is worth fighting for, and not just for the sake of opposing Trump. What that looks like right now is electing younger leaders who have the energy, passion, and vision to meet this moment with the urgency our country deserves. Through all of this, some incumbents will rise to the challenge and emerge stronger. Others will demonstrate why they should be replaced. Either way, we all win. [If you're ready to jumpstart the next generation of Democratic leadership, please donate $10 right now to be split between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action and stand with us in this important fight.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4d34306-4ddd-424e-9716-0419adef15d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your support, David Hogg

---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb418508-511d-435c-807e-034268d915f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: I’m digging in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
body:
Peter,

A few days ago, Wiley met with community members at a town hall meeting in Manteo, NC . Although the invited Republican Congressman chose not to attend, it didn't stop Wiley from having a powerful and engaging discussion about the issues that matter most to North Carolinians.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025]

Some Members of Congress won’t show up to meet with their constituents because they can’t explain the mess in Washington. They can’t answer your questions or explain their inaction while Trump tanks our economy and cuts your benefits. But Wiley shows up, answers questions, and fights for what’s right for North Carolina.

At the town hall, Wiley highlighted how Donald Trump is shredding our constitution and billionaires are cutting Medicare, dismantling FEMA, and attacking our education system.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025]

Meanwhile, Thom Tillis stands by, putting his career above the needs of North Carolinians. Our families are struggling with rising costs and low wages, and we deserve leaders who will stand up and fight for us.

It’s clear that we need new leadership in Washington — leadership that is accountable to the people and doesn’t shy away from tough questions. That’s the kind of leadership Wiley brings. But we’re up against deep pockets and powerful interests that are determined to maintain the status quo.

Your support is crucial to advancing our work, including holding these town hall meetings and engaging directly with more families across North Carolina. Every contribution fuels Wiley’s U.S. Senate campaign, making our impact stronger and our reach wider. Please consider making a donation today to keep the momentum going and ensure we can bring principled leadership to the Senate. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025]

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-launch2025]

Thank you for joining us and believing in the possibility of a better North Carolina.

— Team Wiley

- - - - - - - - - - -
Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

body:

**INSIDER ALERT:** **Huge Savings: Warehouse Overload – You WIN BIG!** If you've been watching the headlines, you already know – the threat of food shortages, blackouts, and supply chain failures is more real than ever. Our 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have been flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. Why? Because people are waking up to the truth – you can't count on the system anymore. So we gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **produce as many kits as humanly possible.** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse – more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits – just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family... **you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare.** And yes – **you'll get a stack of FREE BONUSES** as our thank you. [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5979982/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA0Mjc/LbmNsR0w2dVg0Nw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU1JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA0MjYmX25saWQ9eXJnckNxQTU2SyZfbmhpZHM9bmNYTVJ1QnFhdEU5TGxscw/gaA5Gwg/s8p078f0bc3) [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5979982/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA0Mjc/LbmNsR0w2dVg0Nw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU1JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA0MjYmX25saWQ9QXhhSDd3NXRnbSZfbmhpZHM9bmNYTVJ1QnFhdEU5TGxscw/gaA5Gwg/s4qf713620b) **3 Months Of Food, Security & Peace Of Mind – All In One Kit** This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. [**Click here now to stock up before our warehouse clears out.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5979982/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA0Mjc/LbmNsR0w2dVg0Nw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU1JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA0MjYmX25saWQ9WWdrTUFaOFI0SiZfbmhpZHM9bmNYTVJ1QnFhdEU5TGxscw/gaA5Gwg/s9jefe8840d) That's right – **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** – just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value – and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [**Click here to grab your 3-Month Survival Food Kit before they're gone.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5979982/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA0Mjc/LbmNsR0w2dVg0Nw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU1JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA0MjYmX25saWQ9VThjZHlzY1FOQyZfbmhpZHM9bmNYTVJ1QnFhdEU5TGxscw/gaA5Gwg/seoefde2be2) Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5979982/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA0Mjc/LbmNsR0w2dVg0Nw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU1JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA0MjYmX25saWQ9YlYzd3hrek5VRCZfbmhpZHM9bmNYTVJ1QnFhdEU5TGxscw/gaA5Gwg/s3jeb0b1af8) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5979982/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA0Mjc/LbmNsR0w2dVg0Nw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU1JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA0MjYmX25saWQ9RENYQ21XTkNBRSZfbmhpZHM9bmNYTVJ1QnFhdEU5TGxscw/gaA5Gwg/s8h109d3ab6)

"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_

subject: Warning: This Knife Is Not for Beginners
body:

**Help Us Field-Test the Widowmaker** **200 Knives. No Gimmicks. Just Grit.** This isn’t a toy. And it sure as hell isn’t some flimsy wall-hanger.

The **Steel River Widowmaker** is our most aggressive blade yet—a full-tang, 9.5" recurve beast forged from 5CR15MOV stainless steel, made for people who actually _use_ their gear.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21320/6374453/b69909354fea10303234b0700fabe0b54bc8eb8b/7e92bb237520c3cc4e7196cfc5403eb2d6f30f45)
---
Before we roll it out nationwide, we’re putting it in the hands of real Americans who know what it means to carry a knife that can handle anything.

Here’s the deal:
We’re giving away **200 Widowmakers for FREE**. Just cover a small shipping fee, put it to the test, and tell us what you think.

And if it doesn’t live up to the hype? You’re covered by our **60-day Money Back Assurance**. No questions asked.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21320/6374453/b69909354fea10303234b0700fabe0b54bc8eb8b/7e92bb237520c3cc4e7196cfc5403eb2d6f30f45)
---
**P.S.** The Widowmaker is part of our first production batch. Once these 200 are gone, that’s it. If you want a blade built for battle—and built to last—don’t wait.

His administration is also openly defying an order from the Supreme Court. The courts overturned some of Trump’s egregious orders, so now, Trump is targeting judges who uphold the law instead of doing his bidding. **Trump’s lawlessness can’t go unchecked. It’s time for his Republican enablers to rein him in—before it’s too late.** According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. body:

|

Our House Conservative Majority is under attack.

Democrats have already zeroed in on 35 key seats that they think they can flip. If they succeed, our Majority--and everything we've fought for--goes up in smoke.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: completely transparent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
will you help me?
#
I am going to be completely transparent today.
$6,850. That's about the amount of money we still need to raise in the next 72 hours. Let me quickly explain why:
Wednesday at midnight marks the end of April and our critical end-of-month deadline. By the end of the month, we need to gauge the momentum of our movement and start to decide which candidates we want to support this cycle.
Without reaching that last $6,850, it’s going to be tough for us to continue our work supporting changemaking candidates. Because the goals we set are the absolute minimum we need to make sure this movement can continue running and be sustained through this first phase of Trump’s presidency.
We are not aiming for an unrealistic amount — we just need the funding that will help us continue supporting candidates who will decide whether or not Democrats can take back the House and even the Senate from the GOP and have a powerful check on Trump.
So, what do you say?
[**Can you help us reach our goal before our critical fundraising deadline on Wednesday? I’m hoping that our transparency will help supporters like you see what’s at stake.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3855?t=1&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.1rUOK9&refcode=em250427-1-300&t=20&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.SUAz64&refcode=em250427-1-300&t=21&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.3NtRt-&refcode=em250427-1-300&t=22&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.AGEkAl&refcode=em250427-1-300&t=23&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.3pjpeT&refcode=em250427-1-300&t=24&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.cPXLtk&refcode=em250427-1-300&t=25&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM)**
---
****
When you donate today, you are helping to pave our path to electing changemakers up and down the ballot. Whatever amount you give — $5, $30, or $100 — will put us one step closer to building a better future.
Thank you,
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3858?t=26&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM)

We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=5531%2E196590%2EnVT4oM). name: Team Jones
subject: critical point in our campaign
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/108618/images/joneslogo%20%281%29.png]
Folks,
We're at a critical point in the race for Virginia Attorney General, and Democrats need to finish the month stronger than ever.
Last month, Virginia’s MAGA Attorney General Jason Miyares outraised our campaign.
So now, if we want to defeat Miyares, we'll need to reach every fundraising goal between now and November.
If Miyares or any of Trump’s MAGA cronies think our campaign doesn’t have what it takes to win, they’ll jump at the opportunity to crush our grassroots movement. So we need to turbocharge this campaign before the end of the month, and we need your help.
Our team set a $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, and the deadline is coming up fast. Please, will you be one of our first end-of-month donors to help us reach this critical goal today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other]
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=10]
From Norfolk to Roanoke, Jay has been meeting with working families about how to make a better Virginia.
And it's clear: People are concerned about keeping their families safe, having good jobs that put food on the table, and having access to life-saving services like Medicaid and Social Security that millions depend on.
Unlike Virginia's current Attorney General, Jay is taking action to fight back against MAGA policies that would hurt working families and stand up for their rights.
That's why we need to do everything we can to elect Jay this November because every dollar will count in a race this important.
Before we run out of time, will you rush anything to help us reach our $10,000 goal so we can give Virginia a leader who will fight for them instead of a right-wing agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=250]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?]
– Team Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
