null,

My name is Haley Stevens, and for the last six years, I’ve had the honor of serving as a U.S. representative for Michigan’s 11th Congressional District. **Earlier this week, I officially launched my campaign to serve as my great state’s next U.S. senator.**
This campaign comes at a serious moment for Michigan and our entire nation. Donald Trump and Elon Musk have thrown us into chaos and uncertainty. As I travel the state and hear firsthand from Michiganders, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid.
Afraid of the rising costs. Afraid of uncertainty in our auto industry. Afraid about the future of the benefits they’ve earned like Social Security and Medicare. Afraid for our democracy and personal freedoms. The fear, the uncertainty, the chaos – all of it is coming from Trump and Musk. _That’s unacceptable._
**We can stop them by taking back the Senate majority for Democrats, but the only way to do that is by winning the biggest, most competitive Senate race right here in Michigan. That’s why I’ve set a campaign launch goal to raise $1 million from grassroots supporters like you.**
**_[Can I count on your founding donation to hit this goal, win Michigan’s open Senate seat, and take back the Senate for Democrats? Together, we can put a stop to Trump and Musk’s chaos and build a brighter future for Michigan and our nation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106612469/542072460/-1649021094?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk84-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDg3ZTY5NS03ZTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_5L0HUrDx4HF7fBaQjaW3R5bar0MLhVXlNE-PIjzzYE=)_**

I was born in Oakland County, Michigan, and was raised by parents who were always building things – they owned their own landscaping business. Heavy machinery equipment, bobcats, plows, dirt, grease, and grime were all part of my childhood. But what I remember learning from my parents most was the value of hard work. It’s a value that bonds all of us across Michigan, a state that helped build this entire country.
**Growing up in Michigan meant I was surrounded by innovation and ingenuity, pride and hard work. From our farmers to nurses to manufacturers, we have the best workers in the world.**
Working hard should earn you a seat in the middle class, but that’s only growing more difficult under a president who said he couldn’t care less if auto prices skyrocket thanks to his shoot-from-the-hip tariffs.
It’s clear that Donald Trump and his Republican allies don’t know the first thing about workers or the middle class. _And the kicker is that they don’t care, either._
Michiganders shouldn’t have to worry if they’ll lose their jobs because of Donald Trump or Elon Musk’s reckless decisions. They shouldn’t have to worry about the future of our fundamental civil rights and personal freedoms. No American should.
But here’s the reality, null: Trump calls nearly every shot because he controls the White House, the House,___AND_ the Senate. Michigan’s open Senate seat represents our best chance to flip the Senate and take that power back from Trump.
**I will fight with everything I have to win this seat, stop Trump’s chaos, and give the people the leadership they deserve – but it’s going to take an unprecedented grassroots movement to get it done. Just last year, Trump and Republicans spent nearly $80 million trying to buy Michigan’s Senate seat, and Democrats won by just 0.3%. That’s less than 20,000 votes.**
**_[So I’m counting on your support to build up the early resources it will](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106612479/542072473/-1649021094?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk84-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDg3ZTY5NS03ZTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_5L0HUrDx4HF7fBaQjaW3R5bar0MLhVXlNE-PIjzzYE=)_**** _[take to compete and win. Help me hit my $1 million campaign launch goal by making a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare. Together, we will win Michigan’s open toss-up race and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106612480/542072474/-1649021094?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk84-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDg3ZTY5NS03ZTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_5L0HUrDx4HF7fBaQjaW3R5bar0MLhVXlNE-PIjzzYE=)_**
In solidarity,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106612481/542072475/-1886691151?refcode=jtk84-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDg3ZTY5NS03ZTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_5L0HUrDx4HF7fBaQjaW3R5bar0MLhVXlNE-PIjzzYE=) | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106612482/542072476/-1886691151?refcode=jtk84-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDg3ZTY5NS03ZTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_5L0HUrDx4HF7fBaQjaW3R5bar0MLhVXlNE-PIjzzYE=)

Haley

name: David Hogg
subject: This is infuriating, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250427-1&t=1&akid=2043%2E587540%2E_g0G0U)
Peter, it is fucking infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda.
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump.
On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump.
And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump and fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security.
That’s where we come in.
**And that’s why I’m setting a $75,000 goal to show the power of our movement before the end-of-month fundraising deadline.**
**[Can you pitch in $5 to help reach our goal and power our mission to elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250427-1?refcode=em20250427-2043&amount=5&refcode2=2043_587540__g0G0U&akid=2043%2E587540%2E_g0G0U)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250427-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250427-2043&refcode2=2043_587540__g0G0U&akid=2043%2E587540%2E_g0G0U)**
This is no joke. _Every single day counts in the fight ahead._ If we fall short of this goal, we’ll be at a serious disadvantage going into the critical battles to come.
**Here’s the truth:** The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling.
**But we’re not going to let that happen.** We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful.
This goal is bigger than just hitting a fundraising target. It’s about empowering real leadership and political progress.
**We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough.**
That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve.
**[Peter, we need your support to hit our $75K goal before the big deadline on April 30. Can you chip in $5 toward our goal and help power our game-changing work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250427-1?refcode=em20250427-2043&amount=5&refcode2=2043_587540__g0G0U&akid=2043%2E587540%2E_g0G0U)**
Thank you for being part of this movement,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250427-1&t=2&refcode2=2043_587540__g0G0U&akid=2043%2E587540%2E_g0G0U)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2043%2E587540%2E_g0G0U)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2043%2E587540%2E_g0G0U)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Apr 26, 2025
Subject: Fight back against the authoritarian takeover of our democracy
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
With relentless**** attacks on our healthcare, nutrition, housing, public education, and other essential services, as well as our rights to free speech and due process, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. We need to take collective action in defense of our communities.
My team and I have held **multiple Town Halls** with hundreds of attendees to come together and resist this authoritarian administration.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke_I9tRxfCFlpoNLi8ikgOXfGMHiHktdAW56smIAxQbPGFXtSEW4Vou5YBV4f7hQU6Bh7dgTkhOfwYRD1CaSx5Zh0LzHHGG-p8rO7gKgic7KBsfVLaLQ3jE0tEhd0CaEeTagEJe2Ss_lP6kI1l_P7GcGPQQeCRFFCHULvwc2LwrcS_N8UKfVERVWkcTc9axWFjEa0usNeopJdls9BhIyknvEhJGHPpBJ2qWWxC9UlQNCnZZHbYKRcSkE--B2MnoO1dKwx6giyzVWS7ilw-UkpSCUAoT6-c2rONBH2T2h_SG30wmMZipTWkugfm6Cg-o5HQ0LopIAmfRSL8LJcmrnlWV9hmA85HP-65JozLNf_8vJM/4g0/ZyLfq9OxTHGBrlnoQJv3CA/h8/h001.MNlHu9JZmNoI6Y86B4ouexUukFLOiOLFReLLmFYAOwA)
We’re also fighting back against Congressional Republicans’ dangerous budget, which will cut $880 billion from Medicaid to pay for even more tax cuts for billionaires.
This week and next, we’re sending thousands of postcards and holding **HANDS OFF Medicaid phonebanks** to connect with people in our neighboring congressional district, represented by Republican Congressman John James. We’re mobilizing his constituents because **we can protect life-saving programs like Medicaid if we can move three to four Republican members of Congress to flip their votes**.
And soon we’ll be launching our **2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship** to train young (primarily BIPOC*) activists and leaders in community organizing, including providing stipends to participants.
[**Can you rush a donation today to power our ongoing work to mobilize our communities and resist this authoritarian administration? Pitch in and support my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke81ZWd9w0dAU6ZOce6ufx1uznZXHER0kLhdLgjyQDGwrQZxVCYYIoY-fDn1fCW2bVFll9ravHthnZBhwf_MpcmYUWSw7YB_t-r0B7umoWHzIdVCXRqH7Qgkdg4Hc-4_YX5zEIjh3HUiJpWR6RLX8E380M7VizX5rnqYBokWjev3HVPTQakGLR6EV-jLYInYjKK0R8AZX7S276E6BMS44Kt_f_xbpdeKqm4MKFYQzxzWyLBVRz3_HwJIubU0jOeq_hFhbVed--O55UXNvwcqa0o5H9OTWWK9R-hBB2x1zObYBkDFFX6Fovglpq_onIhQqWx4oG-GN4X0luk7A0_nUIOYx28Tk8gHoUPrQse0PzOEC/4g0/ZyLfq9OxTHGBrlnoQJv3CA/h9/h001.EFnc2XGMXMKQ8hp89cGp4z8a4Y3ugo85COk9F5QO2Ek)

I created my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to empower everyday people in our democracy and to train candidates to run for office who have the lived experience to represent our communities.
This month, we wrapped up **our first Rooted in Community Campaign School of 2025,** where we trained 19 progressive candidates from diverse backgrounds to run for office.
[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke7PKhj7u8HHlZ7cu5gbMjl1ARTsn2aLrR-LjQuYi8kjFmSTlMSUy8FVVES7sGOARjMsZzcCSJGt5-IDNUkVPhLVoxOQROSkAX0PkblH9Z4OKmsEgN40QLNlDjX_0FTxTGYzbqS0Xnl69H8cyJPNXodt0WgpgeVdI6DTGB8mk7eG5UWbXkkIDFUCCps86xIwwob8Z15Fn3i_op5KQ9P0BNo5TFUxwqt2T5zljD28aTVQZzMXwRTOvKMlGQrL-4qjP6jugEX1PuKsXSVgvQX1yv_aCA35hsBFmivZb7gPzMPaGILpvFBeC2ukGka_GKgVZTdRNTlLSHysVkYSQzS8JmYLMpLsXODIer0PAz7ZkUICp/4g0/ZyLfq9OxTHGBrlnoQJv3CA/h11/h001.2d0biq4V4AKb2-oGg0BAqOAp0tZVTAK_XpVoZXHIOPY)
**Too often, elected officials are millionaires who are disconnected from the everyday realities of their constituents.** Last month, Trump’s *billionaire* Commerce Secretary said that if Social Security checks didn’t go out, his mother-in-law wouldn’t complain. He also said the only people who would complain are fraudsters.
**This administration, led by the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, is completely divorced from the reality that our communities face** as we live paycheck to paycheck and work two or three jobs just to put food on our tables and keep a roof over our heads.
[**I know this is a difficult time for all of us. If you can, donate today to power the resistance needed to defend our communities from an authoritarian takeover of our democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke1ZwkT2oXZDgnBVhLEikc8zpleRiD5zjkhsL6HxdqWzDXP98bPr8-LZ-c_8tS2t69t7m-GrGTwswbyLRw_BwWFdGWQ3ddQv1WWCRV_0r0pcv37ZArQT36MFRtWoyyLvMvG0OsgRt8Gq00-NhrummGwP_WIwQCxxyIc2XIKe9l_iQt_AgPD3sZc6-Qsa4ki0-Y8SD-ASqRgWWyCSSuaMrosHIAnX-QnfQafD71crzrkGV1Qd8VG7Mcj6ohXYXLf_3uzFLhSDf8bmFEX4tkmUDrhsP6Gn71isnK6vbKjWw-2FB00ysMgPjf2n25qyAO6z-oLUiKLhky2Hzt3cPd4t4LTuqTD5tjxmofv3TpRtSpqyW/4g0/ZyLfq9OxTHGBrlnoQJv3CA/h12/h001.aBkWsE-lwhN-o5nLPweFwvpzVfFXup801t5HxQGwtjk)

clean_body: With relentless attacks on our communities, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. | | | Friend, Last week, we held a packed Town Hall meeting with over 300 people, where everyday people went home organized and ready to fight back against this authoritarian administration. From sending postcards and making phone calls into swing districts, urging voters to reject the relentless attacks on programs like Medicaid, to training the next generation of leaders to organize their communities and run for office, we are not backing down. Much of our work is powered by my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, which I created to empower everyday people and to train candidates to run for office who have the lived experience to fight for our communities. I know this is a scary moment for all of us. Attacks on our rights and our very livelihoods are upending all of our lives. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We will not back down in the face of these attacks. Together, we are organized and fighting back. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Apr 26, 2025 Subject: Fight back against the authoritarian takeover of our democracy To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, With relentless attacks on our healthcare, nutrition, housing, public education, and other essential services, as well as our rights to free speech and due process, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. We need to take collective action in defense of our communities. My team and I have held multiple Town Halls with hundreds of attendees to come together and resist this authoritarian administration. We’re also fighting back against Congressional Republicans’ dangerous budget, which will cut $880 billion from Medicaid to pay for even more tax cuts for billionaires. This week and next, we’re sending thousands of postcards and holding HANDS OFF Medicaid phonebanks to connect with people in our neighboring congressional district, represented by Republican Congressman John James. We’re mobilizing his constituents because we can protect life-saving programs like Medicaid if we can move three to four Republican members of Congress to flip their votes. And soon we’ll be launching our 2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship to train young (primarily BIPOC) activists and leaders in community organizing, including providing stipends to participants. I created my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to empower everyday people in our democracy and to train candidates to run for office who have the lived experience to represent our communities. This month, we wrapped up our first Rooted in Community Campaign School of 2025, where we trained 19 progressive candidates from diverse backgrounds to run for office. Too often, elected officials are millionaires who are disconnected from the everyday realities of their constituents. Last month, Trump’s billionaire Commerce Secretary said that if Social Security checks didn’t go out, his mother-in-law wouldn’t complain. He also said the only people who would complain are fraudsters. This administration, led by the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, is completely divorced from the reality that our communities face as we live paycheck to paycheck and work two or three jobs just to put food on our tables and keep a roof over our heads. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | With you in this fight, Rashida BIPOC means Black, Indigenous, and people of color * | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . But we never heard from you, Peter! We are not exaggerating when we say this is an unprecedented, coordinated political attack that could make grassroots donations halt at a complete standstill overnight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= = = Please take action before it’s too late! clean_body: | = = Hi there, it’s Marc Elias. I’m proud to be one of the leading lawyers in the ongoing fight to defend democracy and protect voting rights in the face of Republican extremism. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and Elon Musk launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for their own gain. But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it. My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. They need Democrats like you in this fight, friend. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to the DASS Legal Fund today. Your support – right now – will help Democrats defend democracy in the courtroom and stop attacks on our elections. body:
The NDRC is rising to meet the moment. Will you join them?
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106613728/542076442/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNDQ0YmFhLTgwMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=b55350tRgFByld2PnuXX9aQjbBngoOC8Sy6gqtSJ1Cw=&emci=e5cdf146-1b22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=01444baa-8023-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=8431045)

Peter, One thing is abundantly clear: now, more than ever, saving our democracy is up to us. The most important office in this democracy is the citizen, the ordinary person who says, no, that’s not right. Too often, people underestimate the power of people. Those of us who care deeply about the future of our country need to fight for what we believe in. When one side tries to stack the deck and lock in a permanent grip on power — whether by actively suppressing votes, engaging in brazen gerrymandering, politicizing the armed forces, or using the criminal justice system to go after their opponents — we need to speak out, organize, and mobilize. **The question we face today is not simply whose policies and agendas will prevail, but whether the concept of democracy itself will endure. So this is not a time for acceptance and resignation — this is a time for commitment and action. ** I've been proud to support the NDRC since my friend Attorney General Eric Holder and I helped bring it to life in 2017. Its work to undo partisan gerrymandering has helped produce the fairest maps in a generation. And it’s one of the reasons why Democrats cut the Republican margin in the House from a 47-seat margin when President Trump first took office in 2017 to a historically low five seats after the 2024 election. [**I hope that today, amid an all-out assault on democratic principles and the rule of law, you will join me in supporting the National Democratic Redistricting Committee as they fight for a better, more representative democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106613729/542076444/-2010330907?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaNOR_email_20250427-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250427-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNOR_&utm_campaign=ObamaNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNDQ0YmFhLTgwMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=b55350tRgFByld2PnuXX9aQjbBngoOC8Sy6gqtSJ1Cw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**At this troubling moment, the NDRC’s work is more urgent and vital than at any time in its eight-year history.**
In 2025, there are critical state supreme court elections in Pennsylvania, a gubernatorial race and state legislative elections in Virginia, and a very important special election in Michigan.
The NDRC’s focus on the state level — electing pro-democracy legislators, state supreme court justices, and other officials like secretaries of state who have a significant impact on voting rights and redistricting — is exactly where you and I can make the greatest difference to ensure that the will of the people prevails.
[**Everything we have fought for comes down to what we do in response to the challenges we’re faced with right now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106613736/542076464/-2010330907?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaNOR_email_20250427-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250427-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNOR_&utm_campaign=ObamaNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNDQ0YmFhLTgwMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=b55350tRgFByld2PnuXX9aQjbBngoOC8Sy6gqtSJ1Cw=)
The NDRC is rising to meet the moment with a comprehensive strategy to fight partisan and racial gerrymandering in state legislatures and elect people who will fight to make maps fairer. They’re pushing back against voter suppression efforts across the country. And they’re working to organize and mobilize voters on the ground leading up to important elections this year and next.
**Because when we have fair maps,_we win_.** With your continued support, the NDRC will be able to turn out more voters and fight back more fiercely against Republican anti-democracy agendas across the country in 2025 and 2026.
**At this moment in our history — when core democratic principles seem to be continuously under attack, and when too many people around the world have become cynical and disengaged — we need to be vigilant and take action to protect democracy.**
That’s why I’m personally asking: [**Will you join me in supporting the NDRC’s work by making a donation right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106613737/542076467/-2010330907?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaNOR_email_20250427-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250427-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNOR_&utm_campaign=ObamaNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNDQ0YmFhLTgwMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=b55350tRgFByld2PnuXX9aQjbBngoOC8Sy6gqtSJ1Cw=)
Sincerely,
Barack Obama

clean_body: The NDRC is rising to meet the moment. Will you join them? | Peter, One thing is abundantly clear: now, more than ever, saving our democracy is up to us. The most important office in this democracy is the citizen, the ordinary person who says, no, that’s not right. Too often, people underestimate the power of people. Those of us who care deeply about the future of our country need to fight for what we believe in. When one side tries to stack the deck and lock in a permanent grip on power — whether by actively suppressing votes, engaging in brazen gerrymandering, politicizing the armed forces, or using the criminal justice system to go after their opponents — we need to speak out, organize, and mobilize. The question we face today is not simply whose policies and agendas will prevail, but whether the concept of democracy itself will endure. So this is not a time for acceptance and resignation — this is a time for commitment and action. I've been proud to support the NDRC since my friend Attorney General Eric Holder and I helped bring it to life in 2017. Its work to undo partisan gerrymandering has helped produce the fairest maps in a generation. And it’s one of the reasons why Democrats cut the Republican margin in the House from a 47-seat margin when President Trump first took office in 2017 to a historically low five seats after the 2024 election. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = At this troubling moment, the NDRC’s work is more urgent and vital than at any time in its eight-year history. In 2025, there are critical state supreme court elections in Pennsylvania, a gubernatorial race and state legislative elections in Virginia, and a very important special election in Michigan. The NDRC’s focus on the state level — electing pro-democracy legislators, state supreme court justices, and other officials like secretaries of state who have a significant impact on voting rights and redistricting — is exactly where you and I can make the greatest difference to ensure that the will of the people prevails. = The NDRC is rising to meet the moment with a comprehensive strategy to fight partisan and racial gerrymandering in state legislatures and elect people who will fight to make maps fairer. They’re pushing back against voter suppression efforts across the country. And they’re working to organize and mobilize voters on the ground leading up to important elections this year and next. Because when we have fair maps,we win. With your continued support, the NDRC will be able to turn out more voters and fight back more fiercely against Republican anti-democracy agendas across the country in 2025 and 2026. At this moment in our history — when core democratic principles seem to be continuously under attack, and when too many people around the world have become cynical and disengaged — we need to be vigilant and take action to protect democracy. That’s why I’m personally asking: = Sincerely, Barack Obama = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida
subject: Taking the fight to oligarchy on their home turf
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250427-1331-foote&t=1001&akid=1331%2E342411%2E0eW8vI ]Squad Victory Fund

We’re all feeling fear right now,
Peter —

That someone we love could become a target of the Trump regime. That
tariffs will wreck our 401ks and make retirement impossible. That rising
costs will force families to choose between food and education.

This is what it means to be governed by oligarchs, billionaires, and
bigots. This system was built to enrich the powerful while the rest of us
are told to accept less. But the greatest weapon the ruling class has is
making us believe that we can’t ask for more than this.

Yet we continue to prove that a better world is possible.

Our Squad was elected to take this fight to the ruling class on their home
turf. The oligarchy is desperate to kick us out. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250427-movement.HAzMjO&refcode=em20250427-1331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1331%2E342411%2E0eW8vI ]Will you chip in
$3 today to prove that our people-power beats their big
money?

Our Squad is marching alongside you — for peace, Medicare for All, a Green
New Deal, reproductive rights, human dignity for immigrants, and economic
justice.

We must not let Republicans scare us into accepting an unjust,
exploitative status quo. In Congress, our communities, and our workplaces,
we need to keep fighting for the world we deserve.

We can’t let fear write the future. Not now. Not ever.

We’re in this for the long haul,
Peter. We need to win races
from school board to Senate, train activists on how to build power, and
unionize our workplaces. All while protecting our victories from
right-wing pushback.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250427-movement.HAzMjO&refcode=ema20250427-1331&t=1003&akid=1331%2E342411%2E0eW8vI ]Can you chip in $3 to fuel the movement today, in 2026,
and beyond?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250427-movement.HAzMjO&refcode=em20250427-1331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1331%2E342411%2E0eW8vI ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1331%2E342411%2E0eW8vI

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

clean_body: | | | Trump’s impeachable offenses grow and so does the danger to our democracy.. ** Our ImpeachTrumpNow.com campaign is rapidly gaining momentum as we work to outpace Trump’s relentless spree of sadistic criminality. Billboards have inspired patriots in Pennsylvania, New York, and Minnesota. We now have 10 in the Los Angeles area, 1 in Rhode Island, and we just put up our third billboard in New Mexico thanks to grassroots donors like you! Despite being twice impeached, this convicted felon, sex offender, and fraudster evaded conviction due to Senate Republicans' refusal to act. Their inaction has plunged us into a Constitutional crisis, as Trump continues to dismantle law and order! Until we reclaim the majority in Congress, we must act with conviction: if it's a Constitutional crisis, we have to act like it by demanding impeachment. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Since retaking office, Trump has gamed our economy for his personal gain, disappeared people on the streets, ignored court orders, trampled our rights and subverted the Constitution. He’s toying with our lives and destroying our democracy. The RESISTANCE is rising, but we have to keep up the pressure. **Help us spread the word and demand that Congress (including Republicans) do the right thing and impeach this insidious despot! ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/n8IbetofRCSFsHJd7q3tB6PYYfXRMh-1dTNoDSAQMKvEZt9Dw8U2Xr77LZHAXQeQ_tu7F2lpcnoq3UIAJNPoFsxUFVg02hUGfeLwS0iHT5ge0_z_L7J10Gdm8xXetcVziwBzS37y7jB7gQwiBqUyPhnBcR-3_WHCvGjB8bRRlMDJ9jf9Ta52qwxjYTExZFCep0DQ_WwBdiPljc20-6tZ4gVYC2trkz7rp6VhH2Gt0wVtzVP5BGWfGqVY5xDNYbVSSrmdv4bWPqvGIu4tqQqi-aU1O5rTcwWYcCG789_UtKKFKe59TqYg5XWasICfgrZOcX81MHCFcR1vFnvI-XauTNkchtue4sfKzFyi3-sGDI31e3WDSfiZkz4zIfeHDra_76KZQohGjBJFTPBoOGhhPGgCplr73JIC0riFKUkDKWEWaOiBWIK6hiFPki1MQnrgtYfCgPib_81-oVonThTeZtrILoyophrlVqsE90hy_HsRkVp54qvpX1A/gxJwS8zbLOHB8EINyhs2o3xaesgpMnmq/8)

** ****I’m pissed, Peter.** ** ** You’re bombarded every single day — texts, emails, pop-ups — all begging you to take a survey, sign a petition, or chip in a few bucks to “stop the Democrats.” ** ** And what actually happens, Peter? **NOTHING.**** ** The same RINO cowards fold like cheap suits. The spending gets worse. The lies keep piling up. And you — the one actually footing the bill — are left betrayed and ignored.** ** They take your hard-earned dollars and then turn around and vote for the same damn policies that wrecked your savings, crushed your community, and left you wondering if _anyone_ in D.C. actually gives a damn about you. ** **_**You want the truth?**_** ** When they scam you out of a donation, they pat themselves on the back, head to some fancy cocktail party, and LAUGH at you behind closed doors. **They don’t respect you. They don’t fear you. And they sure as hell don’t represent you.** I’ve had it. With the lies. The games. The sellouts. I know what you're probably thinking right now: _"Who the hell is this guy?"_ My name is Chip Roy.** ** You may have seen me getting trashed by some spineless RINO on Fox News for not “playing for the team.”** ** Well guess what, Peter? ** ****Damn right I’m not a team player.**** ** Because I don’t work for _them_.** ** **[I work for YOU](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/2OwVMTULAnYc1CmXiZaLJjmPnWxXxyXsm22bNdkq-mAJdLHCUYhmO16K1q9cIUBpUf_kmkZ7w1bY_BIG_Jm-UAvuTB7MFAJajiv_6aT5HfCp24Lld_LTMKB0ZmyJSU9HkobrF4At0wL0uZOaA8QmOHfKD_f2JFoEr-8paVQt-PgVu-JpkzvcAS9pq1-DWWgHFG_IB-1lWFPbMVVZ91nNh57ZejTg8tRp0oxCFbARAHeyykvNcjOs8hyOukToNDITbQR97xvgCHvmTzqefCW0pH7g48PbelL5O_HWUASUw5aHn1F_dfTR2hvyONQ890QATS5NYTAXtWHSwMU3x_0EkxtOYi33zIIBDW9lOwORmAsu4vQS17lNch-BMC2OClDrr-SayLOEZZdwrRIZebaSB8nsWaIv1H3PuW5V10eK_hYV0sCpm1t52TIxV3RSzJMf5Piac_cQb55mM9nWLS5q2iTbx8WQRUZkP6R_cubkliqkr8rp3ttHP4o/NKyNST18kgdSPQUzKl9Wruuby7_0HETL/8).** ** ** I see your posts. I hear your calls. I _feel_ the same betrayal that lights a fire in your gut every time you turn on the news and watch our country circling the drain. ** ** President Trump gave us real hope for real change. But these DC swamp rats — **Republicans and Democrats alike** — are trying to feed him the same old garbage from the last 30 years.** ** So here’s what I’m doing, Peter: **I’m fighting like hell to blow up this broken status quo.** I’m helping elect people who will **stand with Trump** and finally put **YOU first**. It’s not easy. I’ve got the entire **Uniparty** gunning for me. But I’m not backing down — not now, not ever.** ** Now let me be straight with you — no gimmicks, no BS. ** ** I won’t lie and say there’s a 2500% match. I won’t trick you into taking a fake survey just to ask you for money. And I’m not going to pretend I’m Trump or Elon or JD Vance. I’m just a man — a father, a patriot — asking you directly: **[Can you chip in $25, or whatever you can afford, to help me fight back](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/FQZMsR-0ApoMl5CngwMQkEX6OCToUTmoU3BmE0YSBq9g4M87LnJlnoUIE_LWR48mh_XSwwZuFVB4ibgUgysN1Foev1euMx8YG2J4Q2_ltJRELSjvGF-H2PPpn9viYW8xHSertA4r57DA7s9a7-zpVFwYZa2K5A8k2SLKr3ofu3ISMRnS63SHKJwndDij67I5k29vw836MZiczSCMrbkYu2brhhfR8AFcKHCGs05HCOcnkp53cD77CuFJeYKVsgMe2Gea_QcPLbjO7SyGeXcDaUVNwUOLHJSvzAjCglKWFUu9hVonYw-szQnSdArpQzhlJljkJIrimeZ0MKRFcslzh2uUMRbsBNDnjB9zpNkiSN_h47aPkRQaC8Ry_b9dHY7JFzs2RNnT_y-TuVAKtcGK7ueUTZGkbHDxbDJxBBZkN2G_oxKzmgME4-5Aq6OfxuZYZMV5RseZQlXUw9OENi2yrn-wPzg1YO_Xd46ZAQy12YRyBzv1V5TAs8Q/VSBgaNodRmNgjlc5IsNMrNCs2O7FSYcu/8)?** That’s it. You have my word, Peter:
✔ I will never stop fighting for you.
✔ I will never stop listening to you.
✔ And I will NEVER sell you out — not for a vote, not for a check, not for anything. This is my promise to you. As a man. As a father. As someone who actually gives a damn. **[I would be honored to earn your support today](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/OR27gOVtGnExe2FDlLu3dnoGByJOTPH-nl--rBf2P8YyhjGzspW6FMP_8o1k5JgUTlGphNrxexvyVude822VvWmxmElha7WwpP4cNws4HZpMM--KGGsABGUB7-Qp1YCxHRSyZZ46Bp90xJ-ma453NT_5rCcAWTsWzKvLhPmQl66cdepG1Y_Be2i7p2vSQDNrIlUVjc7Ccv7MtMKCqzgUtkMHMDXUva_ZWsHSoVRxVKUj0KbP5UuGfLBHvdAfeh2KtrcfclSd4TighDd3UGnD9BYInmfBoO9ArMaSOVB_tViRgV1EqECH7Kp0vW8wmMDX8tngPR-D2Y-CgMvhabLS3m4DakLADgXwDn2Ee_by638RtDmOJ_wMcYW8j2nGSBLJOjqyp7VTb5l3M3BExtQDpVoXCHMNT7qDXKjvTrZmr9tp6ES9eB5jGinLf-22X3xo_HFwq-T9d2uwphZmQcSMiTSyi6PtPfSE4X_4MBtNL6Yw-STsQTQs9o8/S5qK7k9uO8odPRBqYkdSeLk1gpFZFXwo/8). ** **Together, we can rip the mask off this corrupt system and start winning again — for YOU!** Thank you and God Bless,

name: Cole
subject: The Countdown Is On… Our Podcast Launches Tomorrow!
body:
The Flyover Podcast officially launches tomorrow—Monday, April 28!

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEzzFvgzAQBeBfgzfQ-ThjLx66sKVTpYzIcEdwZWJEnKD8-4r2B3R9T--T3vUyXEJM8X77DKv4MueBheMUivCwZR4Q0NRANdpBK_azCEqrxGtLxlpCp9XiEaxrMegOwU1tcDyNoGcYHZN2BjoV_ekAodUdGDTNPBJwsB0a0qNFqAiEY8l7853jvSwyp3d-yd5MeVXJL6Vsj6r9qLCvsD-Oo3nnZ3mOcvZnSHANZVrqr0Xq_m-qds_bEVOKj85WBLc1xPTrlf9-vjz-BAAA___W3Vb6)
---
Good morning! **The Flyover Podcast officially launches tomorrow—Monday, April 28!** We’ve loved keeping you informed through our newsletter, and now we’re bringing the same unbiased, flyover-focused perspective to your ears (and screens) every day of the week. **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Rebecca Cooke HQ
subject: What you need to know
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106614862/542079964/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM1YzRlYy04MTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nj-fkQGAB-B6TQxW9mqGsL60FFuLmmuRCvCy8U7aQM8=&emci=9c35c4ec-8123-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9f35c4ec-8123-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=5944223)
Hi Peter, We’ve had some major developments in our race, and wanted to make sure with all the news flying by that you know what’s going on. Here are three timely updates you need:
* **Rebecca’s campaign is setting the pace on grassroots support.** Since launching just weeks ago, we’ve built a people-powered movement with over _20,000_ grassroots supporters – and it’s only the start.
*
* **National forecasters like _Inside Elections_ have moved this race to a toss-up.** That’s a HUGE shift – and it means the path to flipping the House runs straight through WI-03.
*
* **Now, Van Orden and his extremist allies are going after Rebecca.** They’re terrified of the grassroots momentum we’ve built and are coordinating attacks online. Our movement is a direct threat to Van Orden, and they’re desperate to shut us down.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This fuels my work in the Senate.
body:
Fellow American, I’ve had a busy few weeks connecting with people all across South Carolina! Hearing South Carolinians' ideas and concerns fuels my work in the Senate. Whether it’s securing our borders, supporting our veterans, promoting economic growth, or protecting the right to life, I’m fighting every day for the values that make South Carolina and America exceptional. |
---
Fellow American,

I've had a busy few weeks connecting with people all across South Carolina!

**I had the honor of joining the Aiken Republican Club and Sun City Republican Club, attending the Pendleton Spring Jubilee, and earning the endorsement of the South Carolina pro -life community.**

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c741aaade7a54938b4a81d780ab39fb0&_e=RZprFuDvHOM96ftiwthnXxwIwmciTzniIh7h3NEl7YJfdbpZAYPQuSjn3amn5YxjACTvz3GQcAV5KLGrRTpdswXHAEjF_T1Lz00TnL42W7H0m5QqkwKwawbMA2nMBKob09Md-7Ceh9UIwbnrn_tvBUm5T6BPCK6sBsKUksVLF2Ds_BA0N_uJ4JvpZvNvBBT7wgCbhhrxxy9peWdnWhU7CPeBsVY81wfDNzd5W6CFx4PgE6N-TDPzyxQclKGM1m2YhF7l_zfl0p72kG1hHhsXFUYHhg_S6LyT0K5VMyI8XbyM1k1mRxeCsiZNI5poAC8DThz4oPq0hjVAiHElSUBiPKJ3TqxcCuFPcrhgyg5r0b3DcsH84llloNZZtJgnMH-VIvZJTiVYDuwF98ggp0d4HA%3D%3D)

Fellow American, our conservative values are under attack in Washington by those who don't share our vision for a strong, prosperous America. I'm fighting every day to protect what makes our nation special, but I need you by my side.

**[Will you stand with me, Fellow American? Hearing South Carolinians' ideas and concerns fuels my work in the Senate. Whether it's securing our borders, supporting our veterans, promoting economic growth, or protecting the right to life, I'm fighting every day for the values that make South Carolina and America exceptional. Fellow American, our conservative values are under attack in Washington by those who don't share our vision for a strong, prosperous America. I'm fighting every day to protect what makes our nation special, but I need you by my side. | Together, we can keep pushing for common-sense policies that put our values first. Sincerely, Senator Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

name: Schiff HQ
subject: Continuing the cycle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8513%2E5257348%2Ep2XdNB)
There’s just one question on our minds today, Derek: **_Why are Republicans so obsessed with Adam?_**
For years, Adam has been the target of GOP anger. From Elon Musk and Fox News hosts to White House officials and even Trump himself _(sometimes all of the above, all at the same time)_ , they’ve all tried their best to silence him.
They removed him from the House Intelligence Committee. They censured him. They’ve spewed lies about him on _Fox News_ and X. Trump has even attacked him from the _Oval Office_ itself.
Unsurprisingly, they attacked Adam again after he called for an investigation to get to the bottom of whether Trump committed insider trading when he announced his tariff pause — continuing the cycle that we’ve become all too familiar with at this point of Adam holding the GOP accountable, followed by the right-wing machine coming after him.
But here’s the thing, Derek: **Adam won’t be silenced by _anyone_ — especially the people attacking him for standing up for working families and the rule of law.**
[**He’s focused on defending our democracy, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and delivering for the people of California regardless of what attacks they throw his way. Your support helps amplify his work, Derek, so please chip in today to help him keep up the fight against extremism.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250427_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8513%2E5257348%2Ep2XdNB)

body:

Hi, Derek, Team Fetterman here.
Donald Trump is coming up on his 100th day back in office, and a lot has happened since Jan. 20. We need to know what you think of Trump's actions since then. **[Will you take our new survey and let us know your thoughts?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51027?code=jtk68-su-fl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=10060%2E434096%2EjgDW5C) 👇**
| | [Take Our 100 Days Survey >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51027?code=jtk68-su-fl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=10060%2E434096%2EjgDW5C)
---
**John’s always said he’ll work with anyone to help folks in PA.** But if Trump comes after unions, Social Security, or working families – like he has, or has promised, so far – you better believe John will fight back.
This short survey will help us figure out what issues matter most to our grassroots team and keep what's top of mind for you, top of mind for us, too.
**[Hope you’ll take a minute to weigh in.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51027?code=jtk68-su-fl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=10060%2E434096%2EjgDW5C)**
Thanks.

– Team Fetterman HQ 💛
| |

A crazy old man **[challenged Charlie Kirk to a fist fight](https://substack.com/redirect/769203c7-9e01-46fe-862b-4401e3f9d1a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in front of a crowd on campus during a TPUSA speaking event.
Watch how Kirk handles the tense situation incredibly well:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/769203c7-9e01-46fe-862b-4401e3f9d1a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/769203c7-9e01-46fe-862b-4401e3f9d1a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The Holy Spirit specifically brought me here to challenge you to a gentleman's fist fight right here in front of this crowd!" the cook told Kirk.
Kirk instantly laughed at the deranged man, "No! Does a Godly man challenge another to a duel?!"
"It says clearly in the Bible that we shouldn't harm those who are worthy of protection," Kirk said.
"You're just worried I'll kick your ass!!" the old man shouted back.
Watch the unhinged confrontation here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/769203c7-9e01-46fe-862b-4401e3f9d1a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By Next Things Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/34f60307-2aeb-46f7-a28f-cb6d38fcb233?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **The Hidden Energy Crisis That Could Cripple America (And How One U.S. Company Is Fighting Back)**
When Texas energy prices skyrocketed 1,500% during grid failures, it exposed a vulnerability threatening every American family. With global electricity demand projected to surge 185% by 2050 and renewable energy's intermittent nature, we face a critical energy security challenge.
**[One American company has developed a groundbreaking solution](https://substack.com/redirect/34f60307-2aeb-46f7-a28f-cb6d38fcb233?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) : **sodium-ion battery technology that:
* Uses materials 1,400× more abundant in America than lithium
* Eliminates dangerous fire risks associated with lithium batteries
* Costs up to 60% less than foreign alternatives
* Projected to last 33% longer than traditional lithium-ion batteries

**[Next Thing Technologies has already scaled from laboratory prototypes to commercial-grade cells](https://substack.com/redirect/34f60307-2aeb-46f7-a28f-cb6d38fcb233?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **capable of powering homes during outages. With advisors from Tesla, Panasonic, and government agencies, they're bringing this American-made solution to market.
For just $498, you can join over 7,700 investors who've already invested $6.1+ million.
The company's first funding round sold out completely, with valuation increasing 209% since then.
With the energy storage market projected to reach $435 billion by 2030,**[this could be your final opportunity before institutional investors arrive.](https://substack.com/redirect/34f60307-2aeb-46f7-a28f-cb6d38fcb233?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Will you help secure America's energy future while potentially securing your own financial independence?
[Invest Now](https://substack.com/redirect/34f60307-2aeb-46f7-a28f-cb6d38fcb233?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Trump official EXPLODES at NY Times reporter for ignorant claim about DOGE**
President Trump's EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin **[exploded at a NY Times reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/4418ea36-254b-4da4-a33d-e0626d857291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for making false claims that DOGE has found no waste fraud or abuse.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4418ea36-254b-4da4-a33d-e0626d857291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Zeldin told reporters that he was furious that major outlets are reporting that there is "no evidence" of waste, fraud or abuse in the EPA.
One NY Times reporter stepped up to challenge his notion. Zeldin responded to the reporter, reading from her own article which claimed there was no evidence of waste fraud or abuse in the EPA. "Why wouldn't you write that there is any evidence?"
"Could you point us to where the judges have found waste fraud and abuse?" the NY Times reporter asked.
Zeldin fired back, saying that the judges decision refused to acknowledge the items he listed as found evidence of waste, fraud and abuse, scolding the reporter for not even reporting his counter information.
"I have a job to do, to not waste tax dollars!" Zeldin said. "I am not going to stand before the media and get bullied into lighting billions of dollars on fire!!"
"If you continue to write these stories, that say there is no evidence,... how do you square that?!" he continued.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/4418ea36-254b-4da4-a33d-e0626d857291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:

name: Team Powered by People
subject: We need community support, not more border money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

As the Texas state legislature closes in on passing a new $6.5 billion for
border security,^1 the question is: is that spending really necessary?

Most Texans say it’s not.

A poll from UT Austin’s Texas Politics Project shows that a majority of
Texas voters don’t think the state is spending too little on border
security. Why might they think that? Maybe it’s because they recognize the
bigger problems in our communities.

Across Texas,
people are struggling to keep up with the cost of living and a lack of
access to basic resources needed to thrive. They know what they need is
more money for things like strong public schools and social services, not
billions more for Trump’s crackdown on the border.

In many cases, it’s the bare necessities. Some estimates say more than a
million people – including 30,000 border residents – in Texas don’t have
access to reliable drinking water. Thousands more lack access to any
full-service hospitals near where they live.^2 Our border communities see
billions of dollars come into town, but not for the basics they need to
live.

We need more legislators who understand the struggles of these working
Texans, and will pass budgets that address their needs – not billions more
for Trump’s agenda.

Powered by People is committed to supporting candidates running to
represent the people, not the far-right’s agenda. We’re ready to continue
registering and mobilizing voters in every corner of Texas, but we need
your help.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250427.jXRGUg&refcode=ema20250427-240088&t=1001&akid=240088%2E444211%2EtbKblm ]Can you fuel our efforts by chipping in $3 or more
today? Our work is only possible because of supporters like
you.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250427.jXRGUg&refcode=ema20250427-240088&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=240088%2E444211%2EtbKblm ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

– Team Powered by People

subject: Each victory reminds Trump he doesn’t get to be king.

body:
In less than 48 hours, Democrats are competing in a special election for a seat in the Minnesota Senate – DLCC spotlight candidate Denise Slipy is running to FLIP this seat blue. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| **In less than 48 hours, Democrats are competing in a special election for a seat in the Minnesota Senate**

**DLCC spotlight candidate Denise Slipy is running to FLIP this seat blue.**
---
We currently hold a narrow, one-seat majority in the Minnesota Senate, and a win in this special election would strengthen our party's ability to fight back against GOP extremism.
**Here’s the deal:** **this isn’t just about winning in Minnesota**. This is about our democracy and our resistance.
MAGA Republicans feel empowered by Trump and his billionaire buddies, but state Democrats are the thorn in their side, proving time and time again that our strength is in the states.
Each time we come together as a movement and power Democrats to victory in special elections, we’re proving to MAGA extremists that we won’t back down and let our democracy slide into fascism.**Each Democratic victory is a reminder to Trump that he doesn’t get to be king.**
[With just 48 hours until the polls close in Minnesota, will you chip in a 3X-matched gift of $3 before our deadline to help state Democrats compete in upcoming elections across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDVzW6AXZ-X33Pf65jvKJtzaRrCwmyNZrSbgZ93bn_Msi7syWYT5-kFElUgHoDcMY_PgMXHSvIoFkrRFa5g6-RG0JlaOUuHLTrKMzC3ljIvf4z8UPsLs5mYiItK6705Tkx3GEvcFz0ymw0QJWC-z2gTwyqiDIn9U4rnQkBX-BK5S19Dk92juC_NraY8EAAqpZfHnrzxyEKzCm9C21RJb-uE80WanmPq8ItvxHL6BkDHniGUASp9BIv_Ce_hpDubcscrC6sOM1oTluCuFogbewk4S3luqcZAmNmbc6lJpS7-Hc2jc-yTe2pzHvB7WuftRloo20D8ly6U0eTJrntLj3UCcp8rWnqLh7HisWBeffry-BUlwl1i1IXTe-qpjd0mOKAohCS2YXcFlQFpJesaFSG0I3b1EOvgEY1jvVawwqHWrI/4g0/HNYomS_-SRWo-XTf2UrtSA/h0/h001.awiMjQcmLnBv9kA9o5T92veEhJCpUAxHyIEB6FgNu0o)

clean_body: In less than 48 hours, Democrats are competing in a special election for a seat in the Minnesota Senate – DLCC spotlight candidate Denise Slipy is running to FLIP this seat blue. | | | | | ---|--- | In less than 48 hours, Democrats are competing in a special election for a seat in the Minnesota Senate DLCC spotlight candidate Denise Slipy is running to FLIP this seat blue. We currently hold a narrow, one-seat majority in the Minnesota Senate, and a win in this special election would strengthen our party's ability to fight back against GOP extremism. Here’s the deal: this isn’t just about winning in Minnesota. This is about our democracy and our resistance. MAGA Republicans feel empowered by Trump and his billionaire buddies, but state Democrats are the thorn in their side, proving time and time again that our strength is in the states. Each time we come together as a movement and power Democrats to victory in special elections, we’re proving to MAGA extremists that we won’t back down and let our democracy slide into fascism.Each Democratic victory is a reminder to Trump that he doesn’t get to be king. Team, As you can probably imagine, there’s _a lot_ going on right now. Donald Trump — the same person who was elected on the promise of bringing down everyday costs — is now barrelling us headfirst into a recession. Republicans in Congress are trying to gut Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. And the Trump administration is chipping away at our rights and freedoms by the day. I’ve been focused on trying to protect our public lands, defend Medicaid, and lower costs for working families, and that’s meant I haven’t been able to meet our fundraising goals — yet. I just got an update from my finance team, and they asked if I could reach out to this team to help us catch up on our end-of-month fundraising goal. Right now, we’re pacing below where we need to be to hit this month’s goal — and it would go a long way if you could help us close the gap. **[I get it. Folks are understandably worried about their budgets right now, so if you’re not able to chip in, that’s OK. But if you are able to, your support will fuel my work to elect leaders at all levels of government who will fight for working families. So if you can, please chip in a donation today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106619466/542095354/-1124870916?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250427_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQ3ZTM2Yi04ZjIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=39c3HFwEtB9IlFf3IouDhkYtQxOcGRHzj_GHc62gvjk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106619467/542095355/-1124870916?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250427_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQ3ZTM2Yi04ZjIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=39c3HFwEtB9IlFf3IouDhkYtQxOcGRHzj_GHc62gvjk=)

clean_body: Team, As you can probably imagine, there’s a lot going on right now. Donald Trump — the same person who was elected on the promise of bringing down everyday costs — is now barrelling us headfirst into a recession. Republicans in Congress are trying to gut Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for billionaires. And the Trump administration is chipping away at our rights and freedoms by the day. I’ve been focused on trying to protect our public lands, defend Medicaid, and lower costs for working families, and that’s meant I haven’t been able to meet our fundraising goals — yet. I just got an update from my finance team, and they asked if I could reach out to this team to help us catch up on our end-of-month fundraising goal. Right now, we’re pacing below where we need to be to hit this month’s goal — and it would go a long way if you could help us close the gap. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Jane Fonda
subject: We don’t have four more years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This is the moment they’ve warned us about.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106619497/542095414/1328794144?refcode=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmMjAwODU2LThmMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUphh7zuilX4COC4itH3_x443g_AHdFrQhl8DjTa-wc=&emci=9434c36e-7d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)
---
At 87, I’ve lived through enough to know when a warning is real. For decades, we’ve been told we have time. That we can deal with the climate crisis in four years, after the next election, or when the right leader comes along. But that’s just not true anymore. **Our planet doesn’t have four more years. The fight is happening right here, right now.** **[That’s why I started JanePAC — to support climate champions who aren’t afraid to take on Big Oil and push for bold, urgent action. And right now, we’ve set a critical goal: $40,000 before the end of the month to help elect leaders who will meet this moment head-on. If you’re able, will you chip in today to help us get there?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106619499/542095416/2105508926?refcode=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmMjAwODU2LThmMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUphh7zuilX4COC4itH3_x443g_AHdFrQhl8DjTa-wc=)** The truth is, we are the first generation to truly feel the impacts of climate change, and the last that still has the power to stop it. Scientists have been clear. If we don’t dramatically cut greenhouse gas emissions soon, we are locking ourselves into a future of irreversible damage. **Now, with Donald Trump back in the picture and the fossil fuel industry cheering him on, the fragile progress we’ve made is on the chopping block.** They’re trying to dismantle every protection we’ve fought for and hand the keys to the polluters — all to pad their profits while our communities pay the price. But it doesn’t have to go that way. **We can change course. We can protect what’s left. But it will take more than hope. It will take determination and people like you stepping up in moments like these when we need you most.** **[So I’m asking one more time because it’s _that_ important: Can I count on you to chip in before April 30th to help us hit our $40,000 goal and show that this movement is ready to meet the urgency of this moment?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106619501/542095418/2105508926?refcode=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmMjAwODU2LThmMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUphh7zuilX4COC4itH3_x443g_AHdFrQhl8DjTa-wc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106619503/542095420/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmMjAwODU2LThmMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUphh7zuilX4COC4itH3_x443g_AHdFrQhl8DjTa-wc=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106619505/542095422/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9f200856-8f23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmMjAwODU2LThmMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUphh7zuilX4COC4itH3_x443g_AHdFrQhl8DjTa-wc=)

clean_body: This is the moment they’ve warned us about. | At 87, I’ve lived through enough to know when a warning is real. For decades, we’ve been told we have time. That we can deal with the climate crisis in four years, after the next election, or when the right leader comes along. But that’s just not true anymore. Our planet doesn’t have four more years. The fight is happening right here, right now. = The truth is, we are the first generation to truly feel the impacts of climate change, and the last that still has the power to stop it. Scientists have been clear. If we don’t dramatically cut greenhouse gas emissions soon, we are locking ourselves into a future of irreversible damage. Now, with Donald Trump back in the picture and the fossil fuel industry cheering him on, the fragile progress we’ve made is on the chopping block. They’re trying to dismantle every protection we’ve fought for and hand the keys to the polluters — all to pad their profits while our communities pay the price. But it doesn’t have to go that way. We can change course. We can protect what’s left. But it will take more than hope. It will take determination and people like you stepping up in moments like these when we need you most. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We’re backing candidates who are brave enough to reject fossil fuel money, who are committed to climate justice, and who are ready to fight like hell for a livable future. Let’s do this. – Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

I was proud of George’s win back in November. He was one of just a handful of Democrats who flipped Republican-held seats in a tough election year.

He did it as a true advocate for our community – as someone who served as NASA Chief of Staff under Obama where he received its highest award for distinguished service. As someone who created hundreds of jobs in the Antelope Valley, founded an organization focused on wildfire research, and did it all as a devoted husband and father.

I’m even more proud of the swift action he’s taken in his first months in the House. Days after he was sworn in, Southern California faced the worst wildfires in its history – and George was immediately back in our area advocating for aid.

Looking forward, this seat is one of the few that can decide House control in next year’s midterm elections – and with it, Democrats are much more likely to win the majority and provide real oversight to this administration.

It’s why George is already on the receiving end of Republican attacks, and why national Democrats have named CA-27 to their Frontline program to help protect the most vulnerable incumbents.

And it’s why Wednesday's monthly deadline is key.

**[I know George would be thrilled to see your donation come through. Will you chip in $3 or any amount you’re comfortable with today to keep him fighting for us in Congress and at home?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106620276/542098237/1606932672?refcode=em-4.27.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTRjODg2ZS05MTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MBY5SJN9lrqAyfChnASiLDp-32P4DUOsX6qIFHB2Qm4=)**

Looking forward, this seat is one of the few that can decide House control in next year’s midterm elections – and with it, Democrats are much more likely to win the majority and provide real oversight to this administration. It’s why George is already on the receiving end of Republican attacks, and why national Democrats have named CA-27 to their Frontline program to help protect the most vulnerable incumbents. And it’s why Wednesday's monthly deadline is key. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Loretta | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: EMILYs List
subject: Staying true to our mission
body:
The last 100 days... |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106620339/542098334/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE463_20250427_FOTLTextLaunch_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055989&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRjODg2ZS05MTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJWBrxXwDQZTqJfcptdJe4XFFfC3Ga-sToa1gyfRaE=) Peter,

In the nearly 100 days since Trump took office, his administration has been characterized by chaos, corruption, and lawlessness.

**But despite Trump's antics, here at EMILYs List, we're holding strong and staying true to our mission.**

In the last 100 days, we've endorsed _24_ Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot to fight back against Trump and his extremist goons. And all across the nation, EMILYs List women in office have been on the frontlines of the charge against Trump.

We need to make sure Democratic pro-choice women have the resources they need to continue fighting – which is why **we've set a goal to raise $125,000 before the end of the month**.

[**So, please, will you donate today – on launch day – to our End-of-Month fund?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106620341/542098336/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE463_20250427_FOTLTextLaunch_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055989&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRjODg2ZS05MTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJWBrxXwDQZTqJfcptdJe4XFFfC3Ga-sToa1gyfRaE=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106620343/542098338/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE463_20250427_FOTLTextLaunch_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055989&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRjODg2ZS05MTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJWBrxXwDQZTqJfcptdJe4XFFfC3Ga-sToa1gyfRaE=)
---
This is the type of work your donation fuels:
* **All five of our sitting attorneys general** joined together to sue the Trump administration after the U.S. Department of Education fired more than 1,300 workers.

* **Rep. Mikie Sherrill**(NJ-GOV) reintroduced the Access to Reproductive Care for Servicemembers Act, which would protect health care access for servicewomen and military families who are stationed in states with abortion bans.

* **Sen. Maria Cantwell**(WA)**** just introduced the Trade Review Act of 2025, to reestablish limits on the president’s ability to impose unilateral tariffs without the approval of Congress.

* **Rep. Yassamin Ansari**(AZ-03) and **Attorney General Kris Mayes**(AZ) held a telephone town hall to talk about the work they’re doing to protect Arizonans from the reckless actions of the Trump administration.

* **State Sen. Ghazala Hashmi**(VA-LG) led the charge to bring back a bill to protect contraception access that was vetoed last year under Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin.

Democratic pro-choice women are shaping the future, and it's our job to ensure they have the resources they need to continue the fight.

[**Donate before midnight Wednesday to help hit our $125,000 End-of-Month goal and help elect more women up and down the ballot:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106620345/542098340/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE463_20250427_FOTLTextLaunch_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055989&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRjODg2ZS05MTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJWBrxXwDQZTqJfcptdJe4XFFfC3Ga-sToa1gyfRaE=)

clean_body: The last 100 days... | = Peter, In the nearly 100 days since Trump took office, his administration has been characterized by chaos, corruption, and lawlessness. But despite Trump's antics, here at EMILYs List, we're holding strong and staying true to our mission. In the last 100 days, we've endorsed 24 Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot to fight back against Trump and his extremist goons. And all across the nation, EMILYs List women in office have been on the frontlines of the charge against Trump. We need to make sure Democratic pro-choice women have the resources they need to continue fighting – which is why we've set a goal to raise $125,000 before the end of the month. = | = This is the type of work your donation fuels: All five of our sitting attorneys general joined together to sue the Trump administration after the U.S. Department of Education fired more than 1,300 workers. Rep. Mikie Sherrill(NJ-GOV) reintroduced the Access to Reproductive Care for Servicemembers Act, which would protect health care access for servicewomen and military families who are stationed in states with abortion bans. Sen. Maria Cantwell(WA) just introduced the Trade Review Act of 2025, to reestablish limits on the president’s ability to impose unilateral tariffs without the approval of Congress. Rep. Yassamin Ansari(AZ-03) and Attorney General Kris Mayes(AZ) held a telephone town hall to talk about the work they’re doing to protect Arizonans from the reckless actions of the Trump administration. State Sen. Ghazala Hashmi**(VA-LG) led the charge to bring back a bill to protect contraception access that was vetoed last year under Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin. Democratic pro-choice women are shaping the future, and it's our job to ensure they have the resources they need to continue the fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. clean_body: | | | Got safe milk? Recent workforce cuts at the FDA have led to the suspension of critical milk quality testing, putting every American at risk. This is not just a bureaucratic oversight; it is a direct assault on the health and safety of families across the nation. Imagine children drinking milk that hasn’t been properly vetted for safety—this is the grim reality we now face. At Able Dems, we are committed to electing Democrats with disabilities and their allies, who understand the critical importance of health protections for all. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. The negligence of these cuts is not just a governmental failure; it is an outright betrayal of public trust. Every glass of milk carries with it potential dangers, lurking unseen, as the safeguards that once protected us have been callously dismantled. Programs that test for bird flu in milk and cheese and pathogens like the parasite Cyclospora have been suspended. This is not just about milk; it’s about a government that no longer prioritizes the well-being of its citizens. We need leaders who will restore and strengthen these essential safeguards, not dismantle them. ** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
