name: Americans for God & Country
subject: We don’t need more godless policies - we need a revival.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Conservative Battleground Fund PAC
body:
Dear fellow patriot,

In times like these, when darkness tries to cloud our great nation, we
must remember the One who holds it all together — _ALMIGHTY GOD
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]_.

_DOES JESUS BELONG IN OUR POLITICS?
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]_

Support Christian, Conservative leadership >>
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]

As we enter into _the Easter season_, we are reminded by the left
trying to push God out of our lives, and their radical views to come
in.
#
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]

Support Christian, Conservative leadership >>
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]

This country was founded on faith, built by men and women who believed
in _GOD, FAMILY, AND FREEDOM
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]_.

We don’t need more godless policies — we need a revival.

_We need leaders who will:_

- Stand for _LIFE_
- Protect the _INNOCENT_
- Protect _GOD_
- Defend our _VALUES_

This is more than politics; it's a spiritual battle. And it’s time
for God-fearing Americans to rise up.

_If you believe that faith still matters in our nation and that God
should be at the center of our laws, homes, and hearts, then stand
with us.
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]_
#
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]

Support Christian, Conservative leadership >>
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]

Together, we can restore this nation under God — one prayer, one
vote, and one bold stand at a time.

God bless you.
[https://secure.winred.com/conservative-battleground-fund/christ-in-politics-email-mc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=rs_mc&utm_campaign=20250418_christ-in-politics-email_generic_cbf&utm_content=poll_cpycg_na&utm_term=lrm-active]

And it’s time for God-fearing Americans to rise up. If you believe that faith still matters in our nation and that God should be at the center of our laws, homes, and hearts, then stand with us. [] [] Support Christian, Conservative leadership >> [] Together, we can restore this nation under God — one prayer, one vote, and one bold stand at a time. God bless you. [] God bless America. | | We promised to keep you updated on this race, Team,**** so here's the latest: After incumbent Justice Allison Riggs appealed a ruling to cure or discard 60,000 valid votes, **a federal appeals court blocked the partisan North Carolina attempt to silence these voters**. A George W. Bush-appointed and a Biden-appointed judge placed a hold on the cure process, with a Trump-appointed judge dissenting. **The backstory:** After the 2024 election, the**** North Carolina state supreme court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties. Back on Election Day 2024, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- _both of which increased Riggs' lead._ After months of legal wrangling, the North Carolina Court of Appeals ruled in Griffin’s favor, deciding that 60,000 ballots in four heavily democratic counties must be recounted and verified. The ruling states that all 60,000 people must be notified and given 15 business days to provide proof of identity, or their vote will be thrown out. **This ruling would have disenfranchised tens of thousands of people without showing any proof that any of these voters are actually ineligible.** [**We must keep the pressure up to stop this post-election interference with legitimate votes. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and make these ballots count in North Carolina and stop suppression across the country >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106621040/542100655/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=N8XqwbMKwGYSnFZx6Dd1NaXEoGqLmNIdRhtDUroWfZmraK+HjbvpN0h/1kUyAZ7J1Qyw3XAbhPcRn3xuUkqmtedpTzrJaXikjJQga49tebw=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkYjY2ZjQ1LTkyMjMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5i_RY6o3L9VeoyIRlMwChSnI6IqkxrBIWDftq698MM4=&emci=cedab222-0023-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=8db66f45-9223-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=33603084)

clean_body: Popular Information: The five-month campaign to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat| | | | | | | We promised to keep you updated on this race, Team,** so here's the latest: After incumbent Justice Allison Riggs appealed a ruling to cure or discard 60,000 valid votes, a federal appeals court blocked the partisan North Carolina attempt to silence these voters. A George W. Bush-appointed and a Biden-appointed judge placed a hold on the cure process, with a Trump-appointed judge dissenting. The backstory: After the 2024 election, the North Carolina state supreme court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties. Back on Election Day 2024, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead. After months of legal wrangling, the North Carolina Court of Appeals ruled in Griffin’s favor, deciding that 60,000 ballots in four heavily democratic counties must be recounted and verified. The ruling states that all 60,000 people must be notified and given 15 business days to provide proof of identity, or their vote will be thrown out. This ruling would have disenfranchised tens of thousands of people without showing any proof that any of these voters are actually ineligible. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | What's really at stake here? If Judge Griffin's campaign thought the registration process was legally flawed, he should have challenged it before the election.** He also should have challenged the process in every county, not just four that don't align with his political party. This is a blatant attempt to change the rules just because he lost. And his partisan cronies are going along with it to protect their power and their majority on the state supreme court.On the plus side, this week a three-judge panel in another North Carolina court blocked a partisan scheme for opponents of voting rights to gain power over the state’s election board — the agency charged with running elections and enforcing campaign finance laws. Opponents of voting rights are blatantly trying to steal this judicial election in plain sight. And you can bet they're going to try to do it in the 49 other states once they get away with it here. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. | _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e08122a9b5&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=eeb0bde7d8&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a0accd2c65&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2e74d207fe&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=60d24ec89c&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=134a72082a&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

name: Cliff Schecter with Blue Amp
subject: Hey, Journalists? Don't Ask the White House Whether Sh*t's Legal
body:
So-called journalists are asking Trump loyalists whether Trump can do crimes

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.v6rAfPRMDl621wkZOrSnRTCdb3Cd69QCMMqTfm5vO4Q?) for more

# [Hey, Journalists? Don't Ask the White House Whether Sh*t's Legal](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=162272836&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMjcyODM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDU3Nzc3NTEsImV4cCI6MTc0ODM2OTc1MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dcO3qKUE2zZe-bdN0QVTmN43oAY1tu97LYlZGaYSqNo)
### So-called journalists are asking Trump loyalists whether Trump can do crimes
| | [Jonathan Larsen](https://substack.com/@jonathanlarsen)
---
| Apr 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jonathanlarsen)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=162272836&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMjcyODM2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NTc3Nzc1MSwiZXhwIjoxNzQ4MzY5NzUxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BrhjL9EY2FzvwKhIvbHyP4njflk2ucVTaYdc_1N8NpA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=162272836&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMjcyODM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDU3Nzc3NTEsImV4cCI6MTc0ODM2OTc1MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dcO3qKUE2zZe-bdN0QVTmN43oAY1tu97LYlZGaYSqNo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=162272836&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMjcyODM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDU3Nzc3NTEsImV4cCI6MTc0ODM2OTc1MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dcO3qKUE2zZe-bdN0QVTmN43oAY1tu97LYlZGaYSqNo)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvYmx1ZWFtcC9wL2hleS1qb3VybmFsaXN0cy1kb250LWFzay10aGUtd2hpdGU_.4fbD1nriL0HEGiHLY_ZTdgNolUeRm11eZDoLjVVpuo8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/hey-journalists-dont-ask-the-white?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

_This guest column originally[ appeared](https://substack.com/redirect/6f770ffe-1bdb-4d6e-b1d5-15baf59751c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the Substack of journalist Jonathan Larsen, a veteran of ABC, CNN, and MSNBC, who served as executive producer of Up with Chris Hayes. You can check out and subscribe to Jonathan's Substack [here](https://substack.com/redirect/11cbb083-8647-436f-9861-159bff4b1741?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9c5bbe3b-26b7-4500-8343-c17e36bfcead?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Fox's Peter Doocy, left, and Fox's Karoline Leavitt, right, discussing matters of law in the White House on April 15, 2025. (Screengrab / Twitter [video](https://substack.com/redirect/7a619a3c-2248-4cb7-9d68-88a98718034a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
When alleged journalists for multi-million-dollar media outlets want to know whether something is legal, they have many resources.
The world's best experts will take their calls and give them answers. For free!
Lawyers employed by said outlets will advise allegedly journalistic colleagues on legal matters. The alleged journalists can also deploy researchers and other staff to do research and other stuff to crack their legal nuts. The internet has law books and Constitutions.
What real journalists do not __ do is pose their legal puzzlers [to the potential criminals fixin' to break said laws](https://substack.com/redirect/95bc33b7-cf14-40dd-9215-fde0384d84fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And yet, there was Fox's **Peter Doocy** -- alleged JournalistTM -- asking the White House whether it's _legal_ for the United States government to kidnap American citizens and have them imprisoned outside their country, deprived of their constitutional rights.
Last week, on April 15, Doocy had this exchange with Press Secretary **Karoline Leavitt** :
> > **Doocy:** [D]eporting American citizens to Central American prisons -- Is it legal or do you need to change the law to do it?
>> **Leavitt:** Well, it's another question that the president has raised. It's a legal question that the president is looking into.
Innocuous as that exchange might seem, it's actually occuous AF. Would one ask the White House whether crossing against the light is legal? One would fucking not. But let's review why this is so much stupider and worser.
1. The White House cannot change laws without Congress.
2. As noted, Doocy has many resources for finding out whether it's legal.
3. The White House is not an authority on the law.
4. Another reason that I'll get to. #Tease #NoSpoilers
5. And finally, the White House had _already_ been asked about this, which raises some questions so high up that they're fucked up.

`Independent Media For Just $1.50/Week!`
**Blue Amp just launched our weekly show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter!!" To celebrate, we're offering paid subscriptions for only $1.50 per week! **_**Amplify Good**_**, become a paid subscriber!**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._3RsToordFyzbQsIqEdO16iygo8YqSkxFPRiLw3zYEE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162272836)
On April 6, _two weeks ago_ , another alleged journalist[1](https://substack.com/redirect/3144af96-cf6c-45df-8cd5-9a977dc39942?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [asked](https://substack.com/redirect/8575c516-f992-45ce-abef-e38ad6138f6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump himself about El Salvadoran President **Nayib Bukele** 's offer to [abet heinous crimes against the American people by imprisoning them in his prisons](https://substack.com/redirect/a5cce5f3-c63c-4f77-b53b-5b14fc72768b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> > **Q:** ...is that one of the ideas you're gonna be discussing?
>> **Trump:** Well, I love that... [inflammatory fear-mongering belied by America's near-historically low crime rates] ... I don't know what the law says on that, but I can't imagine the law would say anything different... I'd be very happy with it, but I have to see what the law says.
It's a mystery! Even two days later, April 8, when Leavitt [told](https://substack.com/redirect/311e961b-5aa0-4e4a-918a-fcef901cefd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) alleged journalists -- possibly even Doocy! -- that the idea had been discussed privately, too.
> > **Q from alleged journalist I didn 't recognize:** ...President Trump said that he would be willing to have US citizens deported to El Salvador with the cooperation of President Bukele. How would that work legally [sic] and how many people would potentially be available for that [illegal] operation?
>> **Leavitt:** So, the president has discussed this idea quite a few times publicly, he's also discussed it[2](https://substack.com/redirect/a02cdd48-38cc-4420-804e-44386dbd9323?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) privately. You're referring to the president's idea for American citizens to potentially be deported.... [Inflammatory fear-mongering] The president has said if it's legal, right, if there is a legal pathway to do that. He's not sure, we are not sure if there is. It's an idea that he has simply floated and has discussed very publicly as -- in the effort of transparency.
The effort may be of transparency but the effect -- abetted by alleged journalists -- is of not transparency. The transparent answer would be, "Of course it's a crime for anyone to do that."
On April 14, Trump said he'd discussed it with Attorney General **Pam Bondi** -- who is the nation's top law-enforcement official the way the top military official is **Pete Hegseth**. On the subject of -- and **TFN** can't stress this enough -- _exiling Americans_ , Trump said, "I said it to Pam. I don't know what the laws are."
_After_ discussing it with the attorney general, he still couldn't pin down whether it's a crime!
That night, on Fox -- alleged journalist Doocy's own alleged news outlet! -- not-even-alleged-journalist **Jesse Watters** [asked](https://substack.com/redirect/6e9b838b-5d4d-40c3-9017-231b90fd0433?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Bondi herself about exiling Americans to foreign prisons: "Is that legal to do? Is that something you're allowed to do?"
Bondi made face noises, but no actual, responsive answer emerged, because that would mean saying, "Fuck no," which would represent a _real_ effort of transparency.
To recap, Bondi had no answer on April 14, more than a week after her boss said publicly that he'd like to know and almost a week after the White House press secretary said it had been discussed internally by the administration.
This is a presidential administration refusing to admit a clear, precedented, obvious-to-idiots limit on presidential power. Maybe that's because they just don't like admitting that. Or maybe it's because Trump's desire to do it is best served by pretending it's an open question.
The point is, _all of that_ had already transpired when Doocy raised the question yet again. And Leavitt would have us believe the U.S. government, which employs more than three lawyers, had _still_ not been able to explain to the president -- who swore to uphold the Constitution! -- that he _can 't _uphold it outside U.S. borders.
Reason #4 for crapping on Doocy's question is that asking questions at the White House briefing is not an innocent exercise. Most of those alleged journalists can ask questions off-camera by phone or email. Asking at the briefing is a _choice_ about what to put on the national radar.
And doing _that_ gets your issue -- or in this case a fake debate -- in other media. And they, too, will treat your question as if it _is_ a question. And that's what's happening here.
For instance, some people only saw Bloomberg's [headline](https://substack.com/redirect/890ee8ae-73fb-4698-bff0-8f94c0344461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "Can Trump Really Deport US Citizens to El Salvador?" They might not have made it to the last sentence in paragraph seven: "Many legal experts already have an answer: No."
That was your headline, Bloomberg kids!
And almost immediately after the exchange with Doocy, Leavitt's ~~answer~~ response was a CNBC [headline](https://substack.com/redirect/41a29835-da53-448a-9354-9e270fb9caab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d8e7c4ab-e0ff-43ea-8060-460523fb083e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's neurally impossible to read that headline and not infer that the legality of this crime is a legitimate question. Which it's not.
And CNBC would _know_ that if CNBC could see _N_ BC. That's because, the day _before_ CNBC's questionable headline, NBC [headlined](https://substack.com/redirect/9bc7a7f2-f93f-423d-9e3c-6fee4191a0e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the fucking answer:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7735b7a2-2f6e-4958-a18a-245a1881ecf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But some people won't C NBC's headline, they'll only C CNBC's headline.
And in the process, non-journalists, alleged journalists, and even ostensibly real journalists will be complicit in creating -- already _have_ fucking created -- muddiness around this issue. And it's the muddiness that creates the political space to commit this crime and defend it as not-a-crime.
This was a crystal-clear answer and non-existent debate in America last month and in the country's preceding 2,817 months: [No, you can't kidnap American citizens and send them to foreign countries](https://substack.com/redirect/12211e11-c734-4c52-89f3-0a88b8df3969?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
That shouldn't be news. But now it'd really help if it were.
* * *
`Independent Media For Just $1.50/Week!`
**Blue Amp just launched our weekly show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter." To celebrate, we're offering paid subscriptions for only $1.50 per week! **_**Amplify Good**_**, become a paid subscriber!**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._3RsToordFyzbQsIqEdO16iygo8YqSkxFPRiLw3zYEE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162272836)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9d284597-adba-4794-ac40-8c30ac843723?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Since you stuck around, a quick historical footnote because [I always try to flag when things did ](https://substack.com/redirect/254bb6b3-7671-46bd-bf76-dad72931cf4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[not](https://substack.com/redirect/254bb6b3-7671-46bd-bf76-dad72931cf4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[start with Trump, because he is not the wellspring from which all evil hath sprung](https://substack.com/redirect/254bb6b3-7671-46bd-bf76-dad72931cf4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
There is, sadly, a bipartisan history of even legitimate journalists asking administrations of both parties to decide legal questions despite the proven existence of judges and law books.
#### **Pres. Bush**
**Dec. 16, 2005:** Alleged journalist [asks](https://substack.com/redirect/ba080676-c8d7-4e85-a340-fcb4fbcaeb2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the White House, "Is it legal to spy on Americans?" (In fairness, this was part of an exchange in which the intent seemed to be pressing the White House to assert that its unknown spying was legal.)
**Dec. 9, 2008:** Fox's **Chris Wallace** [asks](https://substack.com/redirect/0ba87b84-8f56-40fd-a91e-3b0a65508291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Vice President **Dick Cheney** , "If the President, during war, decides to do something to protect the country, is it legal?" (Cheney unsurprisingly this this sounds like an okay idea and ~~enhanced interrogates~~ tortures the oath of office to interpret swearing to protect the Constitution as swearing to protect the country despite those being two different things.)
#### **Pres. Obama**
**May 21, 2009:** Alleged journalist [asks](https://substack.com/redirect/3b7ff8f7-d8aa-42c1-91ae-c63e8ae36210?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the White House, "[I]s it legal to put people who the President might put in indefinite detention in any facility in the United States?" Presidents, legal scholars tell us, should not be in the practice of putting people in anything.
**April 23, 2015:** Alleged journalist [asks](https://substack.com/redirect/69aef62c-ed84-46e8-b46f-65b8be2b9a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) whether Pres. **Barack Obama** can straight-up kill U.S. citizens, because it's a mystery: "[I]s it legal to kill American citizens who do not represent an imminent threat of violent attack against the United States?
**Nov. 19, 2015:** Alleged journalist [asks](https://substack.com/redirect/0c30f9ab-8b2c-47a2-8b06-e67aa0a3754d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Deputy National Security Advisor **Ben Rhodes** about the U.S. being at war with ISIL (aka ISIS): "Is that legal if Congress doesn't have a say in this?" (The Constitution requires congressional authorization for waging war with the standing army the founders didn't want us to have.)
#### **Pres. Trump (Take One)**
**Sept. 16, 2019:** In [this exchange](https://substack.com/redirect/ee18740c-77d2-4a9a-979c-e69108967d5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Trump gives the best answer of any president or executive-branch official **I** found:
> > **Q:** Mr. President, is it legal for the New York attorney general to subpoena your accountant?
>> **Trump:** I don't know anything about it.
#### **Pres. Biden**
**Sept. 3, 2021:** In regard to federal actions to help women get abortions, an alleged journalist [asks](https://substack.com/redirect/3393ad26-8041-4f30-94e1-5514c5a46a04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "Does that mean providing transportation for people? What does it -- I still don't understand. Is it legal? Is it just -- do we know the law?" It's not clear who "we" was or why "they" didn't look it up beforehand.
**Oct. 7, 2021:** Alleged journalist committed to protecting the downtrodden [asks](https://substack.com/redirect/af7844b0-ed39-46fa-8ec6-5a37fd1a3b09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) future alleged journalist **Jen Psaki** about the uptrodden: "Is the White House confident that a billionaires' tax would withstand legal challenges? Which, I guess, is another way of asking, is it legal?"
In fairness, some of these examples are really shorthand for, "Do you honestly think you can do that?" But more than most alleged journalists, alleged White House correspondents have an obligation _not_ to muddy the waters with on-camera questions.
They also have an obligation to know the _facts_ before they get on camera. Because the legal question about kidnapping and exiling U.S. citizens ought not be whether it's legal, but whether officials who authorize it are prepared to go to prison themselves someday, right here at home.
* * *
**Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders **_**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought; [We Need Your Support.](https://substack.com/redirect/29a5b120-5749-4e94-a5fb-e28ef5af1c0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[Please become a paid subscriber](https://substack.com/redirect/29a5b120-5749-4e94-a5fb-e28ef5af1c0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!**_
You're currently a free subscriber to [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/redirect/cddac0f4-fcd0-4681-aa9d-eb817b5b1ab6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._3RsToordFyzbQsIqEdO16iygo8YqSkxFPRiLw3zYEE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

So-called journalists are asking Trump loyalists whether Trump can do crimes | | | Apr 27 | | | | | | | | | | | | This guest column originally at the Substack of journalist Jonathan Larsen, a veteran of ABC, CNN, and MSNBC, who served as executive producer of Up with Chris Hayes. You can check out and subscribe to Jonathan's Substack | | ---|---|--- Fox's Peter Doocy, left, and Fox's Karoline Leavitt, right, discussing matters of law in the White House on April 15, 2025. (Screengrab / Twitter .) When alleged journalists for multi-million-dollar media outlets want to know whether something is legal, they have many resources. The world's best experts will take their calls and give them answers. For free! Lawyers employed by said outlets will advise allegedly journalistic colleagues on legal matters. The alleged journalists can also deploy researchers and other staff to do research and other stuff to crack their legal nuts. The internet has law books and Constitutions. What real journalists do not do is pose their legal puzzlers . And yet, there was Fox's Peter Doocy -- alleged JournalistTM -- asking the White House whether it's legal for the United States government to kidnap American citizens and have them imprisoned outside their country, deprived of their constitutional rights. Last week, on April 15, Doocy had this exchange with Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt : > Doocy: [D]eporting American citizens to Central American prisons -- Is it legal or do you need to change the law to do it? > Leavitt: Well, it's another question that the president has raised. It's a legal question that the president is looking into. Innocuous as that exchange might seem, it's actually occuous AF. Would one ask the White House whether crossing against the light is legal? One would fucking not. But let's review why this is so much stupider and worser. 1. The White House cannot change laws without Congress. 2. As noted, Doocy has many resources for finding out whether it's legal. 3. The White House is not an authority on the law. 4. Another reason that I'll get to. #Tease #NoSpoilers 5. And finally, the White House had already been asked about this, which raises some questions so high up that they're fucked up. `Independent Media For Just $1.50/Week!` Blue Amp just launched our weekly show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter!!" To celebrate, we're offering paid subscriptions for only $1.50 per week! Amplify Good, become a paid subscriber! On April 6, two weeks ago , another alleged journalist Trump himself about El Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele 's offer to : > Q: ...is that one of the ideas you're gonna be discussing? > Trump: Well, I love that... [inflammatory fear-mongering belied by America's near-historically low crime rates] ... I don't know what the law says on that, but I can't imagine the law would say anything different... I'd be very happy with it, but I have to see what the law says. It's a mystery! Even two days later, April 8, when Leavitt alleged journalists -- possibly even Doocy! -- that the idea had been discussed privately, too. > Q from alleged journalist I didn 't recognize: ...President Trump said that he would be willing to have US citizens deported to El Salvador with the cooperation of President Bukele. How would that work legally [sic] and how many people would potentially be available for that [illegal] operation? > Leavitt: So, the president has discussed this idea quite a few times publicly, he's also discussed it privately. You're referring to the president's idea for American citizens to potentially be deported.... [Inflammatory fear-mongering] The president has said if it's legal, right, if there is a legal pathway to do that. He's not sure, we are not sure if there is. It's an idea that he has simply floated and has discussed very publicly as -- in the effort of transparency. The effort may be of transparency but the effect -- abetted by alleged journalists -- is of not transparency. The transparent answer would be, "Of course it's a crime for anyone to do that." On April 14, Trump said he'd discussed it with Attorney General Pam Bondi -- who is the nation's top law-enforcement official the way the top military official is Pete Hegseth. On the subject of -- and TFN can't stress this enough -- exiling Americans , Trump said, "I said it to Pam. I don't know what the laws are." After discussing it with the attorney general, he still couldn't pin down whether it's a crime! That night, on Fox -- alleged journalist Doocy's own alleged news outlet! -- not-even-alleged-journalist Jesse Watters Bondi herself about exiling Americans to foreign prisons: "Is that legal to do? Is that something you're allowed to do?" Bondi made face noises, but no actual, responsive answer emerged, because that would mean saying, "Fuck no," which would represent a real effort of transparency. To recap, Bondi had no answer on April 14, more than a week after her boss said publicly that he'd like to know and almost a week after the White House press secretary said it had been discussed internally by the administration. This is a presidential administration refusing to admit a clear, precedented, obvious-to-idiots limit on presidential power. Maybe that's because they just don't like admitting that. Or maybe it's because Trump's desire to do it is best served by pretending it's an open question. The point is, all of that had already transpired when Doocy raised the question yet again. And Leavitt would have us believe the U.S. government, which employs more than three lawyers, had still not been able to explain to the president -- who swore to uphold the Constitution! -- that he can 't uphold it outside U.S. borders. Reason #4 for crapping on Doocy's question is that asking questions at the White House briefing is not an innocent exercise. Most of those alleged journalists can ask questions off-camera by phone or email. Asking at the briefing is a choice about what to put on the national radar. And doing that gets your issue -- or in this case a fake debate -- in other media. And they, too, will treat your question as if it is a question. And that's what's happening here. For instance, some people only saw Bloomberg's , "Can Trump Really Deport US Citizens to El Salvador?" They might not have made it to the last sentence in paragraph seven: "Many legal experts already have an answer: No." That was your headline, Bloomberg kids! And almost immediately after the exchange with Doocy, Leavitt's ~~answer~~ response was a CNBC : | | ---|---|--- It's neurally impossible to read that headline and not infer that the legality of this crime is a legitimate question. Peter, On Tuesday, Dan held a town hall in NY-10 to hear from his constituents — many of whom are anxious, worried and scared about what assault on our government and our rights is coming next. While Republicans are hiding behind ritzy fundraisers at gated golf clubs and dodging tough questions, Dan is doing what leaders _should_ do: answering directly to the people he serves. No scripts. No filters. Just real answers to real concerns — including how we hold Elon Musk and Donald Trump accountable for their dangerous overreach. Let’s be clear: Musk is **not** an elected official. He’s a billionaire with too much power, too few boundaries, and zero accountability. And while he’s busy dodging interviews and manipulating online platforms, Dan is in the room with his constituents, doing the work. **[If you want more of that — _more transparency, more courage, more truth_ — we need to keep Dan in Congress leading the fight against Trump and Musk’s corruption. clean_body: | Peter, On Tuesday, Dan held a town hall in NY-10 to hear from his constituents — many of whom are anxious, worried and scared about what assault on our government and our rights is coming next. While Republicans are hiding behind ritzy fundraisers at gated golf clubs and dodging tough questions, Dan is doing what leaders should do: answering directly to the people he serves. No scripts. No filters. Just real answers to real concerns — including how we hold Elon Musk and Donald Trump accountable for their dangerous overreach. Let’s be clear: Musk is not an elected official. He’s a billionaire with too much power, too few boundaries, and zero accountability. name: Al Franken
subject: I want to tell you about someone who’s unbelievably great.
body:
| |
---
While Republicans are hiding from their constituents, Peggy is doing the opposite. She’s traveling the state hosting ‘Kitchen Table Conversations’ — actually listening to real Minnesotans, having real conversations, and working to bring people together. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzA0ODk3MzE1LFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiYWJlYThhMmFiN2M5ZGRmYSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzEyMjM3MzUxLFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiZDFhNjM1OGZhZGEzZDg5MiJ9)
---
|
Team,

I want to tell you about someone who’s unbelievably great. Someone who understands what’s at stake in this moment, who listens, who leads, and who embodies the values that make Minnesota, well, _Minnesotan_. That person is Peggy Flanagan. And she’s running to represent us in the U.S. Senate.

---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzE2NDMxNjU3LFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiZTQzZjdkMmU5MjkwMDRiNSJ9)
---
|
I’ve known Peggy for a long time. We both grew up in St. Louis Park (not at the same time — she’s young, and I’m old). Raised by a single mom, Peggy knows the impact of federal programs that help working families. They had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher. Other public programs helped her mom afford health insurance and child care. **She gets it because she’s lived it.** And that’s exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington. (And frankly, what we have way to little of.)

---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzIwNjI1OTY0LFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiNTJjNTJhNGUyMjJkMWMxMCJ9)
---
|
Peggy’s got the experience, too. She’s currently serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor — the highest-ranking Native American woman ever elected to executive office in the U.S. Before that, she was a state legislator, a school board member, an executive director for the Children’s Defense Fund–Minnesota, she even worked for ME!

But most importantly — she worked for my friend and hero, the late Senator Paul Wellstone. She and I both believe in his guiding principle: We all do better when we all do better. (Yes, it’s that simple. No, Republicans still don’t get it.)

While Republicans are hiding from their constituents, Peggy is doing the opposite. She’s traveling the state hosting ‘Kitchen Table Conversations’ — actually listening to real Minnesotans, having real conversations, and working to bring people together. She doesn't just want to fight against bad stuff. She wants to build something, too.

Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. It’s about time. She is Ojibwe and a member of White Earth, and her Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’ If there’s one thing I know about Peggy, it’s that she’ll use that voice to fight for all Minnesotans — whether they agree with her or not.**[

](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzI0ODIwMjcxLFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiMzBjZTYwYjk2ZjFhZDViMCJ9)[So let’s make it happen. Split a donation with National Ground Game PAC today, and help send Peggy Flanagan to the Senate, where she’ll keep speaking up, fighting hard, and making sure we all have a good hotdish recipe.
](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzMwMDYzMTUzLFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiYzczYmI1Yjg3YmI4MWRlZCJ9)**

---
| _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
|
---
| | | [ Donate $5 ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzM0MjU3NDYwLFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiYjU1YjhkMzVjZDI4N2IxMiJ9)

---
|
---

---
| | | [ Donate $50 ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzQ2ODQwMzgxLFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiMzZhZDY4ZDlhNjNhYzcxMyJ9)
---
|
---
| | | [ Donate $100 ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzUxMDM0Njg4LFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiZmJhM2Y3OGEyYTdiMDhhOCJ9)
---
| | | [ Donate other ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzU2Mjc3NTcwLFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiZGRjZjM3ODBlZDUwMzFhNyJ9)
---
|
---
Al **P.S.** I could go on and on about how great Peggy is. But instead, let me share a quick story from my first Senate campaign in 2008. Peggy was an organizer working with Native American communities and my advisor on Indian Affairs, and she told me if I went to the powwow at Red Lake, I should NOT dance. Good advice. But then a young man invited me to join in. So, I addressed the crowd and said, “Only if you don’t make fun of me after I leave.” They laughed and agreed, I danced, and a woman danced up to me and said, “You dance like a white guy.” I reminded her of the conditions of my dancing — to which she replied, “You said _after_ you leave.” That was my first lesson in Ojibwe humor.
|
---
| | [ DONATE ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyODU5NTY5MzYxNTIwNDUyLFwiclwiOjE1Mjg1OTU4OTIxOTQ1Mjg4NH0iLCJzIjoiMTMyOTg1NWZlOTZjMTMxNSJ9)

name: Val Hoyle
subject: What I heard from folks across the state:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106621919/542103775/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQ3MWNjMy05NTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MVDDY4P80LpwmiyyxTeY5DZrFi9jNeQ4iJP6cMgrVa0=&emci=f7092129-3921-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=79471cc3-9523-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – Last week, I joined Sen. Jeff Merkley for town hall events across the state – with hundreds of Oregonians turning up to make their voices heard. Through stops in Coos, Curry, and Douglas counties, folks were enthused, passionate, and rightly, mad. **Just about everyone is worried about how Trump's shaky economy will affect their livelihoods.** Fishers are extremely concerned about tariffs that will affect their bottom line. Consumers are facing increased prices for everyday goods and groceries. Many workers are suddenly feeling like their jobs are less secure than they were before. Some Republicans in Congress are running scared from town halls, thinking they can slide into re-election without much to show for their time in Congress. **This time is different.** **For my entire career – as a State Representative, as the state Labor Commissioner, and now as a Congresswoman – I've been trying to make life easier for working families.** I've stood my ground and not wavered on my principles. I will never run away from tough conversations with my colleagues or my constituents. What I heard from folks across the state confirmed that they want to ensure they can take care of their families, save for the future, and depend upon things like Social Security, Medicare, or even just the Post Office, when they need them. I've been uplifted by the folks I spoke to last week and the peaceful demonstrations across the country earlier this month. Americans are scared of the direction we're heading, and they didn't vote for economic instability or Trump's authoritarian gestures. clean_body: | | | | Peter – Last week, I joined Sen. Jeff Merkley for town hall events across the state – with hundreds of Oregonians turning up to make their voices heard. Through stops in Coos, Curry, and Douglas counties, folks were enthused, passionate, and rightly, mad. Just about everyone is worried about how Trump's shaky economy will affect their livelihoods. Fishers are extremely concerned about tariffs that will affect their bottom line. Consumers are facing increased prices for everyday goods and groceries. Many workers are suddenly feeling like their jobs are less secure than they were before. Some Republicans in Congress are running scared from town halls, thinking they can slide into re-election without much to show for their time in Congress. This time is different. For my entire career – as a State Representative, as the state Labor Commissioner, and now as a Congresswoman – I've been trying to make life easier for working families. I've stood my ground and not wavered on my principles. I will never run away from tough conversations with my colleagues or my constituents. What I heard from folks across the state confirmed that they want to ensure they can take care of their families, save for the future, and depend upon things like Social Security, Medicare, or even just the Post Office, when they need them. I've been uplifted by the folks I spoke to last week and the peaceful demonstrations across the country earlier this month. Americans are scared of the direction we're heading, and they didn't vote for economic instability or Trump's authoritarian gestures. = = Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. clean_body: Sign the petition to stop the Left from turning America into a sanctuary for criminals. | Peter, We're OUTRAGED, and you should be too. Maryland’s radical Senator Chris Van Hollen just stooped to an unthinkable low: jetting off to El Salvador to sip margaritas with Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a known MS-13 gang member who's been terrorizing American streets.This isn't just disgraceful --it's a betrayal of every law-abiding citizen. While you're working hard to protect your family, Van Hollen is off in Central America, cozying up to a tattooed thug tied to a brutal cartel known for murder, drug trafficking, and unspeakable violence. Garcia isn't some “misunderstood immigrant”--he’s a stone-cold predator who was rightfully deported under President Trump to keep our communities safe. But Van Hollen? He thinks he knows better than our brave ICE agents and our Commander-in-Chief. Let's be clear: this isn't about “due process.” It's about pandering to the open-borders mob and coddling criminals--all while spitting in the face of every American who believes in law and order. Instead of standing with the victims of MS-13's brutality, Van Hollen is posing for photo ops with a gangster in a San Salvador hotel. Margaritas, Chris? Really? Try facing the families torn apart by machetes instead of clinking glasses with their attackers. We've had ENOUGH of Van Hollen's anti-American antics. He's not just embarrassing Maryland--he's endangering our nation by defending a terrorist over American citizens. The NRSC is fighting tooth and nail to PROTECT and EXPAND our Senate majority in 2026 from woke radicals like him -- Here's what we're demanding: He must apologize for siding with an MS-13 thug over American safety. Garcia belongs in a Salvadoran prison—not back on U.S. soil. deserve Senators who put AMERICANS FIRST. Here's what we ask of you: AND For America, Team NRSC P.S. body:
[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/aA3Q54eSIfd8KrZUU2xoxpf4MP9F3h30RjR7ZqjKmwM7_NKTEs4R2OjVu_w1cmVYxgEOmnYidyhtvIsXq0ArVEvYZMyZTcqjurP0FA3ZN9M-hdMBnFgM9SCPzrxJqUNCpG1Fu8OVr5Kj5j07uxpEQWEf5M2o72Y7Ex4HI7YpY_SwfVWnvSwgBYs1Lau6aNKh1e3-t9H--dwWn6nkOA-cuDZTV5FFulQdiyuN6pkp1QpxmUZmZw69J-D19bx9nYsQCGsayjPq7dpQhvVMFIZBND7Q_yjxwdrIL_-191ACQpLC155vqCMwnjafXcoNO0eN1hsEdesRocJKAs135JSwkMoQLsEI20kZYanmwrpzadSTGVuksKoSu924tfmT05MnRrSSlpjl9hURNDp2Co4-bQYuKkj78pcieqQ-JPm16NMcUy3nPg88btHp6TAC1XebLSI_SLVxx9YSF9l_N3h5O6pGNk2jUZQtzAJlD9tNG4kOdNGQ_d9knzn1Bl6RDQ4fTcbE/GLrLGnWd-rzOxqxHmTvREWYjOKWyB2uV/8)Hey, it's Vivek:
I need your help. This mission to revive American greatness can't be accomplished with money alone. **It requires a movement - an army of patriotic Americans who are ready to take a stand and say "ENOUGH" to Big Government.******Here's what we're going to do:
* Cut red tape
* Slash taxes
* Empower families
* Unleash innovation
* And put you, the citizen, back in charge

I'm not running to control you - I'm running to set you free.
And now I'm asking you to take one small step with me: [Chip in $1 today.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/DyQoc2LXBKYX2YAVTZdGtapJUQB0NiD-oDX0ymTIp_UAy5VHcn2c3uyl2wG4vCRJ-Dvzvam3WML1AZgO-dkA1O84_Nl9LlwCegBT-1SD9gcuayVqz_Hz3ZXwHzbRVU151yZWGE1WqP180fN5cwPUiZgglJn7jrO6QnwyuL4iN8Y-LRSbHJLc5cnuaf0XwwmiTHFYaOiD3rai_kd7hW3F_cRfYIcU3szRePR1S1bZP6TdXKoBuvKpa_-dxeSf7IN2WbSrwW1mEyb_bhVBhzgT9fA0L6fN5kwvloSfUvJRImDfiiOyFHF6-H0XfyuPmOhQ8HmIp4xY44MtNvckCiAEyPS6uA9LIodZt5EXzyASqD2tRepIrFm4gi-G0BGPNISSHUF3pWK62kCl5rdIpFZM7TSzUf9QB2lxKMPsPQ7HqyMd6me-p5ii7uCSnXj378cLri3CeTddn1l15MU62cQki327_tKpauzOOxB97a8KGqVVr5C5ntbgwcM4Z4S44KCgl7DP/T4vyGER7xPd0kYOVfV6tFkNLo2n3ifWF/8)** **
Yes - just a buck.

name: George Latimer
subject: I won’t stand by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=aSHW7w9pOk4YYk1jWyF%2Bl6rAGISbR0VRmJKcA5LsGoesavVz6O%2FZJj7BulQYHCORKbF%2BqL7KOF1j%2FaEo8U6wufDdB10OVI%2FxpKjuHi1ceaUORbilu0FkCn1HyKou7YCI95cSvnmOVbX6J2rO4GSfmyhRNtFoKv0ITBxwaTZx2Z4GwOudrVDBNLvl9kBqriJ1vA83PcrMnDMeghAHmE1aRLZ%2ByEs8U6BSSxTsytnv0gEVQY9bisnlPSlGAKtQ97hBsifVdwr5mUvseRPNGf87xjjoUKoO7pHhestsotQwTfKyXzKVpvKkJI%2FItSbI8ynqUUgwOKN4LGXPP73hqPoHxDxF4L10The1vF52UAJeMhTSzkhfzuGvc0CS4VXhNq%2B7X3fr42ItipCHC0it8JuOFYMVK%2FLfcIzu4QAERPKJ1LkjIAErk2wLG3BV%2FzrUKReH)
---
| |
---
Peter, As we approach Trump’s 100th day in office, I know that we’re all feeling quite a bit of stress and uncertainty. Last November, we knew that we were heading into another four years of chaos and extremism. **But what we’ve seen from Donald Trump in these first 100 days is nothing short of disastrous. ** From his extreme policies that target the most vulnerable to his divisive rhetoric that threatens the fabric of our democracy, Trump’s actions in his first 100 days have only deepened the divisions in our country and made life harder for everyday Americans. **[I won’t stand by while Trump continues to tear us apart. I’m working every day in Congress to stand up for the people I was elected to serve and fight back against this corrupt administration. From his extreme policies that target the most vulnerable to his divisive rhetoric that threatens the fabric of our democracy, Trump’s actions in his first 100 days have only deepened the divisions in our country and made life harder for everyday Americans. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, I also want to let you know that I hear you. There’s every reason to feel angry, frustrated, and exhausted right now. But one thing we can’t afford to feel is hopeless. I know I don’t. My Democratic colleagues and I are doing everything we can to stand up to the Trump administration — through legislation, legal action, and on-the-ground organizing — because the stakes couldn’t be higher. It’s an incredible honor to serve my community in Congress, even in these challenging times. I’m speaking out everywhere I can to condemn Donald Trump, his corrupt administration and radical agenda. I’m not backing down and I hope you’re not either. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I can’t thank you enough for your support, Peter. George Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: our shared values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/Speaker%20Emerita%20logo.png]

As the world mourns Pope Francis, we were reminded this week of the urgency to continue to tackle the climate crisis and to be good stewards of God’s Creation and to always honor the spark of divinity in the least of our brethren – championing the poor, the worker, the refugee and the immigrant.

As Democrats, we do so by staying true to and fighting for our values, For The People.

I wanted to send you a this note today to remind you of how important YOU – our VIPs, our Volunteers in Politics – are to our fight to build a better world and future For The Children – and I wanted to thank you for all you do in the pursuit of our urgent fight for our values and for our freedoms.

Democrats are unified in our fight to save our health care, to preserve the right to due process for everyone in our country, and to push back against cuts would rip away health care from millions and would keep countless Americans from accessing lifesaving care or receiving benefits that they have paid into – including Social Security, which is their own money.

We are united around fundamental rights and our shared values and we will Save Our Health Care and Take Back The House – because we have YOU.

You have the power to do this. Show your power and continue to speak out and to support our House Democrats and Democratic candidates who will FLIP the House and make Hakeem Jeffries our next Speaker of the House in the next election.

As long as we stay focused on what and who we are fighting for, and as long as we stay united in our cause, we will persevere and come out on the other side a more free and just nation that is worthy of the dreams and aspirations of our children and of the service and sacrifice of our men and women in uniform. Our House Democrats and I are counting on you.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

NANCY
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support?

[DONATE TO SUPPORT DR. KIM SCHRIER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106623634/542109113/-782864167?refcode=em25_250427_eom2_fndd_gq_act___SA_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250427_eom2_fndd_gq_act___SA_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a1f40a83-9a23-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY0MGE4My05YTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9CNlDFzAbzj3eYfcs7gy9OMXyJwpsAJZbKMQ41MmVc=)

Peter, I wanted to formally introduce myself: I’m Stuart, Kim’s campaign manager.

I’m fired up to be part of this campaign _because what happens here in WA-08 will decide control of the House in 2026._

We’re up against a GOP trifecta that’s putting their own needs ahead of the people they were elected to represent. And the consequences are real. But we have a chance to change that narrative..._if we win back the House._

When Democrats were in charge, we saw what real progress looked like: the first gun violence prevention legislation in decades, historic investments in infrastructure, and lower drug and insulin costs—a fight that hits home for Kim as the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress and someone living with Type-1 Diabetes.

Peter, there’s **so** much more work to do. From protecting reproductive freedom to tackling the cost of living to defending our democracy, there are real, urgent changes our government needs to make, _**and it’s critical that for-the-people Democrats are the ones who get to make them.**_

The road to a blue House runs through every tough, purple district—and WA-08 is one of them. We need to treat this election cycle like the tipping point it is. name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: The School Voucher Scam
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=FpwlK62zP5FP1eRAbRFrVYgE%2FDl9avZnJqBVs2QpTBYeYc0rRBIyvTVZrA2wW8Ko6fREfh3QPN0BzmVpVOC%2Fl6VgzjAtFeT3DkBYNVjyGBcXazzGdcSE7pFco0Dma6sZiLbnndrIDoiq4mZo9dWSBn2bDuHSpuPlCTKrGmiZZYa6mlEZTpFbKAxeMjiu6qeVZgNe2H9pxIrZwyfc%2F8jaKAVkcNRPZPbWDyjLE%2F6MGoqs%2BaGKN1sGRff3u7fsg45F%2F9f0z7iUaq7MTiOOhA5xV9Fl2TtIC3UR218w1NqXQ75NGAb8uK4r2583Avx2494kF456hoIKoJ99dOFe%2Ftp6BHBBIdd7v3zg7qzdmWGdHyVmnEjs1j8NcTP5YbpRrLjx28ENFMr5TlwqWo6K71D%2B0iRo3lbPjR3CvHE2fnvX2fs%3D]

# [#]
Peter, with Gov. Abbott spending millions to make his school voucher scam a reality, and Trump literally calling in his support the other day over speakerphone, we wanted to take a minute to remind you why allowing Abbott and Trump to have their way with our public education system would be a DISASTER for Texas kids.

Before we get into it, can you chip in ahead of our end-of-month deadline? Every dollar helps us mobilize Black and Latino voters to elect candidates that will respect public education » http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=25&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_042725_VOUCHERS_30DO_S2

🚫 School vouchers are unfair to taxpayers. When tax revenue is funnelled into both private and public schools, the people pay the price, and we don’t even get to share the resource.

🚫 School vouchers will reroute tax dollars to private institutions. This just doesn’t make sense – especially not when our schools are already suffering under relentless budget cuts and continuous threats to dissolve the federal DoEd.

🚫 School vouchers will disproportionately hurt Black and Latino students. Voucher programs have been linked to increased segregation and discrimination by opening up students to fewer civil rights protections.

Peter, school vouchers are hurt disguised as help, and we see right through it. Our students and education professionals deserve better, and it’s up to us to take a stand, but we can’t do so without your support.

Will you chip in ahead of our end-of-month deadline to make sure we can keep laying the groundwork to elect progressive leadership in Texas?

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=25&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_042725_VOUCHERS_30DO_S2

Thank you,

– Texas Organizing Project PAC

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Peter, with Gov. Abbott spending millions to make his school voucher scam a reality, and Trump literally calling in his support the other day over speakerphone, we wanted to take a minute to remind you why allowing Abbott and Trump to have their way with our public education system would be a DISASTER for Texas kids. Before we get into it, can you chip in ahead of our end-of-month deadline? Every dollar helps us mobilize Black and Latino voters to elect candidates that will respect public education » 🚫 School vouchers are unfair to taxpayers. When tax revenue is funnelled into both private and public schools, the people pay the price, and we don’t even get to share the resource. 🚫 School vouchers will reroute tax dollars to private institutions. This just doesn’t make sense – especially not when our schools are already suffering under relentless budget cuts and continuous threats to dissolve the federal DoEd. 🚫 School vouchers will disproportionately hurt Black and Latino students. Voucher programs have been linked to increased segregation and discrimination by opening up students to fewer civil rights protections. Peter, school vouchers are hurt disguised as help, and we see right through it. Our students and education professionals deserve better, and it’s up to us to take a stand, but we can’t do so without your support. Will you chip in ahead of our end-of-month deadline to make sure we can keep laying the groundwork to elect progressive leadership in Texas? Thank you, – Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. For more information, visit toppac.org [] . [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] Pol. adv. paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac.org [] , not authorized by any federal, state, or local candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Deb Haaland HQ
subject: slump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We’re going to level with you.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1592%2E400544%2EANDaE5)
We're going to level with you: our grassroots fundraising has hit a slump.
**And with a GOP opponent entering this race for Governor of New Mexico, we need to catch up. That’s why we set a goal to bring in 20,000 donations before April ends.**
**[If your budget allows for it, can you pitch in $5 or any amount to help us reach our goal and get our fundraising back on track?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250427_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250427-1592&refcode2=1592_400544_ANDaE5&akid=1592%2E400544%2EANDaE5)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250427_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250427-1592&refcode2=1592_400544_ANDaE5&akid=1592%2E400544%2EANDaE5)**
Our campaign to elect Deb and win a better future for New Mexicans is powered by everyday people.
Which means when our fundraising slows down, so does our ability to fund our plan to hire staff, organize up and down our state, and run ads to push back against attacks.
We set this goal to get back on track — not just for April, but for everything that comes next.
**Deb’s running to change the game for New Mexico and build a state where every family has what they need to thrive. But she can’t do it alone.**
**[If you’re with her — if you believe in this campaign and what we’re fighting for — will you chip in $5 or any amount to help us hit our April goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250427_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250427-1592&refcode2=1592_400544_ANDaE5&akid=1592%2E400544%2EANDaE5)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250427_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250427-1592&refcode2=1592_400544_ANDaE5&akid=1592%2E400544%2EANDaE5)**
Thank you, and more soon!
Team Deb

Did you see this headline, friend?
# Trump goes after Fox News for highlighting his cratering economic approval ratings
Even Donald Trump’s most beloved media outlet can’t hide how terrible he’s been in office. Of course the people have every right to disapprove!
Trump is solely responsible for decimating our previously strong foreign relationships with allies, depleting Social Security, and granting unelected and unvetted billionaire Elon Musk free rein to gut essential federal agencies and programs.
Meanwhile, GOP Governor Joe Lombardo calls struggling Nevadans impacted by Trump’s brash actions freeloaders. Last week in response, thousands of peaceful protestors retaliated across the state.
Nevadans just want to put in good work at a job that pays, that feeds their families, and keeps a roof over their heads. Trump and Lombardo are cutting every last lifeline our communities rely on, having us suffer, to hand billionaires tax cuts.
[_**Trump, Lombardo, and far-right megadonors will do everything to hold power, and we can stop them here in Nevada. ## Sunday Smiles – HotAir
I am in Washington, D.C., attending, I kid you not, the White House Correspondents' Association Sunday Brunch at the British Embassy. Hosted by CNN, no less. I promise to get a photo with my favorite CNN hosts. If they will let me! This morning’s Gospel reading is John 20:19–31: On the evening of that first day of the week, when the doors were locked, where the disciples were, for fear of the Jews, Jesus came and stood in their midst and said to them, “Peace be with you.” When he had said this, he showed them [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/pPLVrjNAv9LHKk3TkutgN2O8UlHMsebK86OBZkb9QX2aLLDIcvGjNztUU1iszLUpWNA03-BZFezxtzXwG5_WmPmKVjfSsmdlhD6qjVFFv6fGiC8p_Sp1vWCHVVTulzKejO6dIezxFDtBRECOooGfc-rRq1obTuBB1G736NslSRz4sQYS_e-lJ4x1hohLQDSfrueiTpHEgd_dZfgr0SWQXXhJSlYj8slkAHEoFHPoKdVEDsqx_GM0s14eNPtJWFo2z9RC4D6CX-m-LiiSKlQgZPK-uSqpxbrLA6B_VPVEu0Tz8p74NUJ1-srdAY9s3e1m/YWanw21USyuogbIW481t46rxuhp2XPlz/8)

Hennepin County Attorney Mary Moriarty recently gained notoriety for not prosecuting a Minnesota government employee for committing a series of felonies for keying Teslas. You know the adage, "Don't shoot yourself in the foot"? That's exactly what New Yorkers are doing by pouring their tax dollars into the Legal Aid Society. It should be called the Illegal Aid Society. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204mtsgjxd0g3ne5jpyrxxdy23k5m231sl9vvvbu5l83lyc1yggtrggtqlmzyr1r3zjpm3ur9uf83xv1uxc&__stmp=sve66h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sve66h&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzaeixgt4nv5egsx4vt0r5cyphwma7mq5d2sam0v2ysr4d65p0iw5o8dei3m4zyf86impcu301loj30agv65wzfrjkszjv17qvgxj9r9g824um9vothkqpgtte3lglko63j9i5hj9oxeswo8v8fh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sve66h&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sve66h&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sve66h&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sve66h&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzaeixgt4nv5egsx4vt0r5cyzuychl88ja9ipsq68l29l1i338vcnhb9lr6lx91h43kyq9jk2bfa96cvzam17m36yh9ygto7nmbsddri6a3yf7kcqqlx1psd6bpjnftiupyyayuj4qntk9rvsj91&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sve66h&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sve66h&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
