"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e13834871/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA0Mjc/LbmNsUnZhdTZNMA/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU1JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA0MjYmX25saWQ9dWJCUWNYWjNieiZfbmhpZHM9bmNMRTZ1bndCVFd3REtscw/gaA6MlA/s5k0db79acf)

**Here’s what we’re up against:**
1. Trump’s administration is deporting people to dangerous conditions without due process — a direct assault on our values and constitutional protections.
2. Trump’s tariff war on the world is hurting American workers, families, and small businesses by increasing costs and destroying retirement savings.
3. Trump, Musk, and House Republicans are once again trying to gut Medicaid and Social Security – lifelines millions of Americans rely on to stay healthy and secure.

Let me be clear: We are facing this crisis because Republicans in Congress enabled this behavior — and now Trump is acting like there is absolutely no one to stop him.
**That’s why flipping the House in 2026 isn’t just crucial — it’s urgent.**
[Will you chip in right now and help us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal of $12,000? The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: The consequences are already devastating. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Raul. The damage inflicted on the country since Donald Trump returned to the White House is staggering. From assaults on our rights to economic instability and threats to our public health, the consequences of his unchecked power are real — and they’re happening fast. = | | = Here’s what we’re up against: 1. Trump’s administration is deporting people to dangerous conditions without due process — a direct assault on our values and constitutional protections. 2. Trump’s tariff war on the world is hurting American workers, families, and small businesses by increasing costs and destroying retirement savings. 3. Trump, Musk, and House Republicans are once again trying to gut Medicaid and Social Security – lifelines millions of Americans rely on to stay healthy and secure. Let me be clear: We are facing this crisis because Republicans in Congress enabled this behavior — and now Trump is acting like there is absolutely no one to stop him. That’s why flipping the House in 2026 isn’t just crucial — it’s urgent. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: AOC
subject: We must end the indignity of not being able to afford medicine.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Health care is a human right in America, and everyone should have it.
We must end the indignity of not being able to afford medicine, a doctor’s appointment, and being able to take care of one another.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250427-video-a.uDwIx_&refcode=em20250427-8703-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8703%2E2526796%2EpyUqRL)
I don't believe in health care for all, labor rights, and human dignity because I'm some kind of extremist. I believe in these things because I was a waitress.
[We rely completely on small-dollar donors, so if you can, will you chip in $5 to power our campaign for real progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250427-video-a.uDwIx_&refcode=em20250427-8703-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8703%2E2526796%2EpyUqRL)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250427-video-a.uDwIx_&refcode=em20250427-8703-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=8703%2E2526796%2EpyUqRL)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250427-video-a?refcode=em20250427-8703-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=8703_2526796_pyUqRL&akid=8703%2E2526796%2EpyUqRL)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250427-8703-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=8703%2E2526796%2EpyUqRL)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=8703%2E2526796%2EpyUqRL) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=8703%2E2526796%2EpyUqRL) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=8703%2E2526796%2EpyUqRL)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Gabe reached out because Donald Trump just launched an all-out attack on a Democratic Party institution this week — the first of likely many — and we need to respond before our April fundraising deadline on Wednesday at midnight. With Trump willing to do anything and everything to hold onto power, we need to work twice as hard to re-elect Democratic champions like Gabe — and that’s where you come in. = | | = Thanks, team — forwarding Gabe’s message below. Begin Forwarded Message from Gabe Vasquez: = Saludos, it’s Gabe. This week, Donald Trump launched an all-out attack on our Democratic Party institutions, starting with the platform we use to build grassroots movements like ours. And this is far from the worst of what’s to come. Trump has made it clear he’s willing to do whatever it takes to dismantle the Democratic Party, hold onto his Republican trifecta and enact his extremist agenda. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Right now, Democrats need a fighter — someone who’s not afraid of tough battles and no stranger to winning them. name: Lily Tang Williams for Congress
subject: Easter, Press Coverage, China’s Bluffing is Over
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/easter-press-coverage-chinas-bluffing-is-over-18043598?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# Easter, Press Coverage, China’s Bluffing, AMERICAN PATRIOT.
**Easter**
I hope you had a peaceful and joyful Easter. I attended Weare Christian Church for Easter service in my hometown. Pastor Stockhaus asked what prayers the congregation and guests would like to request. I asked for the prayers for the people I love in my life, including my extended family relatives I have not seen for 10 years.

**Media Coverage**
Since my announcement of 2026 campaign for Congress in NH02, I have received positive media coverage. Here are a few:

[Lily Tang Williams Enters 2nd CD Race as Goodlander Considers Senate Run - NH Journal](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=fcaf475250&e=c338950e03)

(Note: Rep. Goodlander will re-run for her seat and _not run_ for Senate)

[Chinese-Born Republican Candidate Takes Another Swing At Winning Key House Seat | The Daily Caller](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=9eb616a76a&e=c338950e03)

[WMURTV: Rematch possible in New Hampshire's 2nd District](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=6cacc861c1&e=c338950e03)

**Is China’s Bluffing over? **
Just what exactly is President Trump doing? Has China been bluffing with their latest trade announcements, and if so, is their bluffing over? I know the economy in China is pretty bad right now, 30% unemployment and terrible demographics, so enormous pressure by our administration can have real effect. China is posturing (read Sun Tsu) but the internal political infighting in China is real and very intense. China's President Xi may not last much longer. So, let the official US-China bilateral trade negotiations begin! A reasonable trade deal will be good for both countries and the world, of course, but President Trump must always put America first. After the Chinese leaders save face, President Trump wins with grace.

**AMERICAN PATRIOT**
My new meme AMERICAN PATRIOT T-shirts, posters & coffee mugs are available now in my personal store: [http://lilytangwilliams-shop.fourthwall.com](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=7d93055fde&e=c338950e03) I have watched "The Patriot" many times since I came to the USA. In case you are wondering, though, why not show me riding a horse? I was born in the year of the dragon! The dragon represents power, strength, wisdom, and good fortune. It is considered an auspicious creature that brings luck and prosperity.

**Lily vs Maggie Rematch 2026**
I am answering my calling to run again for Congress in New Hampshire's second congressional district. I want to be at the forefront of a movement to help bring forth a new renaissance to the country I love and serve the people in #NH02 who welcomed me with open arms. [See my x.com video link here](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=191eaa597a&e=c338950e03)

Could you please donate? [Click here to donate](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=4469f2c8e9&e=c338950e03)

Thank you and God Bless

clean_body: Earle-Sears: bought and paid for by far-right billionaires | Hi Derek, You might have heard the name Harlan Crow, the far-right billionaire who lavished Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas with secret gifts and luxury vacations. But here’s what you might not know: Crow has given $65,000 in an effort to elect Winsome Earle-Sears as Governor of Virginia. We need all the help we can get when the other side is funded by dark money billionaires, Derek. = | ************=********** Winsome Earle-Sears isn’t hiding the company she keeps — and it’s not everyday Virginians like us. It’s shady billionaires with extreme agendas like slashing Social Security, gutting taxes for the rich, and ripping away our fundamental rights.** Unless we fight back now, she and her MAGA backers will have a clear path to hold onto the Governor’s Mansion and finish the job Youngkin started. The choices we make in these final days of April will determine whether grassroots Democrats can keep pace or if far-right billionaires can drown us out. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = Let’s make it clear: Virginia’s future isn’t up for auction. – Team DPVA [content goes here] Forwarded this email? We're a community powered by more than five million grassroots supporters — like you! — who fight for progressive change day in and day out. As we prepare to elect more Democratic pro-choice women this year, I'm reviewing our 2025 donation records to give our candidates an accurate estimate of the level of support they can expect. Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

#
---
Peter — Is there _anything_ we can say to earn your support before our April fundraising deadline? What if we told you that Donald Trump and Elon Musk are gutting Social Security and Medicare and taking a chainsaw to essential programs American people rely on? What if we told you that Trump is giving our country and the market economic whiplash due to his reckless trade wars, despite his promises to lower costs on day one? **And what if we told you all of this chaos is just to make Trump and his friends even richer off the backs of the American people?** Mazie is fighting every day for working families and the people of Hawaii, but she needs you by her side, Peter. **[Please, before our April fundraising deadline: Chip in any amount toward our goal to fuel Mazie’s work defending working families from this administration’s harmful agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106626384/542118686/-1348676356?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250427_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzcwNmFmOS1hYjIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BgNHNkdonaj40OJh-Fzq921Y_nhDZ6-cRQRodpTMe7M=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106626389/542118689/-1348676356?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250427_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzcwNmFmOS1hYjIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BgNHNkdonaj40OJh-Fzq921Y_nhDZ6-cRQRodpTMe7M=)

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=q7AsNxz9v6A/Bj5Desx1lyJqd1H2mdaUzD6HjgmTtDZ48ulqr1p1Z8+VeRceu8UvtsrvfokqjEgkjJyf2a39Sv48ucZVDa6uAZ91y1A9qIA=]

name: Crow for Congress
subject: bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team, we have some bad news to share today:

With just a few days left in the month, we’re at risk of falling short of our April fundraising goal.

We're not going to scare you into donating or tell you the sky is falling — it’s not.

But our best chance at holding off the extreme MAGA agenda is to win back the House in 2026, and that important work is already in motion.

As the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s new Recruitment Co-Chair, Jason is supporting campaigns to elect true servant leaders to the House in 2026.

This work is vital, and keeping Jason focused on electing the Democratic leaders of tomorrow — not fundraising — is how we’ll keep our momentum toward progress going full speed ahead. We have our first end-of-month goal of the quarter coming up, so we’re asking you:

Will you support Jason’s work with a $5 donation today? Every dollar helps us reach our goal and fuel our fight for the future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25?amount=5]

body:
#transparencyproject Part 16: There are many ways for you to follow and support our efforts to create transparency and accountability in our election process.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5kYXNlbnNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.bqKsPsZYNEdycZzxwRjQCIsysqrlvpzhcbYy8Kl0FR0?) for more
---
# [ALERT: Supreme Court Oral Arguments Scheduled for May 5th at 9:00 am](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=162263860&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMjYzODYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU3ODg5MzgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODM4MDkzOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Vz-j9Ut_ovSfwqHNs3Ao3jQwo3q7VGCxznAD_rDz8f8)
### #transparencyproject Part 16: There are many ways for you to follow and support our efforts to create transparency and accountability in our election process.
| | [Benda For Commonsense](https://substack.com/@bendasense)
---
| Apr 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@bendasense)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=162263860&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMjYzODYwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NTc4ODkzOCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ4MzgwOTM4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjA2NjQ0MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZeOXp3eM_KfEBLl_dNvBeNGUcdlemHyK-adyc9AW-fA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=162263860&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMjYzODYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU3ODg5MzgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODM4MDkzOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Vz-j9Ut_ovSfwqHNs3Ao3jQwo3q7VGCxznAD_rDz8f8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=162263860&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMjYzODYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU3ODg5MzgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODM4MDkzOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Vz-j9Ut_ovSfwqHNs3Ao3jQwo3q7VGCxznAD_rDz8f8)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvYmVuZGFzZW5zZS9wL2FsZXJ0LXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtb3JhbC1hcmd1bWVudHM_.5q4ZkQPuRfeXBhO6e9rzQjqoLm69nGCEeRj5Zuf-zzU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/bendasense/p/alert-supreme-court-oral-arguments?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

After 2 1/2 years, I finally get to stand in an open courtroom and declare that modems are being used in the voting systems of six counties in Minnesota. 1 In additon to this admission by the Secretary of State, we now also know that the Office of the Secretary of State ("OSS") actually receives these early modemed results in their office and shares this data with others, including the media.
Our case argues that this practice violates the statutory modem ban in Minnesota, and that the OSS's failure to examine or certify these modems is erroneous. Prior to putting these modems on trial and under scrutiny, however, we have been forced to battle through years of hurdles and roadblocks. The current roadblock is a ruling by the Minnesota Court of Appeals that we were required to serve _**all candidates running for all offices**_ in the 2022 election with a copy of the petition. Our best estimate is that this would have required personal service on over 130 candidates in the Rice County election. We have found no other circumstances where this onerous requirement has been applied in an election errors and omissions action under Minn. Stat. 204B.44.
@Bendasense Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5kYXNlbnNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.IUYnI9oSH3jwL7J3RqsAAEydvyNnZUtOQGc7EW42Jkk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162263860)
On May 5th, our case will appear before the full [seven member panel](https://substack.com/redirect/dd90cf65-3052-44f9-a3c9-9f5ba7db9ed1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Minnesota Suprement Court. 2 There are many ways for you to follow this case and more importantly show your support. The morning of May 5th (9:00 am) you can watch the Supreme Court livestream [here](https://substack.com/redirect/213cd532-afce-4196-81a3-c59724c6df0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac531ae5-627b-42ea-a23c-b12baa14cbff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You can also attend in person at the Minnesota Judicial Center at 25 Rev Dr Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard., St Paul, MN 55155, Courtroom 300. If you do plan to attend, please note that there is limited seating in the courtroom, but there will a televised feed in the atrium outside the courtroom. There are general rules of [decorum](https://substack.com/redirect/bc4e8547-565f-41cb-9c4e-3bbb38aad31f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that need to be followed. I am also requesting that my supporters refrain from wearing any shirts, hats, buttons or any other items with writing or messages on them. I will be wearing my best red tie, and I ask that our group wear a red outfight, scarf or other red clothing to show your support!
Also, the Rice County Republicans are hosting an event following oral arguments at a nearby location. This is a private event, and we are requesting that you RSVP to contact@ricecountyrepublicans.com.
Guest speakers have been lined up and details will follow. One nationally known speaker will be presenting an update on election transparency and accountability efforts at the national level.
Finally, while I don't often solicit donations, this effort is not easy and to-date we have relied upon purely voluntary donations for costs and expenses. I have never been paid a fee for any of my work. Also, whether or not we win at the Supreme Court level, we are prepared to continue to scrutinize the election process. This will require technical-expert review of the voting systems. We are in contact with national experts in this field and we will need funds to support their review of Minnesota's election systems, and importantly to prepare them to testify when the time comes.
The Plaintiff in this case is the non-profit, Benda for Commonsense, which is a 501(c)(4) qualified organization. If you are able and willing to donate to our continued efforts, please click [here.](https://substack.com/redirect/bbc055e6-528e-4074-87ac-8e9ec015bc42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) This stripe link allows you to donate in $20 increments.
Thank you for following this journey. Too often, it feels like the deck is stacked against us. However, persistence and perseverance are the lodestones of this effort. Your support and encouragement are invaluable. Please comment, share this post, and invite others to do the same.
1
At the beginning of oral arguments, I get three minutes of uninterrupted time to make my opening statement. After that initial statement, the Justices will launch into a dynamic exchange of questions and answers. I am open to feedback from my subscribers to give me ideas for possible statements that I should make during this opening statement. Please post your ideas in the comments or DM me.
2
Founded in 1858, the Minnesota Supreme Court is the state's [court of last resort](https://substack.com/redirect/92fd1bf3-fdd1-4119-b9ff-fbdc38533bad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and has seven judgeships. The current chief of the court is [Natalie Hudson](https://substack.com/redirect/ff15c4fb-89d7-4a27-883a-008610f0c1f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As of May 2024, all seven judges on the court were appointed by a Democrat governor.
You're currently a free subscriber to [@Bendasense Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/6484cc2a-4541-49c5-8bf3-303b9ea4c286?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5kYXNlbnNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.IUYnI9oSH3jwL7J3RqsAAEydvyNnZUtOQGc7EW42Jkk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5kYXNlbnNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.IUYnI9oSH3jwL7J3RqsAAEydvyNnZUtOQGc7EW42Jkk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee.

Whenever things get tough or feel hopeless, I like to turn to my favorite song, “Love’s in Need of Love Today” by Stevie Wonder.

The lyrics ring true even now, almost 50 years after its release: Hate's goin' 'round
Breaking hate's tried to break my heart many times In this current moment marred by Trump’s extreme partisanship and chaos, it can sometimes feel like there’s only hate.

But being able to stand up for North Carolina’s values of freedom, equality, and democracy as your Congresswoman is what keeps me going.

Peter, my end-of-month fundraising deadline is approaching, and I need your help to reach the $5,000 goal needed to support my colleagues facing competitive races in 2026. [If you’re with me and committed to fighting Trump’s extremism, will you give $10 or more before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106626680/542119825/164693686?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_042725_EOM_2YO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWUxYjc1My1hZjIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2d7IDQttsZ5W2sJFsxLkUdbddJ_Zv9qWlmA1pSIMHlg=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee. Whenever things get tough or feel hopeless, I like to turn to my favorite song, “Love’s in Need of Love Today” by Stevie Wonder. The lyrics ring true even now, almost 50 years after its release: Hate's goin' 'round Breaking hate's tried to break my heart many times In this current moment marred by Trump’s extreme partisanship and chaos, it can sometimes feel like there’s only hate. But being able to stand up for North Carolina’s values of freedom, equality, and democracy as your Congresswoman is what keeps me going. Peter, my end-of-month fundraising deadline is approaching, and I need your help to reach the $5,000 goal needed to support my colleagues facing competitive races in 2026. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’ll end this email with the final lyric of my favorite song — and my guiding principle in life: Just give the world love. * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. subject: three things you should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
This race is more than just Virginia's future – It's going to be a bellwether for the entire nation and the first major election after Trump’s inauguration

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106626743/542120000/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-27_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ1MWIxNmYtYjEyMy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I47_TU_1y6eZlGCWaGwBkXa8ckO9Mv4WVM3o4dDGuJw=)

| Peter,

We’re just three days away from our April fundraising deadline, and**I wanted to share three important things you should know about Abigail’s race for Virginia Governor this November:**
1. **This race is more than just Virginia's future** – It's going to be a bellwether for the entire nation and the first major election after Trump’s inauguration. The outcome will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. So we’ve got to win big.

2. **_The Cook Political Report_ has called this race a complete TOSS-UP** – That means this race will be tough, and polls are going to stay tight right up until Election Day on November 4, 2025.

3. **National attention and money will flood this race** – With Republicans determined to keep the Governor’s seat red, we can expect millions from their super PACs pouring in to try to sway the outcome.

We know this race is going to be one of the most closely watched in the country — and with the stakes this high, every dollar counts!

**[_That’s why I’m asking for your help today. With just three days left before our April fundraising deadline, can we count on you to make a contribution today? Every bit helps, and together, we can flip Virginia’s Governor’s office this November and begin the work of improving people’s lives!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106626744/542120001/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-27_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ1MWIxNmYtYjEyMy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I47_TU_1y6eZlGCWaGwBkXa8ckO9Mv4WVM3o4dDGuJw=)**

clean_body: This race is more than just Virginia's future – It's going to be a bellwether for the entire nation and the first major election after Trump’s inauguration | = | Peter, We’re just three days away from our April fundraising deadline, andI wanted to share three important things you should know about Abigail’s race for Virginia Governor this November: 1. This race is more than just Virginia's future – It's going to be a bellwether for the entire nation and the first major election after Trump’s inauguration. The outcome will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. So we’ve got to win big. 2. The Cook Political Report has called this race a complete TOSS-UP – That means this race will be tough, and polls are going to stay tight right up until Election Day on November 4, 2025. 3. National attention and money will flood this race – With Republicans determined to keep the Governor’s seat red, we can expect millions from their super PACs pouring in to try to sway the outcome. We know this race is going to be one of the most closely watched in the country — and with the stakes this high, every dollar counts! = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sam Campaign Manager * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Government only works if it works for the people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I’m running for Governor of Michigan to bring real solutions to the table, not political games or inaction.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=257%2E181023%2E6jUTsT)
I know this firsthand, team: **Government only works if it works _for_ the people. **
That’s why I’m running for Governor of Michigan — to bring real solutions to the table, not political games or inaction.
That means making government more efficient for working families, whether it’s saving them time when accessing government services or saving them money by standing up to special interests.
It means both listening to the concerns of Michiganders _and_ actually taking action to fix them.
And it means investing in our state’s future so Michigan is a place where anyone can be a kid, raise a kid, have access to the health care and housing they need, and where our businesses and communities thrive.
I know how to win tough fights for the people. I have the strength and experience to get the job done and ensure that every Michigan family gets a fair shot in life.
After leading the state’s second-largest agency, I’m ready to deliver substantial results for everyday Michiganders and finally bring the leadership required to solve the biggest issues Michigan faces today.
[**If this sounds like the future you want for Michigan, chip in today to join our movement. Together, we’ll fight to build the future Michiganders deserve.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250427_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=257%2E181023%2E6jUTsT)

name: Nellie Pou HQ
subject: What you don't know about Nellie Pou
body:
Nellie has devoted her life to serving her community.

| |
---
Team, We figured now is as good a time as any to tell you more about Congresswoman Nellie Pou. For many years, she's represented North Jersey in the State Senate. She fought for our students, our veterans, and for a clean energy economy. Last fall, when her mentor and good friend, Congressman Bill Pascrell, passed away, she rose to the challenge of assembling a campaign for Congress in breakneck speed — and she won! — becoming the first Latina elected to Congress ever in New Jersey. It was one of the closest races in the country, and Nellie won less than 51% of the vote in a district Donald Trump carried. Since her very first vote, Mike Johnson and the NRCC have relentlessly attacked Nellie and are mounting an offensive to defeat her. They'll stop at nothing to win, and you can bet that they will spend millions of dollars in that process. **[In just four days, we have our big end-of-month fundraising goal, and we have set out a goal to raise $10,000 online. clean_body: Nellie has devoted her life to serving her community. | | Team, We figured now is as good a time as any to tell you more about Congresswoman Nellie Pou. For many years, she's represented North Jersey in the State Senate. She fought for our students, our veterans, and for a clean energy economy. Last fall, when her mentor and good friend, Congressman Bill Pascrell, passed away, she rose to the challenge of assembling a campaign for Congress in breakneck speed — and she won! — becoming the first Latina elected to Congress ever in New Jersey. It was one of the closest races in the country, and Nellie won less than 51% of the vote in a district Donald Trump carried. Since her very first vote, Mike Johnson and the NRCC have relentlessly attacked Nellie and are mounting an offensive to defeat her. They'll stop at nothing to win, and you can bet that they will spend millions of dollars in that process. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. = Thank you. — Nellie Pou HQ | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . subject: Bernie Sanders is LEADING the fight >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89470?t=6&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89470?t=7&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89470?t=8&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89470?t=9&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89470?t=10&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19669%2E878179%2ELpfCmk)

subject: This picture:
body:
---
Derek, they say a picture is worth a thousand words, so we’ll let this one speak for itself: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250427_3287_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3287_22930333_IUi1yD&akid=3287%2E22930333%2EIUi1yD) Trump is now selling 2028 merchandise, despite the Constitution prohibiting him from running for a third term. But with Trump already ignoring orders from the Supreme Court, there’s no telling how far he’ll go in attempting to defy the very foundation of our democracy. And Republicans have proven over and over again that they’d rather fall in line behind Trump than stand up for the best interests of people all over the country. **That’s why it’s more important than ever that we elect Democratic leaders at all levels of government who will check Trump’s power in any way they can. So we’re asking:** [**Can you please chip in $3 to the DNC now? Your contribution will go directly towards electing more Democrats in states like yours who will stand up to Trump. name: Devan
subject: Introducing myself: -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there team, I'm Devan, and I'm the Executive Director of the DSCC.

Over the next two years, it'll be my job to develop our winning strategy to put Democrats in the _strongest_ position possible to flip the Senate blue. But I can't do that without insights from supporters like you, so one of my first priorities as Executive Director is to build a team of Democrats to inform my advisors.

**They told me that you were in our top ten percent of supporters last year -- so it's clear that I can rely on _you._ That's why I'm asking you to take my new strategy survey:**

[**Please, click here to enter my official Democratic strategy survey >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21491?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250427-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250427-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20123%2E9716520%2EXziJPz)

| | [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21491?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250427-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250427-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20123%2E9716520%2EXziJPz)
---

With competitive elections all over the map and _even more_ MAGA loyalists up for re-election, we have a golden opportunity here. **We have the chance to unseat far-right Republicans AND replace Trump's worst enablers with strong Democrats who will fight for our rights.**

But in order to lock in our victory, I need to gather critical data immediately from motivated supporters like you. **I'm _100% confident_ your insights will sharpen our strategy.**

[**So please, will you accept the invitation to join my strategy survey before the midnight deadline? I'm waiting to review your responses before I make my next move, so please click here to enter the survey now >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21491?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250427-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250427-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20123%2E9716520%2EXziJPz)

| [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21491?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250427-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250427-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20123%2E9716520%2EXziJPz)
---

I'm looking forward to hearing from you. **Together, we'll lead the fight to win back our Senate majority.**

Thank you,

Devan
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q2-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=20123_9716520_XziJPz&akid=20123%2E9716520%2EXziJPz)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=20123_9716520_XziJPz&akid=20123%2E9716520%2EXziJPz)**.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Former Secretary of State & former CIA Director, Mike Pompeo
subject: Do you trust me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I'm writing to you today because I trust you, Peter. I need to share something with you that's of the utmost importance.
As a former Secretary of State and CIA Director, I've had access to sensitive information and seen firsthand the Left's plans to undermine our country's values and institutions.

GOP Rep. Wesley Hunt **[erupted at Rep. Pramila Jayapal and other Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/448c9461-2f88-4b48-b998-2694d1b3cc76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for their failed attempt to suppress President Donald Trump's campaign with a desperate lawfare siege in 2024.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/448c9461-2f88-4b48-b998-2694d1b3cc76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/448c9461-2f88-4b48-b998-2694d1b3cc76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Jayapal gave a scathing monologue against Trump, recounting his legal past and a supposed "lack of accountability."
"In May of 2024, Donald Trump was found guilty of 34 felony charges under New York state law for falsifying business records to conceal hush money payments made to Stormy Daniels," Jayapal told congress. She thanked the witness before concluding, "Protection against tyranny, that's really what we are talking about here."
Rep. Hunt was ready with a powerful response. "You may have forgot this but again, they threw everything at President Trump, they impeached him twice, they tried to remove his name from state presidential ballots, they laser focussed lady justice to try to eliminate the competition!"
"How do you survive this?!" Hunt asked. "He is clearly not like the average person. He is a political force of nature!"
Hunt continued to dump salt right on the wounded Democrats, "This is repulsive behavior that we saw from the left to prevent a man from becoming president of the free world, and guess what happened; **[we the people saw right through the crap!!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/448c9461-2f88-4b48-b998-2694d1b3cc76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch Hunt go off and the Democrats just have to sit there and take it:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/448c9461-2f88-4b48-b998-2694d1b3cc76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **The Hidden Energy Crisis That Could Cripple America (And How One U.S. Company Is Fighting Back)**
When Texas energy prices skyrocketed 1,500% during grid failures, it exposed a vulnerability threatening every American family. With global electricity demand projected to surge 185% by 2050 and renewable energy's intermittent nature, we face a critical energy security challenge.
**[One American company has developed a groundbreaking solution](https://substack.com/redirect/a78c45b0-7ffb-4cbf-bb03-4414dc056ca2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) : **sodium-ion battery technology that:
* Uses materials 1,400× more abundant in America than lithium
* Eliminates dangerous fire risks associated with lithium batteries
* Costs up to 60% less than foreign alternatives
* Projected to last 33% longer than traditional lithium-ion batteries

**[Next Thing Technologies has already scaled from laboratory prototypes to commercial-grade cells](https://substack.com/redirect/a78c45b0-7ffb-4cbf-bb03-4414dc056ca2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **capable of powering homes during outages. With advisors from Tesla, Panasonic, and government agencies, they're bringing this American-made solution to market.
For just $498, you can join over 7,700 investors who've already invested $6.1+ million.
The company's first funding round sold out completely, with valuation increasing 209% since then.
With the energy storage market projected to reach $435 billion by 2030,**[this could be your final opportunity before institutional investors arrive.](https://substack.com/redirect/a78c45b0-7ffb-4cbf-bb03-4414dc056ca2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# BREAKING: Trump takes questions from reporters before returning to D.C.
President Donald Trump attended Pope Francis' funeral this weekend in Rome, during which he sat with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to discuss peace terms for their war with Russia.
Trump returned to **[a gaggle of a reporters with many questions](https://substack.com/redirect/bea04c01-9a23-4496-bb72-54d4f4a5525f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about his meeting with Zelenskyy, other foreign policy issues, the economy and many other topics. He arrived walking with Philadelphia Eagles Running Back Saquon Barkley.
"What a nice guy he is!" Trump told reporters of Barkley. "I wanted to race him but I decided not to do it"
Watch to hear the President who never sleeps take on the press once again:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bea04c01-9a23-4496-bb72-54d4f4a5525f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# _**Don 't Miss It:**_**They love Abrego Garcia but they can't answer THIS question...**
PolitiBrawl Editor Matt Miller **[asked anti-Trump protesters in Washington D.C.](https://substack.com/redirect/97f7660a-fd4e-44fc-a290-3fab8b1ba85a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** what was their message to illegal immigrant and alleged MS-13 member Kilmar Abrego Garcia.
"Hang on, we're coming for you!" one protester told Miller. Others voiced supportive messages and desire to bring Abrego Garcia back the the U.S.A.
"What is your message to Patty Morin?" Miller followed up.
"Who? Sorry I don't know who that is" most protesters answered.
Patty Morin or Maryland, is the mother of Rachel Morin who was viciously murdered by an illegal immigrant.
Watch their responses when Miller tells them who Patty Morin is and again asks "what is your message to her?"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/97f7660a-fd4e-44fc-a290-3fab8b1ba85a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

subject: Nobody elected this guy — we can stop him.
body:
Women will lead the charge against this billionaire takeover. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106628136/542125063/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE468_20250427_MuskStinksRS_ALL&sourceid=1055987&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDczNDc1Ny1iYjIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLa28ePsfxB0XiZaaMQAGS38F9MJQ4Y1Qh-npvQdb7w=) Peter,

Elon Musk was not elected by the American people. A recent _Pew Research_ survey shows he is unpopular with the majority of Americans across parties. He is not a member of any Cabinet. So how the hell is he able to destroy thousands of jobs, access our private information, and obliterate more than 50 years of progress in civil and human rights?

Here's how: Because not a single Republican will stand in his way.

I'm here to tell you, Peter: There are ways to stop this tech-bro takeover of our government. And electing more women is the key to doing it.

[**If you're ready to take a stand against Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and their Republican allies, make a donation to EMILYs List. Our work electing Democratic pro-choice women has never mattered more.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106628137/542125064/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE468_20250427_MuskStinksRS_ALL&sourceid=1055987&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDczNDc1Ny1iYjIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLa28ePsfxB0XiZaaMQAGS38F9MJQ4Y1Qh-npvQdb7w=) | [TAKE A STAND](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106628138/542125065/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE468_20250427_MuskStinksRS_ALL&sourceid=1055987&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDczNDc1Ny1iYjIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLa28ePsfxB0XiZaaMQAGS38F9MJQ4Y1Qh-npvQdb7w=)

There are three big ways the EMILYs List community can help stop Musk's madness in its tracks.
1. We can **support the attorneys general** filing suits against Trump and his unconstitutional cession of power to Musk, many of whom are EMILYs List women.

2. We can **elect more AGs and governors** to join their efforts and hold Republican extremists like Trump and Musk accountable. We've endorsed candidates for both offices already this year!

3. We can **flip the House** in 2026, breaking the GOP's trifecta and giving Congress crucial oversight abilities to curb the Trump/Musk agenda. And here's the best part: Right now, Republicans have the smallest House majority in almost 100 years. If we flip _just three seats_ in 2026, the House is ours.

It's easy to feel discouraged when we see how much damage one person can do to the fabric of our democracy. But the fight is ON, and women are leading the charge to shut this anti-democratic billionaire and his cronies down.

clean_body: Women will lead the charge against this billionaire takeover. | = Peter, Elon Musk was not elected by the American people. A recent Pew Research survey shows he is unpopular with the majority of Americans across parties. He is not a member of any Cabinet. So how the hell is he able to destroy thousands of jobs, access our private information, and obliterate more than 50 years of progress in civil and human rights? Here's how: Because not a single Republican will stand in his way. I'm here to tell you, Peter: There are ways to stop this tech-bro takeover of our government. And electing more women is the key to doing it. = | = There are three big ways the EMILYs List community can help stop Musk's madness in its tracks. 1. We can support the attorneys general filing suits against Trump and his unconstitutional cession of power to Musk, many of whom are EMILYs List women. 2. We can elect more AGs and governors to join their efforts and hold Republican extremists like Trump and Musk accountable. We've endorsed candidates for both offices already this year! 3. We can flip the House in 2026, breaking the GOP's trifecta and giving Congress crucial oversight abilities to curb the Trump/Musk agenda. And here's the best part: Right now, Republicans have the smallest House majority in almost 100 years. If we flip just three seats in 2026, the House is ours. It's easy to feel discouraged when we see how much damage one person can do to the fabric of our democracy. But the fight is ON, and women are leading the charge to shut this anti-democratic billionaire and his cronies down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. ## INVESTIGATION EXPLODES AFTER EVIDENCE DISAPPEARS
---
In his most recent report, Cody reveals to the public that a criminal investigation into high-ranking Skagit County officials, including the Skagit County Prosecuting Attorney and Superior Court judges, has exploded and that the Skagit County Sheriff is now under scrutiny after evidence may have disappeared. Watch more on RUMBLE, and YOUTUBE.

No, that’s not a typo – **just $5.** $5 to expose Team Extreme’s plans to cut Social Security and Medicaid. $5 to replace the Republican House with a Democratic majority. $5 to hold extreme MAGA Republicans accountable. I know $5 might not seem like it can do all those things. If everyone gives a little, it adds up quickly. null, Michigan built this country. It built the middle class. And it built me.
I’m running for Senate because it’s time to build a brighter future for Michigan – for the people and communities I love in the great state where I was born and raised.
**But this is already shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive race in the entire country, and the GOP’s billionaire buddies are ready to spend whatever it takes to flip this battleground seat red. That means I need your urgent grassroots support to fight back and win:_[Will you give $5 or more now – any amount you can chip in before midnight – to help me keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and keep up my fight for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106628789/542127387/-1649021094?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk86-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmE4OWFhMC1jMTIzLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w41wdHZ5ek0e9cyamu--MoKQq45an5fBJuGuMpMg61w=)_**

I’ll be honest with you: We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us. Election experts predict that Michigan will decide Senate control, and _The Cook Political Report_ has already ranked this race as a “Toss Up.” That means Republicans are coming after me as a TOP target for defeat.
